===== web/modules/custom/ilas_site_assistant/ilas_site_assistant.info.yml =====
     1	name: 'ILAS Site Assistant'
     2	type: module
     3	description: 'A site-scoped chatbot assistant for Idaho Legal Aid Services that helps users find resources, FAQs, and navigate to appropriate services without providing legal advice.'
     4	package: Custom
     5	core_version_requirement: ^10 || ^11
     6	dependencies:
     7	  - drupal:node
     8	  - drupal:taxonomy
     9	  - drupal:user
    10	  - drupal:views
    11	  - drupal:search_api
    12	  - drupal:paragraphs

===== web/modules/custom/ilas_site_assistant/ilas_site_assistant.permissions.yml =====
     1	administer ilas site assistant:
     2	  title: 'Administer ILAS Site Assistant'
     3	  description: 'Configure settings for the ILAS Site Assistant chatbot.'
     4	  restrict access: true
     5	
     6	view ilas site assistant reports:
     7	  title: 'View ILAS Site Assistant Reports'
     8	  description: 'Access analytics and usage reports for the Site Assistant.'
     9	
    10	view ilas site assistant conversations:
    11	  title: 'View Site Assistant Conversation Logs'
    12	  description: 'Access PII-redacted conversation logs for QA/debugging. Contains sensitive user queries.'
    13	  restrict access: true

===== web/modules/custom/ilas_site_assistant/ilas_site_assistant.module =====
     1	<?php
     2	
     3	/**
     4	 * @file
     5	 * Primary module hooks for ILAS Site Assistant module.
     6	 */
     7	
     8	use Drupal\Core\Routing\RouteMatchInterface;
     9	
    10	/**
    11	 * Implements hook_help().
    12	 */
    13	function ilas_site_assistant_help($route_name, RouteMatchInterface $route_match) {
    14	  switch ($route_name) {
    15	    case 'help.page.ilas_site_assistant':
    16	      $output = '<h3>' . t('About') . '</h3>';
    17	      $output .= '<p>' . t('The ILAS Site Assistant is a site-scoped chatbot that helps users find FAQs, resources, forms, and guides without providing legal advice.') . '</p>';
    18	      $output .= '<h3>' . t('Features') . '</h3>';
    19	      $output .= '<ul>';
    20	      $output .= '<li>' . t('FAQ search and display') . '</li>';
    21	      $output .= '<li>' . t('Resource/Form/Guide finder by topic') . '</li>';
    22	      $output .= '<li>' . t('Service area navigation') . '</li>';
    23	      $output .= '<li>' . t('Policy enforcement (no legal advice)') . '</li>';
    24	      $output .= '<li>' . t('Privacy-first analytics') . '</li>';
    25	      $output .= '</ul>';
    26	      return $output;
    27	  }
    28	}
    29	
    30	/**
    31	 * Implements hook_theme().
    32	 */
    33	function ilas_site_assistant_theme($existing, $type, $theme, $path) {
    34	  return [
    35	    'ilas_site_assistant_page' => [
    36	      'variables' => [
    37	        'disclaimer' => NULL,
    38	        'suggestions' => [],
    39	        'config' => [],
    40	      ],
    41	      'template' => 'assistant-page',
    42	    ],
    43	    'ilas_site_assistant_widget' => [
    44	      'variables' => [
    45	        'disclaimer' => NULL,
    46	        'config' => [],
    47	      ],
    48	      'template' => 'assistant-widget',
    49	    ],
    50	  ];
    51	}
    52	
    53	/**
    54	 * Implements hook_page_attachments().
    55	 */
    56	function ilas_site_assistant_page_attachments(array &$attachments) {
    57	  $config = \Drupal::config('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
    58	
    59	  // Only attach widget if enabled globally.
    60	  if (!$config->get('enable_global_widget')) {
    61	    return;
    62	  }
    63	
    64	  // Get current path to exclude certain pages.
    65	  $current_path = \Drupal::service('path.current')->getPath();
    66	  $excluded_paths = $config->get('excluded_paths') ?? [];
    67	
    68	  foreach ($excluded_paths as $path) {
    69	    if (strpos($current_path, $path) === 0) {
    70	      return;
    71	    }
    72	  }
    73	
    74	  // Attach the widget library.
    75	  $attachments['#attached']['library'][] = 'ilas_site_assistant/widget';
    76	
    77	  // Pass configuration to JavaScript.
    78	  $attachments['#attached']['drupalSettings']['ilasSiteAssistant'] = [
    79	    'apiBase' => '/assistant/api',
    80	    'csrfToken' => \Drupal::csrfToken()->get('rest'),
    81	    'disclaimer' => $config->get('disclaimer_text') ?? t('I can help you find information on the Idaho Legal Aid Services website. I cannot provide legal advice.'),
    82	    'enableFaq' => $config->get('enable_faq') ?? TRUE,
    83	    'enableResources' => $config->get('enable_resources') ?? TRUE,
    84	    'canonicalUrls' => ilas_site_assistant_get_canonical_urls(),
    85	  ];
    86	}
    87	
    88	/**
    89	 * Returns the canonical URLs for the site assistant.
    90	 *
    91	 * @return array
    92	 *   Array of canonical URLs keyed by identifier.
    93	 */
    94	function ilas_site_assistant_get_canonical_urls() {
    95	  $config = \Drupal::config('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
    96	
    97	  $defaults = [
    98	    'apply' => '/apply-for-help',
    99	    'online_application' => 'https://idoi.legalserver.org/modules/matter/extern_intake.php?pid=60&h=bf45bd&',
   100	    'hotline' => '/Legal-Advice-Line',
   101	    'offices' => '/contact/offices',
   102	    'donate' => '/donate',
   103	    'feedback' => '/get-involved/feedback',
   104	    'resources' => '/what-we-do/resources',
   105	    'forms' => '/forms',
   106	    'guides' => '/guides',
   107	    'senior_risk_detector' => '/resources/legal-risk-detector',
   108	    'faq' => '/faq',
   109	    'services' => '/services',
   110	    'service_areas' => [
   111	      'housing' => '/legal-help/housing',
   112	      'family' => '/legal-help/family',
   113	      'seniors' => '/legal-help/seniors',
   114	      'health' => '/legal-help/health',
   115	      'consumer' => '/legal-help/consumer',
   116	      'civil_rights' => '/legal-help/civil-rights',
   117	    ],
   118	  ];
   119	
   120	  $urls = $config->get('canonical_urls') ?? [];
   121	
   122	  // Merge so that missing keys (e.g. online_application) always have a value.
   123	  return array_merge($defaults, $urls);
   124	}
   125	
   126	/**
   127	 * Implements hook_cron().
   128	 */
   129	function ilas_site_assistant_cron() {
   130	  // Clean up expired analytics data.
   131	  \Drupal::service('ilas_site_assistant.analytics_logger')->cleanupOldData();
   132	
   133	  // Clean up expired conversation logs.
   134	  if (\Drupal::hasService('ilas_site_assistant.conversation_logger')) {
   135	    \Drupal::service('ilas_site_assistant.conversation_logger')->cleanup();
   136	  }
   137	
   138	  // Prune stale violation timestamps (older than 24 hours).
   139	  if (\Drupal::hasService('ilas_site_assistant.safety_violation_tracker')) {
   140	    \Drupal::service('ilas_site_assistant.safety_violation_tracker')->prune(time() - 86400);
   141	  }
   142	
   143	  // Check for safety spike alerts.
   144	  if (\Drupal::hasService('ilas_site_assistant.safety_alert')) {
   145	    \Drupal::service('ilas_site_assistant.safety_alert')->checkThresholds();
   146	  }
   147	}
   148	
   149	/**
   150	 * Implements hook_mail().
   151	 */
   152	function ilas_site_assistant_mail($key, &$message, $params) {
   153	  switch ($key) {
   154	    case 'safety_alert':
   155	      $message['subject'] = $params['subject'];
   156	      $message['body'][] = $params['body'];
   157	      break;
   158	  }
   159	}

===== web/modules/custom/ilas_site_assistant/ilas_site_assistant.install =====
     1	<?php
     2	
     3	/**
     4	 * @file
     5	 * Install, update and uninstall functions for the ILAS Site Assistant module.
     6	 */
     7	
     8	/**
     9	 * Implements hook_schema().
    10	 */
    11	function ilas_site_assistant_schema() {
    12	  $schema = [];
    13	
    14	  // Aggregated analytics table (no PII).
    15	  $schema['ilas_site_assistant_stats'] = [
    16	    'description' => 'Stores aggregated non-PII analytics for the Site Assistant.',
    17	    'fields' => [
    18	      'id' => [
    19	        'type' => 'serial',
    20	        'unsigned' => TRUE,
    21	        'not null' => TRUE,
    22	      ],
    23	      'event_type' => [
    24	        'type' => 'varchar',
    25	        'length' => 64,
    26	        'not null' => TRUE,
    27	        'description' => 'Type of event (chat_open, topic_selected, resource_click, etc.)',
    28	      ],
    29	      'event_value' => [
    30	        'type' => 'varchar',
    31	        'length' => 255,
    32	        'not null' => FALSE,
    33	        'description' => 'Event value (topic name, URL path, etc.) - no PII',
    34	      ],
    35	      'count' => [
    36	        'type' => 'int',
    37	        'unsigned' => TRUE,
    38	        'not null' => TRUE,
    39	        'default' => 1,
    40	        'description' => 'Aggregated count for this event type/value combination.',
    41	      ],
    42	      'date' => [
    43	        'type' => 'varchar',
    44	        'length' => 10,
    45	        'not null' => TRUE,
    46	        'description' => 'Date in YYYY-MM-DD format.',
    47	      ],
    48	    ],
    49	    'primary key' => ['id'],
    50	    'indexes' => [
    51	      'event_date' => ['event_type', 'date'],
    52	      'event_value' => ['event_type', 'event_value'],
    53	    ],
    54	    'unique keys' => [
    55	      'event_date_value' => ['event_type', 'event_value', 'date'],
    56	    ],
    57	  ];
    58	
    59	  // Sanitized "no_answer" queries for content gap analysis.
    60	  $schema['ilas_site_assistant_no_answer'] = [
    61	    'description' => 'Stores sanitized queries that had no matching results.',
    62	    'fields' => [
    63	      'id' => [
    64	        'type' => 'serial',
    65	        'unsigned' => TRUE,
    66	        'not null' => TRUE,
    67	      ],
    68	      'query_hash' => [
    69	        'type' => 'varchar',
    70	        'length' => 64,
    71	        'not null' => TRUE,
    72	        'description' => 'Hash of sanitized query for deduplication.',
    73	      ],
    74	      'sanitized_query' => [
    75	        'type' => 'varchar',
    76	        'length' => 100,
    77	        'not null' => TRUE,
    78	        'description' => 'Truncated, sanitized query text (no PII).',
    79	      ],
    80	      'count' => [
    81	        'type' => 'int',
    82	        'unsigned' => TRUE,
    83	        'not null' => TRUE,
    84	        'default' => 1,
    85	      ],
    86	      'first_seen' => [
    87	        'type' => 'int',
    88	        'unsigned' => TRUE,
    89	        'not null' => TRUE,
    90	        'description' => 'Unix timestamp when first recorded.',
    91	      ],
    92	      'last_seen' => [
    93	        'type' => 'int',
    94	        'unsigned' => TRUE,
    95	        'not null' => TRUE,
    96	        'description' => 'Unix timestamp when last recorded.',
    97	      ],
    98	    ],
    99	    'primary key' => ['id'],
   100	    'unique keys' => [
   101	      'query_hash' => ['query_hash'],
   102	    ],
   103	    'indexes' => [
   104	      'count' => ['count'],
   105	      'last_seen' => ['last_seen'],
   106	    ],
   107	  ];
   108	
   109	  // Opt-in conversation log table (PII-redacted, short retention).
   110	  $schema['ilas_site_assistant_conversations'] = [
   111	    'description' => 'Opt-in conversation logs for QA/debugging (PII-redacted).',
   112	    'fields' => [
   113	      'id' => [
   114	        'type' => 'serial',
   115	        'unsigned' => TRUE,
   116	        'not null' => TRUE,
   117	      ],
   118	      'conversation_id' => [
   119	        'type' => 'varchar',
   120	        'length' => 36,
   121	        'not null' => TRUE,
   122	        'description' => 'UUID grouping messages in one conversation.',
   123	      ],
   124	      'direction' => [
   125	        'type' => 'varchar',
   126	        'length' => 10,
   127	        'not null' => TRUE,
   128	        'description' => 'Message direction: user or assistant.',
   129	      ],
   130	      'redacted_message' => [
   131	        'type' => 'text',
   132	        'size' => 'medium',
   133	        'not null' => TRUE,
   134	        'description' => 'PII-redacted message text.',
   135	      ],
   136	      'intent' => [
   137	        'type' => 'varchar',
   138	        'length' => 64,
   139	        'not null' => FALSE,
   140	        'description' => 'Detected intent type.',
   141	      ],
   142	      'response_type' => [
   143	        'type' => 'varchar',
   144	        'length' => 32,
   145	        'not null' => FALSE,
   146	        'description' => 'Response type (faq, navigation, escalation, etc.).',
   147	      ],
   148	      'created' => [
   149	        'type' => 'int',
   150	        'unsigned' => TRUE,
   151	        'not null' => TRUE,
   152	        'description' => 'Unix timestamp.',
   153	      ],
   154	      'request_id' => [
   155	        'type' => 'varchar',
   156	        'length' => 36,
   157	        'not null' => FALSE,
   158	        'default' => NULL,
   159	        'description' => 'Per-request correlation UUID for tracing across logs.',
   160	      ],
   161	    ],
   162	    'primary key' => ['id'],
   163	    'indexes' => [
   164	      'conversation' => ['conversation_id'],
   165	      'created' => ['created'],
   166	      'intent_created' => ['intent', 'created'],
   167	      'request_id' => ['request_id'],
   168	    ],
   169	  ];
   170	
   171	  return $schema;
   172	}
   173

   177	function ilas_site_assistant_update_10001() {
   178	  $schema = \Drupal::database()->schema();
   179	
   180	  if (!$schema->tableExists('ilas_site_assistant_conversations')) {
   181	    $table = [
   182	      'description' => 'Opt-in conversation logs for QA/debugging (PII-redacted).',
   183	      'fields' => [
   184	        'id' => [
   185	          'type' => 'serial',
   186	          'unsigned' => TRUE,
   187	          'not null' => TRUE,
   188	        ],
   189	        'conversation_id' => [
   190	          'type' => 'varchar',

   193	          'description' => 'UUID grouping messages in one conversation.',
   194	        ],
   195	        'direction' => [
   196	          'type' => 'varchar',
   197	          'length' => 10,
   198	          'not null' => TRUE,
   199	          'description' => 'Message direction: user or assistant.',

   235	
   236	/**
   237	 * Add request_id column and intent_created index to conversations table.
   238	 */
   239	function ilas_site_assistant_update_10002() {
   240	  $schema = \Drupal::database()->schema();
   241	  $table = 'ilas_site_assistant_conversations';
   242	
   243	  if (!$schema->tableExists($table)) {
   244	    return;
   245	  }
   246	
   247	  // Add request_id column for per-request correlation.
   248	  if (!$schema->fieldExists($table, 'request_id')) {
   249	    $schema->addField($table, 'request_id', [
   250	      'type' => 'varchar',
   251	      'length' => 36,
   252	      'not null' => FALSE,
   253	      'default' => NULL,
   254	      'description' => 'Per-request correlation UUID for tracing across logs.',
   255	    ]);
   256	    $schema->addIndex($table, 'request_id', ['request_id'], [
   257	      'fields' => [
   258	        'request_id' => [
   259	          'type' => 'varchar',
   260	          'length' => 36,
   261	        ],
   262	      ],
   263	    ]);
   264	  }
   265	
   266	  // Add composite index for conversation viewer filtering.
   267	  // Drupal's addIndex requires the full field spec for the index.
   268	  try {
   269	    $schema->addIndex($table, 'intent_created', ['intent', 'created'], [
   270	      'fields' => [
   271	        'intent' => [
   272	          'type' => 'varchar',
   273	          'length' => 64,
   274	        ],
   275	        'created' => [
   276	          'type' => 'int',
   277	          'unsigned' => TRUE,
   278	        ],
   279	      ],
   280	    ]);
   281	  }
   282	  catch (\Exception $e) {
   283	    // Index may already exist.
   284	  }
   285	}
   286	
   287	/**
   288	 * Implements hook_install().
   289	 */
   290	function ilas_site_assistant_install() {
   291	  \Drupal::messenger()->addStatus(t('ILAS Site Assistant installed. Configure at /admin/config/ilas/site-assistant'));
   292	}
   293	
   294	/**
   295	 * Implements hook_uninstall().
   296	 */
   297	function ilas_site_assistant_uninstall() {
   298	  // Remove configuration.
   299	  \Drupal::configFactory()->getEditable('ilas_site_assistant.settings')->delete();
   300	}

   215	    FaqIndex $faq_index,
   216	    ResourceFinder $resource_finder,
   217	    PolicyFilter $policy_filter,

   264	    return new static(
   265	      $container->get('config.factory'),
   266	      $container->get('ilas_site_assistant.intent_router'),

   270	      $container->get('ilas_site_assistant.analytics_logger'),

   272	      $container->get('ilas_site_assistant.fallback_gate'),
   273	      $container->get('flood'),
   274	      $container->get('cache.ilas_site_assistant'),
   275	      $container->get('logger.channel.ilas_site_assistant'),
   276	      $container->has('ilas_site_assistant.response_grounder') ? $container->get('ilas_site_assistant.response_grounder') : NULL,
   277	      $container->has('ilas_site_assistant.safety_classifier') ? $container->get('ilas_site_assistant.safety_classifier') : NULL,
   278	      $container->has('ilas_site_assistant.safety_response_templates') ? $container->get('ilas_site_assistant.safety_response_templates') : NULL,
   279	      $container->has('ilas_site_assistant.out_of_scope_classifier') ? $container->get('ilas_site_assistant.out_of_scope_classifier') : NULL,
   280	      $container->has('ilas_site_assistant.out_of_scope_response_templates') ? $container->get('ilas_site_assistant.out_of_scope_response_templates') : NULL,
   281	      $container->has('ilas_site_assistant.performance_monitor') ? $container->get('ilas_site_assistant.performance_monitor') : NULL,
   282	      $container->has('ilas_site_assistant.conversation_logger') ? $container->get('ilas_site_assistant.conversation_logger') : NULL,
   283	      $container->has('ilas_site_assistant.ab_testing') ? $container->get('ilas_site_assistant.ab_testing') : NULL,
   284	      $container->has('ilas_site_assistant.safety_violation_tracker') ? $container->get('ilas_site_assistant.safety_violation_tracker') : NULL,
   285	      $container->has('ilas_site_assistant.langfuse_tracer') ? $container->get('ilas_site_assistant.langfuse_tracer') : NULL,
   286	      $container->has('ilas_site_assistant.top_intents_pack') ? $container->get('ilas_site_assistant.top_intents_pack') : NULL
   287	    );
