   289	
   290	  /**
   291	   * Creates a JSON response with security headers.
   292	   *
   293	   * @param array $data
   294	   *   The response data.
   295	   * @param int $status
   296	   *   The HTTP status code.
   297	   * @param array $extra_headers
   298	   *   Additional headers to include.
   299	   *
   300	   * @return \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\JsonResponse
   301	   *   The JSON response with security headers.
   302	   */
   303	  protected function jsonResponse(array $data, int $status = 200, array $extra_headers = [], string $request_id = ''): JsonResponse {
   304	    $headers = array_merge(self::SECURITY_HEADERS, $extra_headers);
   305	    if ($request_id !== '') {
   306	      $headers['X-Correlation-ID'] = $request_id;
   307	    }
   308	    return new JsonResponse($data, $status, $headers);
   309	  }
   310	
   311	  /**
   312	   * Resolves a correlation ID from the request or generates one.
   313	   *
   314	   * Accepts an inbound X-Correlation-ID header if it passes UUID4 validation.
   315	   * Falls back to generating a new UUID.
   316	   *
   317	   * @param \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request $request
   318	   *   The request object.
   319	   *
   320	   * @return string
   321	   *   A valid UUID4 correlation ID.
   322	   */
   323	  private function resolveCorrelationId(Request $request): string {
   324	    $header = $request->headers->get('X-Correlation-ID', '');
   325	    if ($header !== '' && preg_match('/^[a-f0-9]{8}-[a-f0-9]{4}-4[a-f0-9]{3}-[89ab][a-f0-9]{3}-[a-f0-9]{12}$/i', $header)) {
   326	      return $header;
   327	    }
   328	    $uuid_generator = new UuidGenerator();
   329	    return $uuid_generator->generate();
   330	  }
   331	
   332	  /**
   333	   * Handles incoming chat messages.
   334	   *
   335	   * @param \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request $request
   336	   *   The request object.
   337	   *
   338	   * @return \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\JsonResponse
   339	   *   JSON response with assistant reply.
   340	   */
   341	  public function message(Request $request) {
   342	    // Resolve correlation ID: accept inbound header or generate new UUID.
   343	    $request_id = $this->resolveCorrelationId($request);
   344	
   345	    // Rate limiting — keyed by client IP.
   346	    $config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   347	    $ip = $request->getClientIp();
   348	    $flood_id = 'ilas_assistant:' . $ip;
   349	    $per_min = (int) ($config->get('rate_limit_per_minute') ?? 15);
   350	    $per_hr = (int) ($config->get('rate_limit_per_hour') ?? 120);
   351	
   352	    if (!$this->flood->isAllowed('ilas_assistant_min', $per_min, 60, $flood_id)) {
   353	      return $this->jsonResponse([
   354	        'error' => 'Too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.',
   355	        'type' => 'rate_limit',
   356	        'request_id' => $request_id,
   357	      ], 429, ['Retry-After' => '60'], $request_id);
   358	    }
   359	    if (!$this->flood->isAllowed('ilas_assistant_hr', $per_hr, 3600, $flood_id)) {
   360	      return $this->jsonResponse([
   361	        'error' => 'You have reached the hourly limit. Please try again later.',
   362	        'type' => 'rate_limit',
   363	        'request_id' => $request_id,
   364	      ], 429, ['Retry-After' => '3600'], $request_id);
   365	    }
   366	    $this->flood->register('ilas_assistant_min', 60, $flood_id);
   367	    $this->flood->register('ilas_assistant_hr', 3600, $flood_id);
   368	
   369	    // Validate content type.
   370	    $content_type = (string) $request->headers->get('Content-Type', '');
   371	    if (strpos($content_type, 'application/json') === FALSE) {
   372	      return $this->jsonResponse(['error' => 'Invalid content type', 'request_id' => $request_id], 400, [], $request_id);
   373	    }
   374	
   375	    // Parse request body.
   376	    $content = $request->getContent();
   377	    if (strlen($content) > 2000) {
   378	      return $this->jsonResponse(['error' => 'Request too large', 'request_id' => $request_id], 413, [], $request_id);
   379	    }
   380	
   381	    $data = json_decode($content, TRUE);
   382	    if (json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE || empty($data['message'])) {
   383	      return $this->jsonResponse(['error' => 'Invalid request', 'request_id' => $request_id], 400, [], $request_id);
   384	    }
   385	
   386	    // Start performance tracking.
   387	    $start_time = microtime(TRUE);
   388	
   389	    // Start Langfuse trace (if enabled and sampled).
   390	    $this->langfuseTracer?->startTrace($request_id, 'assistant.message', [
   391	      'environment' => $config->get('langfuse.environment') ?? 'production',
   392	    ]);
   393	
   394	    try {
   395	
   396	    $user_message = $this->sanitizeInput($data['message']);
   397	    // Normalize for classifier checks: strips evasion techniques
   398	    // (interstitial punctuation, Unicode tricks, spaced-out letters).
   399	    // $user_message is kept intact for display, intent routing, and retrieval.
   400	    $normalized_message = InputNormalizer::normalize($user_message);
   401	
   402	    // Check for DEBUG mode (server-side env var only).
   403	    $debug_mode = $this->isDebugMode($request);
   404	
   405	    // Initialize debug metadata.
   406	    $debug_meta = $debug_mode ? [
   407	      'timestamp' => date('c'),
   408	      'intent_selected' => NULL,
   409	      'intent_confidence' => NULL,
   410	      'intent_source' => 'rule_based',
   411	      'extracted_keywords' => [],
   412	      'retrieval_results' => [],
   413	      'retrieval_confidence' => NULL,
   414	      'final_action' => NULL,
   415	      'reason_code' => NULL,
   416	      'gate_decision' => NULL,
   417	      'gate_reason_code' => NULL,
   418	      'gate_confidence' => NULL,
   419	      'safety_flags' => [],
   420	      'policy_check' => ['passed' => TRUE, 'violation_type' => NULL],
   421	      'llm_used' => FALSE,
   422	      'processing_stages' => [],
   423	    ] : NULL;
   424	    $context = $data['context'] ?? [];
   425	
   426	    // Parse ephemeral conversation ID (client-generated UUID).
   427	    $conversation_id = NULL;
   428	    $server_history = [];
   429	    if (!empty($data['conversation_id']) && preg_match('/^[a-f0-9]{8}-[a-f0-9]{4}-4[a-f0-9]{3}-[89ab][a-f0-9]{3}-[a-f0-9]{12}$/i', $data['conversation_id'])) {
   430	      $conversation_id = $data['conversation_id'];
   431	      $cache_key = 'ilas_conv:' . $conversation_id;
   432	      $cached = $this->conversationCache->get($cache_key);
   433	      if ($cached) {
   434	        $server_history = $cached->data;
   435	      }
   436	
   437	      // Abuse detection: repeated identical messages.
   438	      if (count($server_history) >= 3) {
   439	        $recent_messages = array_column(array_slice($server_history, -3), 'text');
   440	        if (count(array_unique($recent_messages)) === 1 && $recent_messages[0] === PiiRedactor::redactForStorage($user_message, 200)) {
   441	          return $this->jsonResponse([
   442	            'type' => 'escalation',
   443	            'escalation_type' => 'repeated',
   444	            'message' => (string) $this->t('It looks like you may be having trouble. Please call our Legal Advice Line for direct assistance.'),
   445	            'actions' => $this->getEscalationActions(),
   446	            'request_id' => $request_id,
   447	          ], 200, [], $request_id);
   448	        }
   449	      }
   450	    }
   451	
   452	    // Compute A/B testing variant assignments (deterministic per conversation).
   453	    $ab_assignments = [];
   454	    if ($conversation_id && $this->abTesting && $this->abTesting->isEnabled()) {
   455	      $ab_assignments = $this->abTesting->getAssignments($conversation_id);
   456	      if (!empty($ab_assignments)) {
   457	        $this->analyticsLogger->log('ab_assignment', json_encode($ab_assignments));
   458	      }
   459	    }
   460	
   461	    // Extract keywords for debug (avoid storing raw user text).
   462	    if ($debug_mode) {
   463	      $debug_meta['extracted_keywords'] = $this->extractKeywords($user_message);
   464	      if (!empty($ab_assignments)) {
   465	        $debug_meta['ab_assignments'] = $ab_assignments;
   466	      }
   467	      $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'input_sanitized';
   468	    }
   469	
   470	    // ─── CLASSIFIER PRECEDENCE CONTRACT (v2.0) ────────────────────────
   471	    // 1. SafetyClassifier (crisis/danger/DV/eviction/scam/injection/
   472	    //    wrongdoing/legal-advice/PII)
   473	    //    → Match = return escalation immediately, skip all downstream
   474	    // 2. OutOfScopeClassifier (criminal/immigration/non-Idaho/business/federal/PI)
   475	    //    → Match = return OOS response, skip PolicyFilter
   476	    // 3. PolicyFilter (fallback: emergency/PII/criminal/legal-advice/
   477	    //    doc-drafting/external)
   478	    //    → Match = return violation response
   479	    // 4. Intent routing (normal processing)
   480	    // No classifier can override a higher-priority decision.
   481	    // All classifiers receive $normalized_message (evasion-stripped).
   482	    // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   483	
   484	    // Run SafetyClassifier first (if available) for enhanced classification.
   485	    $safety_classification = NULL;
   486	    if ($this->safetyClassifier) {
   487	      $this->langfuseTracer?->startSpan('safety.classify');
   488	      $safety_classification = $this->safetyClassifier->classify($normalized_message);
   489	
   490	      if ($debug_mode) {
   491	        $debug_meta['safety_classification'] = [
   492	          'class' => $safety_classification['class'],
   493	          'reason_code' => $safety_classification['reason_code'],
   494	          'escalation_level' => $safety_classification['escalation_level'],
   495	          'is_safe' => $safety_classification['is_safe'],
   496	        ];
   497	        $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'safety_classified';
   498	      }
   499	
   500	      // If SafetyClassifier detected a non-safe message, use SafetyResponseTemplates.
   501	      if (!$safety_classification['is_safe'] && $this->safetyResponseTemplates) {
   502	        $safety_response = $this->safetyResponseTemplates->getResponse($safety_classification);
   503	
   504	        // Log the safety violation with reason code.
   505	        $this->analyticsLogger->log('safety_violation', $safety_classification['reason_code']);
   506	        if ($this->violationTracker) {
   507	          $this->violationTracker->record(time());
   508	        }
   509	
   510	        if ($debug_mode) {
   511	          $debug_meta['policy_check'] = [
   512	            'passed' => FALSE,
   513	            'violation_type' => $safety_classification['class'],
   514	            'reason_code' => $safety_classification['reason_code'],
   515	          ];
   516	          $debug_meta['final_action'] = $safety_classification['requires_refusal'] ? 'refusal' : 'escalation';
   517	          $debug_meta['reason_code'] = $safety_classification['reason_code'];
   518	          $debug_meta['intent_selected'] = 'safety_' . $safety_classification['class'];
   519	          $debug_meta['safety_flags'] = $this->detectSafetyFlags($user_message);
   520	        }
   521	
   522	        $response_data = [
   523	          'type' => $safety_response['type'],
   524	          'escalation_type' => $safety_response['escalation_type'],
   525	          'escalation_level' => $safety_response['escalation_level'],
   526	          'message' => $safety_response['message'],
   527	          'links' => $safety_response['links'] ?? [],
   528	          'actions' => $this->getEscalationActions(),
   529	          'reason_code' => $safety_classification['reason_code'],
   530	          'request_id' => $request_id,
   531	        ];
   532	
   533	        if (!empty($safety_response['disclaimer'])) {
   534	          $response_data['disclaimer'] = $safety_response['disclaimer'];
   535	        }
   536	
   537	        if ($debug_mode) {
   538	          $response_data['_debug'] = $debug_meta;
   539	        }
   540	
   541	        $this->logger->notice('[@request_id] Safety exit: class=@class reason=@reason level=@level', [
   542	          '@request_id' => $request_id,
   543	          '@class' => $safety_classification['class'],
   544	          '@reason' => $safety_classification['reason_code'],
   545	          '@level' => $safety_classification['escalation_level'],
   546	        ]);
   547	
   548	        $this->langfuseTracer?->endSpan([
   549	          'class' => $safety_classification['class'],
   550	          'reason_code' => $safety_classification['reason_code'],
   551	          'is_safe' => FALSE,
   552	        ]);
   553	        $this->langfuseTracer?->endTrace(
   554	          output: ['type' => 'safety_exit', 'reason_code' => $safety_classification['reason_code']],
   555	          metadata: ['duration_ms' => (microtime(TRUE) - $start_time) * 1000, 'success' => TRUE]
   556	        );
   557	
   558	        return $this->jsonResponse($response_data, 200, [], $request_id);
   559	      }
   560	
   561	      // Safety passed — end the span with safe result.
   562	      $this->langfuseTracer?->endSpan([
   563	        'class' => $safety_classification['class'],
   564	        'reason_code' => $safety_classification['reason_code'],
   565	        'is_safe' => TRUE,
   566	      ]);
   567	    }
   568	
   569	    // Run OutOfScopeClassifier as second-pass check (after safety, before intent).
   570	    $oos_classification = NULL;
   571	    if ($this->outOfScopeClassifier) {
   572	      $this->langfuseTracer?->startSpan('oos.classify');
   573	      $oos_classification = $this->outOfScopeClassifier->classify($normalized_message);
   574	
   575	      if ($debug_mode) {
   576	        $debug_meta['oos_classification'] = [
   577	          'is_out_of_scope' => $oos_classification['is_out_of_scope'],
   578	          'category' => $oos_classification['category'],
   579	          'reason_code' => $oos_classification['reason_code'],
   580	          'response_type' => $oos_classification['response_type'],
   581	        ];
   582	        $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'oos_classified';
   583	      }
   584	
   585	      // If out-of-scope and we have templates, return OOS response.
   586	      if ($oos_classification['is_out_of_scope'] && $this->outOfScopeResponseTemplates) {
   587	        $oos_response = $this->outOfScopeResponseTemplates->getResponse($oos_classification);
   588	
   589	        // Log the out-of-scope query.
   590	        $this->analyticsLogger->log('out_of_scope', $oos_classification['reason_code']);
   591	
   592	        if ($debug_mode) {
   593	          $debug_meta['final_action'] = 'out_of_scope';
   594	          $debug_meta['reason_code'] = $oos_classification['reason_code'];
   595	          $debug_meta['intent_selected'] = 'oos_' . $oos_classification['category'];
   596	        }
   597	
   598	        $response_data = [
   599	          'type' => $oos_response['type'],
   600	          'response_mode' => $oos_response['response_mode'],
   601	          'escalation_type' => $oos_response['escalation_type'],
   602	          'message' => $oos_response['message'],
   603	          'links' => $oos_response['links'] ?? [],
   604	          'suggestions' => $oos_response['suggestions'] ?? [],
   605	          'actions' => $this->getEscalationActions(),
   606	          'reason_code' => $oos_classification['reason_code'],
   607	          'can_still_help' => $oos_response['can_still_help'] ?? FALSE,
   608	          'request_id' => $request_id,
   609	        ];
   610	
   611	        if (!empty($oos_response['disclaimer'])) {
   612	          $response_data['disclaimer'] = $oos_response['disclaimer'];
   613	        }
   614	
   615	        if ($debug_mode) {
   616	          $response_data['_debug'] = $debug_meta;
   617	        }
   618	
   619	        $this->logger->notice('[@request_id] Out-of-scope exit: category=@category reason=@reason', [
   620	          '@request_id' => $request_id,
   621	          '@category' => $oos_classification['category'],
   622	          '@reason' => $oos_classification['reason_code'],
   623	        ]);
   624	
   625	        $this->langfuseTracer?->endSpan([
   626	          'is_out_of_scope' => TRUE,
   627	          'category' => $oos_classification['category'],
   628	          'reason_code' => $oos_classification['reason_code'],
   629	        ]);
   630	        $this->langfuseTracer?->endTrace(
   631	          output: ['type' => 'oos_exit', 'reason_code' => $oos_classification['reason_code']],
   632	          metadata: ['duration_ms' => (microtime(TRUE) - $start_time) * 1000, 'success' => TRUE]
   633	        );
   634	
   635	        return $this->jsonResponse($response_data, 200, [], $request_id);
   636	      }
   637	
   638	      // OOS passed — end the span.
   639	      $this->langfuseTracer?->endSpan([
   640	        'is_out_of_scope' => FALSE,
   641	        'category' => $oos_classification['category'] ?? 'none',
   642	      ]);
   643	    }
   644	
   645	    // Fallback to PolicyFilter if SafetyClassifier not available or marked safe.
   646	    $this->langfuseTracer?->startSpan('policy.check');
   647	    $policy_result = $this->policyFilter->check($normalized_message);
   648	
   649	    if ($debug_mode) {
   650	      // Detect safety flags from policy patterns.
   651	      $debug_meta['safety_flags'] = $this->detectSafetyFlags($user_message);
   652	      $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'policy_checked';
   653	    }
   654	
   655	    if ($policy_result['violation']) {
   656	      $this->analyticsLogger->log('policy_violation', $policy_result['type']);
   657	
   658	      if ($debug_mode) {
   659	        $debug_meta['policy_check'] = [
   660	          'passed' => FALSE,
   661	          'violation_type' => $policy_result['type'],
   662	        ];
   663	        $debug_meta['final_action'] = 'escalation';
   664	        $debug_meta['reason_code'] = 'policy_' . $policy_result['type'];
   665	        $debug_meta['intent_selected'] = 'escalation';
   666	      }
   667	
   668	      $response_data = [
   669	        'type' => 'escalation',
   670	        'escalation_type' => $policy_result['type'],
   671	        'escalation_level' => $policy_result['escalation_level'],
   672	        'message' => $policy_result['response'],
   673	        'links' => $policy_result['links'] ?? [],
   674	        'actions' => $this->getEscalationActions(),
   675	        'reason_code' => 'policy_' . $policy_result['type'],
   676	        'request_id' => $request_id,
   677	      ];
   678	
   679	      if ($debug_mode) {
   680	        $response_data['_debug'] = $debug_meta;
   681	      }
   682	
   683	      $this->logger->notice('[@request_id] Policy violation exit: type=@type', [
   684	        '@request_id' => $request_id,
   685	        '@type' => $policy_result['type'],
   686	      ]);
   687	
   688	      $this->langfuseTracer?->endSpan(['violation' => TRUE, 'type' => $policy_result['type']]);
   689	      $this->langfuseTracer?->endTrace(
   690	        output: ['type' => 'policy_violation', 'reason_code' => 'policy_' . $policy_result['type']],
   691	        metadata: ['duration_ms' => (microtime(TRUE) - $start_time) * 1000, 'success' => TRUE]
   692	      );
   693	
   694	      return $this->jsonResponse($response_data, 200, [], $request_id);
   695	    }
   696	
   697	    // Policy passed.
   698	    $this->langfuseTracer?->endSpan(['violation' => FALSE]);
   699	
   700	    // Pending follow-up slot-fill: if the previous response asked for a
   701	    // location, try to resolve this message as a city/county before intent
   702	    // routing. This fires AFTER safety + policy checks.
   703	    if ($conversation_id) {
   704	      $followup_key = 'ilas_conv_followup:' . $conversation_id;
   705	      $pending = $this->conversationCache->get($followup_key);
   706	      if ($pending && ($pending->data['type'] ?? '') === 'office_location') {
   707	        // Clear immediately (consumed regardless of outcome).
   708	        $this->conversationCache->delete($followup_key);
   709	
   710	        $resolver = new OfficeLocationResolver();
   711	        $office = $resolver->resolve($user_message);
   712	
   713	        if ($office) {
   714	          return $this->handleOfficeFollowUp($office, $user_message, $conversation_id, $server_history, $request_id, $debug_mode, $debug_meta);
   715	        }
   716	        else {
   717	          return $this->handleOfficeFollowUpClarify($resolver->getAllOffices(), $user_message, $conversation_id, $server_history, $request_id, $debug_mode, $debug_meta);
   718	        }
   719	      }
   720	    }
   721	
   722	    // Quick-action short-circuit: when the request comes from a suggestion
   723	    // button click, bypass all classifiers/routers and use the action directly.
   724	    $this->langfuseTracer?->startSpan('intent.route');
   725	    $quick_action_intents = [
   726	      'apply' => 'apply_for_help',
   727	      'hotline' => 'legal_advice_line',
   728	      'forms' => 'forms_finder',
   729	      'guides' => 'guides_finder',
   730	      'faq' => 'faq',
   731	      'topics' => 'services_overview',
   732	    ];
   733	    // Turn classification: determine NEW/FOLLOW_UP/INVENTORY/RESET before routing.
   734	    $turn_type = TurnClassifier::classifyTurn($user_message, $server_history, time());
   735	    $this->langfuseTracer?->addEvent('turn.classified', [
   736	      'turn_type' => $turn_type,
   737	      'history_length' => count($server_history),
   738	    ]);
   739	    if ($debug_mode) {
   740	      $debug_meta['turn_type'] = $turn_type;
   741	      $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'turn_classified';
   742	    }
   743	
   744	    $quick_action = $context['quickAction'] ?? NULL;
   745	    if ($quick_action && isset($quick_action_intents[$quick_action])) {
   746	      $intent = [
   747	        'type' => $quick_action_intents[$quick_action],
   748	        'confidence' => 1.0,
   749	        'source' => 'quick_action',
   750	        'extraction' => [],
   751	      ];
   752	
   753	      if ($debug_mode) {
   754	        $debug_meta['intent_selected'] = $intent['type'];
   755	        $debug_meta['intent_source'] = 'quick_action';
   756	        $debug_meta['intent_confidence'] = 1.0;
   757	        $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'quick_action_shortcircuit';
   758	      }
   759	    }
   760	    elseif ($turn_type === TurnClassifier::TURN_INVENTORY) {
   761	      // Inventory routing: resolve to forms/guides/services inventory
   762	      // based on message keywords, bypassing normal intent routing.
   763	      $inventory_type = TurnClassifier::resolveInventoryType($user_message);
   764	      $intent = [
   765	        'type' => $inventory_type,
   766	        'confidence' => 0.90,
   767	        'source' => 'turn_classifier_inventory',
   768	        'extraction' => [],
   769	      ];
   770	
   771	      if ($debug_mode) {
   772	        $debug_meta['intent_selected'] = $inventory_type;
   773	        $debug_meta['intent_source'] = 'turn_classifier_inventory';
   774	        $debug_meta['intent_confidence'] = 0.90;
   775	        $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'inventory_shortcircuit';
   776	      }
   777	    }
   778	    else {
   779	      // Route the intent via normal classification pipeline.
   780	      $intent = $this->intentRouter->route($user_message, $context);
   781	    }
   782	
   783	    // History-aware fallback: if direct routing returns unknown, check
   784	    // conversation history for a dominant recent intent.
   785	    $direct_intent_type = $intent['type'] ?? 'unknown';
   786	
   787	    // Enhanced follow-up: when TurnClassifier detects FOLLOW_UP, proactively
   788	    // resolve history context even before routing fails. This allows topic
   789	    // context to be available for partial matches, not just unknown.
   790	    if ($turn_type === TurnClassifier::TURN_FOLLOW_UP && !empty($server_history)) {
   791	      $topic_ctx = HistoryIntentResolver::extractTopicContext($server_history);
   792	      if ($topic_ctx && !empty($topic_ctx['area'])) {
   793	        // If routing returned unknown, use full history fallback.
   794	        if ($direct_intent_type === 'unknown') {
   795	          $history_config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   796	          $history_fallback_settings = $history_config->get('history_fallback') ?? [];
   797	          if ($history_fallback_settings['enabled'] ?? TRUE) {
   798	            $history_result = HistoryIntentResolver::resolveFromHistory(
   799	              $server_history, $user_message, time(), $history_fallback_settings
   800	            );
   801	            if ($history_result) {
   802	              $h_topic_ctx = $history_result['topic_context'] ?? NULL;
   803	              $intent = [
   804	                'type' => $history_result['intent'],
   805	                'confidence' => min(0.65, $history_result['confidence']),
   806	                'source' => 'history_fallback',
   807	                'extraction' => $intent['extraction'] ?? [],
   808	                'history_meta' => $history_result,
   809	              ];
   810	              if ($h_topic_ctx) {
   811	                $intent['area'] = $h_topic_ctx['area'] ?? NULL;
   812	                $intent['topic_id'] = $h_topic_ctx['topic_id'] ?? NULL;
   813	                $intent['topic'] = $h_topic_ctx['topic'] ?? NULL;
   814	              }
   815	            }
   816	          }
   817	        }
   818	        else {
   819	          // Routing found a match, but enrich it with topic context from
   820	          // history so downstream can use it (e.g., service_area follow-up).
   821	          if (empty($intent['area'])) {
   822	            $intent['area'] = $topic_ctx['area'];
   823	            $intent['topic_id'] = $topic_ctx['topic_id'] ?? NULL;
   824	            $intent['topic'] = $topic_ctx['topic'] ?? NULL;
   825	          }
   826	        }
   827	      }
   828	    }
   829	    elseif ($direct_intent_type === 'unknown' && !empty($server_history)) {
   830	      // Standard history fallback for non-follow-up unknown intents.
   831	      $history_config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   832	      $history_fallback_settings = $history_config->get('history_fallback') ?? [];
   833	      if ($history_fallback_settings['enabled'] ?? TRUE) {
   834	        $history_result = HistoryIntentResolver::resolveFromHistory(
   835	          $server_history, $user_message, time(), $history_fallback_settings
   836	        );
   837	        if ($history_result) {
   838	          $topic_ctx = $history_result['topic_context'] ?? NULL;
   839	          $intent = [
   840	            'type' => $history_result['intent'],
   841	            'confidence' => min(0.65, $history_result['confidence']),
   842	            'source' => 'history_fallback',
   843	            'extraction' => $intent['extraction'] ?? [],
   844	            'history_meta' => $history_result,
   845	          ];
   846	          if ($topic_ctx) {
   847	            $intent['area'] = $topic_ctx['area'] ?? NULL;
   848	            $intent['topic_id'] = $topic_ctx['topic_id'] ?? NULL;
   849	            $intent['topic'] = $topic_ctx['topic'] ?? NULL;
   850	          }
   851	        }
   852	      }
   853	    }
   854	
   855	    if ($debug_mode) {
   856	      $debug_meta['intent_selected'] = $intent['type'];
   857	      $debug_meta['intent_confidence'] = $this->fallbackGate->calculateIntentConfidence($intent, $user_message);
   858	      $debug_meta['route_source'] = $intent['source'] ?? 'direct';
   859	      $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'intent_routed';
   860	      if (isset($intent['history_meta'])) {
   861	        $debug_meta['direct_intent'] = $direct_intent_type;
   862	        $debug_meta['history_fallback'] = [
   863	          'fallback_intent' => $intent['history_meta']['intent'],
   864	          'fallback_confidence' => $intent['history_meta']['confidence'],
   865	          'turns_analyzed' => $intent['history_meta']['turns_analyzed'],
   866	          'fallback_reason' => $intent['history_meta']['reason'],
   867	        ];
   868	      }
   869	    }
   870	
   871	    $topic_context = HistoryIntentResolver::extractTopicContext($server_history);
   872	    $this->langfuseTracer?->endSpan([
   873	      'type' => $intent['type'] ?? 'unknown',
   874	      'confidence' => $intent['confidence'] ?? NULL,
   875	      'source' => $intent['source'] ?? 'direct',
   876	      'turn_type' => $turn_type,
   877	      'topic_context' => $topic_context ? $topic_context['area'] : NULL,
   878	    ]);
   879	
   880	    // Early retrieval for gate evaluation (search FAQ/resources for context).
   881	    $this->langfuseTracer?->startSpan('retrieval.early');
   882	    $early_retrieval = [];
   883	    $config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   884	    $skip_retrieval_intents = ['greeting', 'apply_for_help', 'apply'];
   885	    if ($config->get('enable_faq') && !in_array($intent['type'], $skip_retrieval_intents)) {
   886	      $early_retrieval = $this->faqIndex->search($user_message, 3);
   887	    }
   888	    $top_score = !empty($early_retrieval) ? ($early_retrieval[0]['score'] ?? NULL) : NULL;
   889	    $this->langfuseTracer?->endSpan(['result_count' => count($early_retrieval), 'top_score' => $top_score]);
   890	
   891	    // Evaluate fallback gate to decide: answer, clarify, or use LLM.
   892	    $this->langfuseTracer?->startSpan('gate.evaluate');
   893	    $gate_context = [
   894	      'message' => $user_message,
   895	      'policy_violation' => FALSE,
   896	    ];
   897	    $gate_decision = $this->fallbackGate->evaluate(
   898	      $intent,
   899	      $early_retrieval,
   900	      $debug_meta['safety_flags'] ?? [],
   901	      $gate_context
   902	    );
   903	    $this->langfuseTracer?->endSpan([
   904	      'decision' => $gate_decision['decision'] ?? 'unknown',
   905	      'reason_code' => $gate_decision['reason_code'] ?? NULL,
   906	      'confidence' => $gate_decision['confidence'] ?? NULL,
   907	    ]);
   908	
   909	    if ($debug_mode) {
   910	      $debug_meta['gate_decision'] = $gate_decision['decision'];
   911	      $debug_meta['gate_reason_code'] = $gate_decision['reason_code'];
   912	      $debug_meta['gate_confidence'] = $gate_decision['confidence'];
   913	      $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'gate_evaluated';
   914	    }
   915	
   916	    // Handle gate decision.
   917	    // Never override quick-action intents — they are deterministic button clicks.
   918	    $is_quick_action = ($intent['source'] ?? '') === 'quick_action';
   919	    if (!$is_quick_action && $gate_decision['decision'] === FallbackGate::DECISION_FALLBACK_LLM && $this->llmEnhancer->isEnabled()) {
   920	      // Try LLM classification for low-confidence cases.
   921	      $llm_model = $config->get('llm.model') ?? 'gemini-1.5-flash';
   922	      $this->langfuseTracer?->startGeneration('llm.classify', $llm_model, [
   923	        'temperature' => $config->get('llm.temperature') ?? 0.3,
   924	        'max_tokens' => $config->get('llm.max_tokens') ?? 150,
   925	      ], PiiRedactor::redactForStorage($user_message, 200));
   926	      $llm_intent = $this->llmEnhancer->classifyIntent($user_message, $intent['type']);
   927	      $this->langfuseTracer?->endGeneration($llm_intent, $this->llmEnhancer->getLastUsage() ?? []);
   928	      if ($llm_intent !== 'unknown' && $llm_intent !== $intent['type']) {
   929	        $intent = ['type' => $llm_intent, 'source' => 'llm', 'extraction' => $intent['extraction'] ?? []];
   930	
   931	        if ($debug_mode) {
   932	          $debug_meta['intent_selected'] = $llm_intent;
   933	          $debug_meta['intent_source'] = 'llm_fallback';
   934	          $debug_meta['llm_used'] = TRUE;
   935	          $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'llm_classification';
   936	        }
   937	      }
   938	    }
   939	    elseif (!$is_quick_action && $gate_decision['decision'] === FallbackGate::DECISION_CLARIFY) {
   940	      // Force clarification response.
   941	      $intent = ['type' => 'clarify', 'original_intent' => $intent['type'], 'extraction' => $intent['extraction'] ?? []];
   942	
   943	      if ($debug_mode) {
   944	        $debug_meta['intent_selected'] = 'clarify';
   945	        $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'clarification_forced';
   946	      }
   947	    }
   948	
   949	    // Process based on intent.
   950	    $this->langfuseTracer?->startSpan('intent.process', ['intent_type' => $intent['type'] ?? 'unknown']);
   951	    $response = $this->processIntent($intent, $user_message, $context, $request_id, $server_history);
   952	    $this->langfuseTracer?->endSpan([
   953	      'response_type' => $response['type'] ?? 'unknown',
   954	      'result_count' => count($response['results'] ?? []),
   955	      'has_fallback_url' => !empty($response['fallback_url']),
   956	      'fallback_level' => $response['fallback_level'] ?? NULL,
   957	      'has_suggestions' => !empty($response['suggestions']) || !empty($response['topic_suggestions']),
   958	    ]);
   959	
   960	    // CRITICAL: Enforce canonical URL for hard-route intents.
   961	    $canonical_urls = ilas_site_assistant_get_canonical_urls();
   962	    $builder = new ResponseBuilder($canonical_urls, $this->topIntentsPack);
   963	    $safety_flags = $debug_meta['safety_flags'] ?? [];
   964	    $response = $builder->enforceHardRouteUrlWithSafetyFlags($response, $intent, $safety_flags);
   965	
   966	    // Apply response grounding (add citations, validate info).
   967	    if ($this->responseGrounder && !empty($response['results'])) {
   968	      $this->langfuseTracer?->startSpan('response.ground');
   969	      $response = $this->responseGrounder->groundResponse($response, $response['results']);
   970	      $this->langfuseTracer?->endSpan([
   971	        'citations_added' => !empty($response['citations']),
   972	      ]);
   973	      if ($debug_mode) {
   974	        $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'response_grounded';
   975	      }
   976	    }
   977	
   978	    if ($debug_mode) {
   979	      $debug_meta['final_action'] = $this->determineFinalAction($response['type']);
   980	      $debug_meta['reason_code'] = $this->determineReasonCode($intent, $response);
   981	      $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'intent_processed';
   982	
   983	      // Capture retrieval results (IDs/URLs only, no content).
   984	      if (!empty($response['results'])) {
   985	        $debug_meta['retrieval_results'] = $this->extractRetrievalMeta($response['results']);
   986	      }
   987	    }
   988	
   989	    // Enhance response with LLM if enabled.
   990	    $original_response = $response;
   991	    $llm_model = $config->get('llm.model') ?? 'gemini-1.5-flash';
   992	    $this->langfuseTracer?->startGeneration('llm.enhance', $llm_model, [
   993	      'temperature' => $config->get('llm.temperature') ?? 0.3,
   994	      'max_tokens' => $config->get('llm.max_tokens') ?? 150,
   995	    ], PiiRedactor::redactForStorage($user_message, 200));
   996	    $response = $this->llmEnhancer->enhanceResponse($response, $user_message);
   997	    $llm_was_used = ($response['llm_enhanced'] ?? FALSE);
   998	    $this->langfuseTracer?->endGeneration(
   999	      $llm_was_used ? ($response['message'] ?? NULL) : NULL,
  1000	      $llm_was_used ? ($this->llmEnhancer->getLastUsage() ?? []) : []
  1001	    );
  1002	
  1003	    if ($debug_mode && $llm_was_used) {
  1004	      $debug_meta['llm_used'] = TRUE;
  1005	      $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'llm_enhancement';
  1006	    }
  1007	
  1008	    if ($debug_mode) {
  1009	      $rateLimiter = $this->llmEnhancer->getRateLimiter();
  1010	      if ($rateLimiter && $rateLimiter->wasRateLimited()) {
  1011	        $debug_meta['global_rate_limit_triggered'] = TRUE;
  1012	        $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'global_rate_limit_triggered';
  1013	        $debug_meta['global_rate_limit_state'] = $rateLimiter->getCurrentState();
  1014	      }
  1015	    }
  1016	
  1017	    // Post-generation safety enforcement: block legal advice in LLM output,
  1018	    // enforce _requires_review flag, and strip internal flags.
  1019	    $this->langfuseTracer?->startSpan('safety.post_generation');
  1020	    $response = $this->enforcePostGenerationSafety($response, $request_id);
  1021	    $this->langfuseTracer?->endSpan(['legal_advice_blocked' => ($response['_legal_advice_blocked'] ?? FALSE)]);
  1022	
  1023	    if ($debug_mode) {
  1024	      $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'post_generation_safety';
  1025	    }
  1026	
  1027	    // Log the interaction.
  1028	    $this->analyticsLogger->log($intent['type'], $intent['value'] ?? '');
  1029	
  1030	    // Log history fallback usage for observability.
  1031	    if (($intent['source'] ?? '') === 'history_fallback') {
  1032	      $this->analyticsLogger->log('history_fallback_used', $intent['type']);
  1033	    }
  1034	
  1035	    // Check if we found any results.
  1036	    if (empty($response['results']) && $response['type'] !== 'navigation') {
  1037	      $this->analyticsLogger->logNoAnswer($user_message);
  1038	
  1039	      if ($debug_mode) {
  1040	        $debug_meta['reason_code'] = 'no_results_found';
  1041	      }
  1042	    }
  1043	
  1044	    // Attach debug metadata if enabled.
  1045	    if ($debug_mode) {
  1046	      $debug_meta['processing_stages'][] = 'response_complete';
  1047	      $response['_debug'] = $debug_meta;
  1048	    }
  1049	
  1050	    // Set pending follow-up flag when apply intent includes a followup prompt.
  1051	    $normalized_intent = ResponseBuilder::normalizeIntentType($intent['type'] ?? 'unknown');
  1052	    if ($conversation_id && $normalized_intent === 'apply' && !empty($response['followup'])) {
  1053	      $this->conversationCache->set(
  1054	        'ilas_conv_followup:' . $conversation_id,
  1055	        ['type' => 'office_location', 'timestamp' => time()],
  1056	        time() + 1800
  1057	      );
  1058	    }
  1059	
  1060	    // Store conversation turn in cache for multi-turn continuity.
  1061	    if ($conversation_id) {
  1062	      $server_history[] = [
  1063	        'role' => 'user',
  1064	        'text' => PiiRedactor::redactForStorage($user_message, 200),
  1065	        'intent' => $intent['type'] ?? 'unknown',
  1066	        'route_source' => $intent['source'] ?? 'direct',
  1067	        'safety_flags' => $debug_meta['safety_flags'] ?? $this->detectSafetyFlags($user_message),
  1068	        'timestamp' => time(),
  1069	        'area' => $intent['area'] ?? $intent['service_area'] ?? NULL,
  1070	        'topic_id' => $intent['topic_id'] ?? NULL,
  1071	        'topic' => $intent['topic'] ?? NULL,
  1072	        'response_type' => $response['type'] ?? NULL,
  1073	      ];
  1074	      // Keep only last 10 entries (5 exchanges).
  1075	      $server_history = array_slice($server_history, -10);
  1076	
  1077	      // Build cache data: history + A/B variant assignments.
  1078	      $cache_data = $server_history;
  1079	      if (!empty($ab_assignments)) {
  1080	        // Store assignments alongside history keyed separately so they persist.
  1081	        $this->conversationCache->set(
  1082	          'ilas_conv_ab:' . $conversation_id,
  1083	          $ab_assignments,
  1084	          time() + 1800
  1085	        );
  1086	      }
  1087	
  1088	      // Store with 30-minute TTL.
  1089	      $this->conversationCache->set(
  1090	        'ilas_conv:' . $conversation_id,
  1091	        $cache_data,
  1092	        time() + 1800
  1093	      );
  1094	
  1095	      // Multi-turn safety pattern detection.
  1096	      if (count($server_history) >= 3) {
  1097	        $recent_flags = [];
  1098	        foreach (array_slice($server_history, -3) as $turn) {
  1099	          $recent_flags = array_merge($recent_flags, $turn['safety_flags'] ?? []);
  1100	        }
  1101	        if (count($recent_flags) >= 3) {
  1102	          $this->logger->warning(
  1103	            '[@request_id] Multi-turn safety pattern detected for conversation @id: @flags',
  1104	            ['@request_id' => $request_id, '@id' => $conversation_id, '@flags' => implode(', ', $recent_flags)]
  1105	          );
  1106	        }
  1107	      }
  1108	    }
  1109	
  1110	    // Opt-in conversation logging (for QA/debugging).
  1111	    if ($conversation_id && $this->conversationLogger) {
  1112	      $this->conversationLogger->logExchange(
  1113	        $conversation_id,
  1114	        $user_message,
  1115	        $response['message'] ?? '',
  1116	        $intent['type'] ?? 'unknown',
  1117	        $response['type'] ?? 'unknown',
  1118	        $request_id
  1119	      );
  1120	    }
  1121	
  1122	    // Attach A/B variant assignments to response for frontend consumption.
  1123	    if (!empty($ab_assignments)) {
  1124	      $response['ab_variants'] = $ab_assignments;
  1125	    }
  1126	
  1127	    // Record performance metrics.
  1128	    if ($this->performanceMonitor) {
  1129	      $duration_ms = (microtime(TRUE) - $start_time) * 1000;
  1130	      $scenario = $this->classifyScenario($intent['type'] ?? 'unknown');
  1131	      $this->performanceMonitor->recordRequest($duration_ms, TRUE, $scenario, $request_id);
  1132	    }
  1133	
  1134	    $this->logger->info('[@request_id] Request complete: intent=@intent safety=@safety gate=@gate reason=@reason type=@type', [
  1135	      '@request_id' => $request_id,
  1136	      '@intent' => $intent['type'] ?? 'unknown',
  1137	      '@safety' => $safety_classification ? $safety_classification['class'] : 'safe',
  1138	      '@gate' => $gate_decision['decision'] ?? 'none',
  1139	      '@reason' => $response['reason_code'] ?? 'none',
  1140	      '@type' => $response['type'] ?? 'unknown',
  1141	    ]);
  1142	
  1143	    // End Langfuse trace on successful completion.
  1144	    $duration_ms = (microtime(TRUE) - $start_time) * 1000;
  1145	    $this->langfuseTracer?->addEvent('request.complete', [
  1146	      'intent_type' => $intent['type'] ?? 'unknown',
  1147	      'response_type' => $response['type'] ?? 'unknown',
  1148	      'is_quick_action' => $is_quick_action,
  1149	    ]);
  1150	    $this->langfuseTracer?->endTrace(
  1151	      output: ['type' => $response['type'] ?? 'unknown', 'reason_code' => $response['reason_code'] ?? NULL],
  1152	      metadata: [
  1153	        'duration_ms' => $duration_ms,
  1154	        'success' => TRUE,
  1155	        'intent_type' => $intent['type'] ?? 'unknown',
  1156	        'response_type' => $response['type'] ?? 'unknown',
  1157	        'is_quick_action' => $is_quick_action,
  1158	        'conversation_hash' => $conversation_id ? hash('sha256', $conversation_id) : NULL,
  1159	        'turn_type' => $turn_type,
  1160	        'fallback_level' => $response['fallback_level'] ?? NULL,
  1161	      ]
  1162	    );
  1163	
  1164	    $response['request_id'] = $request_id;
  1165	    // Include turn_type in response metadata when not a default NEW turn.
  1166	    if ($turn_type !== TurnClassifier::TURN_NEW) {
  1167	      $response['turn_type'] = $turn_type;
  1168	    }
  1169	    return $this->jsonResponse($response, 200, [], $request_id);
  1170	
  1171	    }
  1172	    catch (\Throwable $e) {
  1173	      $this->logger->error(
  1174	        '[@request_id] Unhandled exception in message pipeline: @class @message',
  1175	        [
  1176	          '@request_id' => $request_id,
  1177	          '@class' => get_class($e),
  1178	          '@message' => $e->getMessage(),
  1179	          '@intent' => isset($intent) ? ($intent['type'] ?? 'unknown') : 'pre_intent',
  1180	          '@safety' => isset($safety_classification) ? ($safety_classification['class'] ?? 'unknown') : 'pre_safety',
  1181	        ]
  1182	      );
  1183	
  1184	      // Capture to Sentry with assistant-specific tags.
  1185	      if (function_exists('\Sentry\captureException')) {
  1186	        \Sentry\configureScope(function (\Sentry\State\Scope $scope) use ($request_id, $intent, $safety_classification) {
  1187	          $scope->setTag('module', 'ilas_site_assistant');
  1188	          $scope->setTag('endpoint', 'message');
  1189	          $scope->setTag('request_id', $request_id);
  1190	          $scope->setTag('intent', isset($intent) ? ($intent['type'] ?? 'unknown') : 'pre_intent');
  1191	          $scope->setTag('safety', isset($safety_classification) ? ($safety_classification['class'] ?? 'unknown') : 'pre_safety');
  1192	        });
  1193	        \Sentry\captureException($e);
  1194	      }
  1195	
  1196	      // End Langfuse trace on error.
  1197	      $this->langfuseTracer?->addEvent('error', [
  1198	        'class' => get_class($e),
  1199	        'message' => $e->getMessage(),
  1200	      ], 'ERROR');
  1201	      $this->langfuseTracer?->endTrace(
  1202	        output: NULL,
  1203	        metadata: ['success' => FALSE, 'error' => get_class($e), 'duration_ms' => (microtime(TRUE) - $start_time) * 1000]
  1204	      );
  1205	
  1206	      if ($this->performanceMonitor) {
  1207	        $duration_ms = (microtime(TRUE) - $start_time) * 1000;
  1208	        $this->performanceMonitor->recordRequest($duration_ms, FALSE, 'error', $request_id);
  1209	      }
  1210	      return $this->jsonResponse([
  1211	        'error' => [
  1212	          'code' => 'internal_error',
  1213	          'message' => 'Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.',
  1214	        ],
  1215	        'request_id' => $request_id,
  1216	      ], 500, [], $request_id);
  1217	    }
  1218	  }
  1219	
  1220	  /**
  1221	   * Lightweight analytics tracking endpoint.
  1222	   *
  1223	   * Accepts tracking events without running the full message pipeline.
  1224	   *
  1225	   * @param \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request $request
  1226	   *   The request object.
  1227	   *
  1228	   * @return \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\JsonResponse
  1229	   *   JSON response confirming the event was recorded.
  1230	   */
  1231	  public function track(Request $request) {
  1232	    $request_id = $this->resolveCorrelationId($request);
  1233	
  1234	    $content_type = (string) $request->headers->get('Content-Type', '');
  1235	    if (strpos($content_type, 'application/json') === FALSE) {
  1236	      return $this->jsonResponse(['error' => 'Invalid content type', 'request_id' => $request_id], 400, [], $request_id);
  1237	    }
  1238	
  1239	    $content = $request->getContent();
  1240	    if (strlen($content) > 1000) {
  1241	      return $this->jsonResponse(['error' => 'Request too large', 'request_id' => $request_id], 413, [], $request_id);
  1242	    }
  1243	
  1244	    $data = json_decode($content, TRUE);
  1245	    if (json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
  1246	      return $this->jsonResponse(['error' => 'Invalid request', 'request_id' => $request_id], 400, [], $request_id);
  1247	    }
  1248	
  1249	    $event_type = $this->sanitizeInput($data['event_type'] ?? '');
  1250	    $event_value = $this->sanitizeInput($data['event_value'] ?? '');
  1251	
  1252	    if (empty($event_type)) {
  1253	      return $this->jsonResponse(['error' => 'Missing event_type', 'request_id' => $request_id], 400, [], $request_id);
  1254	    }
  1255	
  1256	    // Only allow known event types.
  1257	    $allowed_types = [
  1258	      'chat_open', 'suggestion_click', 'resource_click',
  1259	      'hotline_click', 'apply_click', 'apply_cta_click',
  1260	      'apply_secondary_click', 'service_area_click', 'topic_selected',
  1261	    ];
  1262	
  1263	    if (in_array($event_type, $allowed_types)) {
  1264	      $this->analyticsLogger->log($event_type, $event_value);
  1265	    }
  1266	
  1267	    return $this->jsonResponse(['ok' => TRUE, 'request_id' => $request_id], 200, [], $request_id);
  1268	  }
  1269	
  1270	  /**
  1271	   * Classifies intent type into monitoring scenario.
  1272	   *
  1273	   * @param string $intent_type
  1274	   *   The intent type.
  1275	   *
  1276	   * @return string
  1277	   *   One of: short, navigation, retrieval.
  1278	   */
  1279	  protected function classifyScenario(string $intent_type): string {
  1280	    $short_types = ['greeting', 'thanks', 'help'];
  1281	    $navigation_types = ['apply', 'hotline', 'offices', 'donate', 'feedback', 'services'];
  1282	
  1283	    if (in_array($intent_type, $short_types)) {
  1284	      return 'short';
  1285	    }
  1286	    if (in_array($intent_type, $navigation_types)) {
  1287	      return 'navigation';
  1288	    }
  1289	    return 'retrieval';
  1290	  }
  1291	
  1292	  /**
  1293	   * Checks if debug mode is enabled.
  1294	   *
  1295	   * SECURITY: Debug mode is ONLY enabled via server-side environment variable.
  1296	   *
  1297	   * @param \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request $request
  1298	   *   The request object.
  1299	   *
  1300	   * @return bool
  1301	   *   TRUE if debug mode is enabled.
  1302	   */
  1303	  protected function isDebugMode(Request $request): bool {
  1304	    return getenv('ILAS_CHATBOT_DEBUG') === '1';
  1305	  }
  1306	
  1307	  /**
  1308	   * Extracts keywords from text for debug output.
  1309	   *
  1310	   * @param string $text
  1311	   *   The text to extract keywords from.
  1312	   *
  1313	   * @return array
  1314	   *   Array of keywords.
  1315	   */
  1316	  protected function extractKeywords(string $text): array {
  1317	    $text = strtolower($text);
  1318	    $text = preg_replace('/[^\w\s]/', ' ', $text);
  1319	    $words = preg_split('/\s+/', $text);
  1320	
  1321	    $stop_words = [
  1322	      'a', 'an', 'the', 'and', 'or', 'of', 'to', 'in', 'for', 'on', 'with',
  1323	      'is', 'are', 'i', 'you', 'we', 'they', 'my', 'your', 'me', 'can',
  1324	      'do', 'does', 'did', 'have', 'has', 'am', 'be', 'been', 'what',
  1325	      'how', 'where', 'when', 'why', 'this', 'that', 'it',
  1326	    ];
  1327	
  1328	    $keywords = array_filter($words, function ($word) use ($stop_words) {
  1329	      return strlen($word) >= 3 && !in_array($word, $stop_words);
  1330	    });
  1331	
  1332	    return array_values(array_unique($keywords));
  1333	  }
  1334	
  1335	  /**
  1336	   * Detects safety flags from the user message.
  1337	   *
  1338	   * @param string $message
  1339	   *   The user message.
  1340	   *
  1341	   * @return array
  1342	   *   Array of detected safety flags.
  1343	   */
  1344	  protected function detectSafetyFlags(string $message): array {
  1345	    $flags = [];
  1346	    $message_lower = strtolower($message);
  1347	
  1348	    if (preg_match('/\b(domestic\s*violence|dv|abus|hit.*me|beat.*me|threaten)/i', $message)) {
  1349	      $flags[] = 'dv_indicator';
  1350	    }
  1351	    if (preg_match('/\b(evict|sheriff|lock.*out|homeless|thrown?\s*out)/i', $message)) {
  1352	      $flags[] = 'eviction_imminent';
  1353	    }
  1354	    if (preg_match('/\b(identity\s*theft|scam|fraud|stolen\s*identity)/i', $message)) {
  1355	      $flags[] = 'identity_theft';
  1356	    }
  1357	    if (preg_match('/\b(emergency|urgent|suicide|crisis|danger|911)/i', $message)) {
  1358	      $flags[] = 'crisis_emergency';
  1359	    }
  1360	    if (preg_match('/\b(deadline|due\s*(today|tomorrow|friday|monday)|court\s*date)/i', $message)) {
  1361	      $flags[] = 'deadline_pressure';
  1362	    }
  1363	    if (preg_match('/\b(arrest|criminal|felony|misdemeanor|jail|prison|dui|dwi)/i', $message)) {
  1364	      $flags[] = 'criminal_matter';
  1365	    }
  1366	
  1367	    return $flags;
  1368	  }
  1369	
  1370	  /**
  1371	   * Calculates a confidence score for the detected intent.
  1372	   *
  1373	   * @param array $intent
  1374	   *   The detected intent.
  1375	   * @param string $message
  1376	   *   The user message.
  1377	   *
  1378	   * @return float
  1379	   *   Confidence score between 0 and 1.
  1380	   */
  1381	  protected function calculateIntentConfidence(array $intent, string $message): float {
  1382	    return $this->fallbackGate->calculateIntentConfidence($intent, $message);
  1383	  }
  1384	
  1385	  /**
  1386	   * Determines the final action category.
  1387	   *
  1388	   * @param string $response_type
  1389	   *   The response type.
  1390	   *
  1391	   * @return string
  1392	   *   One of: answer, clarify, fallback_llm, hard_route.
  1393	   */
  1394	  protected function determineFinalAction(string $response_type): string {
  1395	    $answer_types = ['faq', 'resources', 'topic', 'eligibility', 'services_overview'];
  1396	    $hard_route_types = ['navigation', 'escalation'];
  1397	
  1398	    if (in_array($response_type, $answer_types)) {
  1399	      return 'answer';
  1400	    }
  1401	    if (in_array($response_type, $hard_route_types)) {
  1402	      return 'hard_route';
  1403	    }
  1404	    if ($response_type === 'fallback') {
  1405	      return 'clarify';
  1406	    }
  1407	
  1408	    return 'answer';
  1409	  }
  1410	
  1411	  /**
  1412	   * Determines a reason code for the response.
  1413	   *
  1414	   * @param array $intent
  1415	   *   The detected intent.
  1416	   * @param array $response
  1417	   *   The response data.
  1418	   *
  1419	   * @return string
  1420	   *   A reason code describing why this response was given.
  1421	   */
  1422	  protected function determineReasonCode(array $intent, array $response): string {
  1423	    $type = $response['type'] ?? 'unknown';
  1424	    $intent_type = $intent['type'] ?? 'unknown';
  1425	
  1426	    if ($type === 'faq' && !empty($response['results'])) {
  1427	      return 'faq_match_found';
  1428	    }
  1429	    if ($type === 'resources' && !empty($response['results'])) {
  1430	      return 'resource_match_found';
  1431	    }
  1432	    if ($type === 'navigation') {
  1433	      return 'direct_navigation_' . $intent_type;
  1434	    }
  1435	    if ($type === 'fallback') {
  1436	      return 'no_match_fallback';
  1437	    }
  1438	    if ($type === 'escalation') {
  1439	      return 'policy_escalation';
  1440	    }
  1441	
  1442	    return 'intent_' . $intent_type;
  1443	  }
  1444	
  1445	  /**
  1446	   * Extracts retrieval metadata from results (IDs/URLs only).
  1447	   *
  1448	   * @param array $results
  1449	   *   The retrieval results.
  1450	   *
  1451	   * @return array
  1452	   *   Array of result metadata (id, url, score).
  1453	   */
  1454	  protected function extractRetrievalMeta(array $results): array {
  1455	    $meta = [];
  1456	
  1457	    foreach (array_slice($results, 0, 10) as $i => $result) {
  1458	      $item = [
  1459	        'rank' => $i + 1,
  1460	        'id' => $result['id'] ?? $result['paragraph_id'] ?? NULL,
  1461	        'url' => $result['url'] ?? $result['source_url'] ?? NULL,
  1462	        'type' => $result['type'] ?? 'unknown',
  1463	      ];
  1464	
  1465	      if (isset($result['score'])) {
  1466	        $item['score'] = $result['score'];
  1467	      }
  1468	
  1469	      $meta[] = $item;
  1470	    }
  1471	
  1472	    return $meta;
  1473	  }
  1474	
  1475	  /**
  1476	   * Returns quick suggestions.
  1477	   *
  1478	   * @param \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request $request
  1479	   *   The request object.
  1480	   *
  1481	   * @return \Drupal\Core\Cache\CacheableJsonResponse
  1482	   *   JSON response with suggestions.
  1483	   */
  1484	  public function suggest(Request $request) {
  1485	    $query = $request->query->get('q', '');
  1486	    $type = $request->query->get('type', 'all');
  1487	
  1488	    $suggestions = [];
  1489	
  1490	    if (strlen($query) >= 2) {
  1491	      $query = $this->sanitizeInput($query);
  1492	
  1493	      if ($type === 'all' || $type === 'topics') {
  1494	        $topics = $this->intentRouter->suggestTopics($query);
  1495	        foreach ($topics as $topic) {
  1496	          $suggestions[] = [
  1497	            'type' => 'topic',
  1498	            'label' => $topic['name'],
  1499	            'id' => $topic['id'],
  1500	          ];
  1501	        }
  1502	      }
  1503	
  1504	      if ($type === 'all' || $type === 'faq') {
  1505	        $faqs = $this->faqIndex->search($query, 3);
  1506	        foreach ($faqs as $faq) {
  1507	          $suggestions[] = [
  1508	            'type' => 'faq',
  1509	            'label' => $faq['question'],
  1510	            'id' => $faq['id'],
  1511	          ];
  1512	        }
  1513	      }
  1514	    }
  1515	
  1516	    $response_data = [
  1517	      'suggestions' => array_slice($suggestions, 0, 6),
  1518	    ];
  1519	
  1520	    $response = new CacheableJsonResponse($response_data, 200, self::SECURITY_HEADERS);
  1521	    $cache_meta = new CacheableMetadata();
  1522	    $cache_meta->setCacheContexts(['url.query_args:q', 'url.query_args:type']);
  1523	    $cache_meta->setCacheTags(['node_list']);
  1524	    $cache_meta->setCacheMaxAge(300);
  1525	    $response->addCacheableDependency($cache_meta);
  1526	
  1527	    return $response;
  1528	  }
  1529	
  1530	  /**
  1531	   * Returns FAQ data.
  1532	   *
  1533	   * @param \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request $request
  1534	   *   The request object.
  1535	   *
  1536	   * @return \Drupal\Core\Cache\CacheableJsonResponse
  1537	   *   JSON response with FAQ data.
  1538	   */
  1539	  public function faq(Request $request) {
  1540	    $query = $request->query->get('q', '');
  1541	    $id = $request->query->get('id');
  1542	
  1543	    $cache_meta = new CacheableMetadata();
  1544	    $cache_meta->setCacheContexts(['url.query_args:q', 'url.query_args:id']);
  1545	    $cache_meta->setCacheTags(['node_list', 'config:ilas_site_assistant.settings']);
  1546	    $cache_meta->setCacheMaxAge(300);
  1547	
  1548	    if ($id) {
  1549	      $faq = $this->faqIndex->getById($id);
  1550	      if ($faq) {
  1551	        $response = new CacheableJsonResponse(['faq' => $faq], 200, self::SECURITY_HEADERS);
  1552	        $response->addCacheableDependency($cache_meta);
  1553	        return $response;
  1554	      }
  1555	      $response = new CacheableJsonResponse(['error' => 'FAQ not found'], 404, self::SECURITY_HEADERS);
  1556	      $response->addCacheableDependency($cache_meta);
  1557	      return $response;
  1558	    }
  1559	
  1560	    if (strlen($query) >= 2) {
  1561	      $query = $this->sanitizeInput($query);
  1562	      $results = $this->faqIndex->search($query, 5);
  1563	      $response = new CacheableJsonResponse([
  1564	        'results' => $results,
  1565	        'count' => count($results),
  1566	      ], 200, self::SECURITY_HEADERS);
  1567	      $response->addCacheableDependency($cache_meta);
  1568	      return $response;
  1569	    }
  1570	
  1571	    $categories = $this->faqIndex->getCategories();
  1572	    $response = new CacheableJsonResponse(['categories' => $categories], 200, self::SECURITY_HEADERS);
  1573	    $response->addCacheableDependency($cache_meta);
  1574	    return $response;
  1575	  }
  1576	
  1577	  /**
  1578	   * Processes an intent and returns a response.
  1579	   *
  1580	   * @param array $intent
  1581	   *   The detected intent.
  1582	   * @param string $message
  1583	   *   The user's message.
  1584	   * @param array $context
  1585	   *   Conversation context.
  1586	   * @param string $request_id
  1587	   *   Per-request correlation UUID for structured logging.
  1588	   *
  1589	   * @return array
  1590	   *   Response data.
  1591	   */
  1592	  protected function processIntent(array $intent, string $message, array $context, string $request_id = '', array $server_history = []) {
  1593	    $config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
  1594	    $canonical_urls = ilas_site_assistant_get_canonical_urls();
  1595	
  1596	    // Use the shared ResponseBuilder for the canonical response skeleton.
  1597	    $builder = new ResponseBuilder($canonical_urls, $this->topIntentsPack);
  1598	    $contract = $builder->buildFromIntent($intent, $message);
  1599	
  1600	    // Normalize intent type for enrichment logic.
  1601	    $intent_type = ResponseBuilder::normalizeIntentType($intent['type'] ?? 'unknown');
  1602	
  1603	    // Build the API response from the contract, enriching with service data.
  1604	    $response = [
  1605	      'type' => $contract['type'],
  1606	      'message' => $contract['answer_text'],
  1607	      'response_mode' => $contract['response_mode'],
  1608	      'primary_action' => $contract['primary_action'],
  1609	      'secondary_actions' => $contract['secondary_actions'],
  1610	      'reason_code' => $contract['reason_code'],
  1611	    ];
  1612	
  1613	    // Set legacy url field from primary_action for backwards compat.
  1614	    if (!empty($contract['primary_action']['url'])) {
  1615	      $response['url'] = $contract['primary_action']['url'];
  1616	    }
  1617	
  1618	    // Enrich response based on intent type (FAQ results, resources, etc.).
  1619	    switch ($intent_type) {
  1620	      case 'faq':
  1621	        if (!$config->get('enable_faq')) {
  1622	          $response['type'] = 'navigation';
  1623	          $response['message'] = $this->t('You can find frequently asked questions on our FAQ page.');
  1624	          break;
  1625	        }
  1626	        $results = $this->faqIndex->search($message, 3);
  1627	        $response['results'] = $results;
  1628	        $response['fallback_url'] = $canonical_urls['faq'];
  1629	        $response['message'] = count($results) > 0
  1630	          ? $this->t('I found some FAQs that might help:')
  1631	          : $this->t('I couldn\'t find a matching FAQ. Try our FAQ page or contact us for help.');
  1632	        break;
  1633	
  1634	      case 'forms_inventory':
  1635	        $response['type'] = 'forms_inventory';
  1636	        $response['response_mode'] = 'clarify';
  1637	        $response['message'] = $this->t('We have forms and resources organized by legal topic. Choose a category:');
  1638	        $response['topic_suggestions'] = [
  1639	          [
  1640	            'label' => $this->t('Housing & Eviction'),
  1641	            'action' => 'forms_housing',
  1642	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['housing'],
  1643	            'description' => $this->t('Eviction defense, tenant rights, housing assistance'),
  1644	          ],
  1645	          [
  1646	            'label' => $this->t('Family & Custody'),
  1647	            'action' => 'forms_family',
  1648	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['family'],
  1649	            'description' => $this->t('Divorce, custody, child support, protection orders'),
  1650	          ],
  1651	          [
  1652	            'label' => $this->t('Consumer & Debt'),
  1653	            'action' => 'forms_consumer',
  1654	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['consumer'],
  1655	            'description' => $this->t('Debt collection, bankruptcy, scams, identity theft'),
  1656	          ],
  1657	          [
  1658	            'label' => $this->t('Seniors & Guardianship'),
  1659	            'action' => 'forms_seniors',
  1660	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['seniors'],
  1661	            'description' => $this->t('Guardianship, elder abuse, estate planning, nursing home'),
  1662	          ],
  1663	          [
  1664	            'label' => $this->t('Health & Benefits'),
  1665	            'action' => 'forms_benefits',
  1666	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['health'],
  1667	            'description' => $this->t('Medicaid, SNAP, SSI/SSDI, disability benefits'),
  1668	          ],
  1669	          [
  1670	            'label' => $this->t('Safety & Protection Orders'),
  1671	            'action' => 'forms_safety',
  1672	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['family'],
  1673	            'description' => $this->t('Protection orders, domestic violence resources'),
  1674	          ],
  1675	        ];
  1676	        $response['primary_action'] = [
  1677	          'label' => $this->t('Browse All Forms'),
  1678	          'url' => $canonical_urls['forms'],
  1679	        ];
  1680	        $this->logger->info('[@request_id] Forms inventory request served', [
  1681	          '@request_id' => $request_id,
  1682	        ]);
  1683	        break;
  1684	
  1685	      case 'guides_inventory':
  1686	        $response['type'] = 'guides_inventory';
  1687	        $response['response_mode'] = 'clarify';
  1688	        $response['message'] = $this->t('We have self-help guides organized by legal topic. Choose a category:');
  1689	        $response['topic_suggestions'] = [
  1690	          [
  1691	            'label' => $this->t('Housing & Eviction'),
  1692	            'action' => 'guides_housing',
  1693	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['housing'],
  1694	            'description' => $this->t('Eviction defense, tenant rights, housing assistance'),
  1695	          ],
  1696	          [
  1697	            'label' => $this->t('Family & Custody'),
  1698	            'action' => 'guides_family',
  1699	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['family'],
  1700	            'description' => $this->t('Divorce, custody, child support, protection orders'),
  1701	          ],
  1702	          [
  1703	            'label' => $this->t('Consumer & Debt'),
  1704	            'action' => 'guides_consumer',
  1705	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['consumer'],
  1706	            'description' => $this->t('Debt collection, bankruptcy, scams, identity theft'),
  1707	          ],
  1708	          [
  1709	            'label' => $this->t('Seniors & Guardianship'),
  1710	            'action' => 'guides_seniors',
  1711	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['seniors'],
  1712	            'description' => $this->t('Guardianship, elder abuse, estate planning, nursing home'),
  1713	          ],
  1714	          [
  1715	            'label' => $this->t('Health & Benefits'),
  1716	            'action' => 'guides_benefits',
  1717	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['health'],
  1718	            'description' => $this->t('Medicaid, SNAP, SSI/SSDI, disability benefits'),
  1719	          ],
  1720	          [
  1721	            'label' => $this->t('Employment & Safety'),
  1722	            'action' => 'guides_employment',
  1723	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['civil_rights'],
  1724	            'description' => $this->t('Employment rights, workplace safety, discrimination'),
  1725	          ],
  1726	        ];
  1727	        $response['primary_action'] = [
  1728	          'label' => $this->t('Browse All Guides'),
  1729	          'url' => $canonical_urls['guides'],
  1730	        ];
  1731	        $this->logger->info('[@request_id] Guides inventory request served', [
  1732	          '@request_id' => $request_id,
  1733	        ]);
  1734	        break;
  1735	
  1736	      case 'services_inventory':
  1737	        $response['type'] = 'services_inventory';
  1738	        $response['response_mode'] = 'navigate';
  1739	        $response['message'] = $this->t('Idaho Legal Aid Services provides free civil legal help in these areas:');
  1740	        $response['topic_suggestions'] = [
  1741	          [
  1742	            'label' => $this->t('Housing'),
  1743	            'action' => 'topic_housing',
  1744	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['housing'],
  1745	            'description' => $this->t('Eviction, landlord/tenant, foreclosure, mobile homes'),
  1746	          ],
  1747	          [
  1748	            'label' => $this->t('Family'),
  1749	            'action' => 'topic_family',
  1750	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['family'],
  1751	            'description' => $this->t('Divorce, custody, child support, protection orders, adoption'),
  1752	          ],
  1753	          [
  1754	            'label' => $this->t('Consumer'),
  1755	            'action' => 'topic_consumer',
  1756	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['consumer'],
  1757	            'description' => $this->t('Debt collection, bankruptcy, scams, identity theft, garnishment'),
  1758	          ],
  1759	          [
  1760	            'label' => $this->t('Seniors'),
  1761	            'action' => 'topic_seniors',
  1762	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['seniors'],
  1763	            'description' => $this->t('Guardianship, elder abuse, estate planning, probate'),
  1764	          ],
  1765	          [
  1766	            'label' => $this->t('Health & Benefits'),
  1767	            'action' => 'topic_health',
  1768	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['health'],
  1769	            'description' => $this->t('Medicaid, SNAP, SSI/SSDI, disability, insurance'),
  1770	          ],
  1771	          [
  1772	            'label' => $this->t('Civil Rights'),
  1773	            'action' => 'topic_civil_rights',
  1774	            'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['civil_rights'],
  1775	            'description' => $this->t('Discrimination, employment rights, voting rights'),
  1776	          ],
  1777	        ];
  1778	        $response['primary_action'] = [
  1779	          'label' => $this->t('Apply for Help'),
  1780	          'url' => $canonical_urls['apply'],
  1781	        ];
  1782	        $this->logger->info('[@request_id] Services inventory request served', [
  1783	          '@request_id' => $request_id,
  1784	        ]);
  1785	        break;
  1786	
  1787	      case 'forms':
  1788	        if (!$config->get('enable_resources')) {
  1789	          $response['type'] = 'navigation';
  1790	          $response['message'] = $this->t('You can find forms on our Forms page.');
  1791	          break;
  1792	        }
  1793	        $form_query = $intent['topic'] ?? $message;
  1794	        $form_topic_keywords = $this->extractFormTopicKeywords($form_query);
  1795	        if (empty($form_topic_keywords)) {
  1796	          $response['type'] = 'form_finder_clarify';
  1797	          $response['response_mode'] = 'clarify';
  1798	          $response['message'] = $this->t('What kind of form are you looking for? You can type a keyword (e.g., eviction, divorce, debt), or pick a topic:');
  1799	          $response['topic_suggestions'] = [
  1800	            ['label' => $this->t('Housing'), 'action' => 'forms_housing'],
  1801	            ['label' => $this->t('Family'), 'action' => 'forms_family'],
  1802	            ['label' => $this->t('Consumer'), 'action' => 'forms_consumer'],
  1803	            ['label' => $this->t('Seniors'), 'action' => 'forms_seniors'],

  1806	          ];

  1808	            'label' => $this->t('Browse All Forms'),
  1809	            'url' => $canonical_urls['forms'],
  1810	          ];
  1811	          $response['form_finder_mode'] = TRUE;
  1812	          $this->logger->info('[@request_id] Form Finder clarification triggered for bare query: @query', [
  1813	            '@request_id' => $request_id,
  1814	            '@query' => PiiRedactor::redactForLog($message),
  1815	          ]);
  1816	          break;
  1817	        }
  1818	        $results = $this->resourceFinder->findForms($form_topic_keywords, 6);
  1819	        $response['results'] = $results;
  1820	        $response['fallback_url'] = $canonical_urls['forms'];
  1821	        $response['fallback_label'] = $this->t('Browse all forms');
  1822	        if (count($results) > 0) {
  1823	          $response['message'] = $this->t('Here are some forms that might help:');
  1824	          $response['disclaimer'] = $this->t('These are informational resources only. If you need legal advice, please apply for help or call our Legal Advice Line.');
  1825	        }
  1826	        else {
  1827	          // Zero results — try broader area search if area context available.
  1828	          $intent_area = $intent['area'] ?? '';
  1829	          if ($intent_area && $config->get('enable_resources')) {
  1830	            $broader_results = $this->resourceFinder->findResources($intent_area, 4);
  1831	            if (!empty($broader_results)) {
  1832	              $response['type'] = 'resources';
  1833	              $response['results'] = $broader_results;

  1840	                '@count' => count($broader_results),
  1841	              ]);
  1842	              break;
  1843	            }

  1850	            ['label' => $this->t('Housing'), 'action' => 'forms_housing'],
  1851	            ['label' => $this->t('Family'), 'action' => 'forms_family'],
  1852	            ['label' => $this->t('Consumer'), 'action' => 'forms_consumer'],
  1853	            ['label' => $this->t('Seniors'), 'action' => 'forms_seniors'],
  1854	          ];
  1855	          $response['primary_action'] = [
  1856	            'label' => $this->t('Browse All Forms'),
  1857	            'url' => $canonical_urls['forms'],
  1858	          ];
  1859	        }
  1860	        $this->logger->info('[@request_id] Form Finder search: query=@query, topic_keywords=@keywords, results=@count', [
  1861	          '@request_id' => $request_id,
  1862	          '@query' => PiiRedactor::redactForLog($message),
  1863	          '@keywords' => $form_topic_keywords,
  1864	          '@count' => count($results),
  1865	        ]);
  1866	        break;
  1867

  1949

  2144	
  2145	      case 'clarify':
  2146	        // Check if the original intent has a clarifier defined in the pack.
  2147	        $original_for_clarify = $intent['original_intent'] ?? '';
  2148	        $clarifier = $original_for_clarify && $this->topIntentsPack
  2149	          ? $this->topIntentsPack->getClarifier($original_for_clarify)
  2150	          : NULL;
  2151	        if ($clarifier) {

  2153	          $response['topic_suggestions'] = array_map(function ($opt) use ($builder) {

  2157	              'url' => $builder->resolveIntentUrl($opt['intent']),

  2159	          }, $clarifier['options'] ?? []);
  2160	        }
  2161	        else {

For example, try typing something like \"I'm being evicted\", \"custody questions\", or \"help with debt\". You can also use the buttons below to find forms, guides, or FAQs.");
  2163	        }

  2165	
  2166	      case 'high_risk':
  2167	        $risk_category = $intent['risk_category'] ?? 'unknown';

  2171	        $response['links'] = [

  2176
