   211	3. CAVEATS that eligibility depends on their specific situation
   212	4. Encourages them to apply or call the hotline to find out
   213	
   214	Do NOT definitively say they do or don't qualify. Always caveat.
   215	PROMPT,
   216	  ];
   217	
   218	  /**
   219	   * Constructs an LlmEnhancer object.
   220	   */
   221	  public function __construct(
   222	    ConfigFactoryInterface $config_factory,
   223	    ClientInterface $http_client,
   224	    LoggerChannelFactoryInterface $logger_factory,
   225	    PolicyFilter $policy_filter,
   226	    CacheBackendInterface $cache = NULL,
   227	    LlmCircuitBreaker $circuit_breaker = NULL,
   228	    LlmRateLimiter $rate_limiter = NULL,
   229	  ) {
   230	    $this->configFactory = $config_factory;
   231	    $this->httpClient = $http_client;
   232	    $this->logger = $logger_factory->get('ilas_site_assistant');
   233	    $this->policyFilter = $policy_filter;
   234	    $this->cache = $cache;
   235	    $this->circuitBreaker = $circuit_breaker;
   236	    $this->rateLimiter = $rate_limiter;
   237	  }
   238	
   239	  /**
   240	   * Checks if LLM enhancement is enabled.
   241	   *
   242	   * @return bool
   243	   *   TRUE if LLM is enabled and configured.
   244	   */
   245	  public function isEnabled(): bool {
   246	    $config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   247	
   248	    if (!$config->get('llm.enabled')) {
   249	      return FALSE;
   250	    }
   251	
   252	    // Check for required configuration.
   253	    $provider = $config->get('llm.provider');
   254	
   255	    if ($provider === 'gemini_api') {
   256	      return !empty($config->get('llm.api_key'));
   257	    }
   258	
   259	    if ($provider === 'vertex_ai') {
   260	      return !empty($config->get('llm.project_id')) &&
   261	             !empty($config->get('llm.location'));
   262	    }
   263	
   264	    return FALSE;
   265	  }
   266	
   267	  /**
   268	   * Returns token usage from the most recent LLM API call.
   269	   *
   270	   * @return array|null
   271	   *   Array with 'input', 'output', 'total' token counts, or NULL if
   272	   *   no usage data is available (e.g., response was cached or no call made).
   273	   */
   274	  public function getLastUsage(): ?array {
   275	    return $this->lastUsage;
   276	  }
   277	
   278	  /**
   279	   * Returns the rate limiter instance (for controller debug metadata).
   280	   *
   281	   * @return \Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service\LlmRateLimiter|null
   282	   *   The rate limiter, or NULL if not configured.
   283	   */
   284	  public function getRateLimiter(): ?LlmRateLimiter {
   285	    return $this->rateLimiter;
   286	  }
   287	
   288	  /**
   289	   * Enhances a response with LLM-generated summary.
   290	   *
   291	   * @param array $response
   292	   *   The original response from intent processing.
   293	   * @param string $userQuery
   294	   *   The user's original query.
   295	   *
   296	   * @return array
   297	   *   Enhanced response with optional 'llm_summary' field.
   298	   */
   299	  public function enhanceResponse(array $response, string $userQuery): array {
   300	    if (!$this->isEnabled()) {
   301	      return $response;
   302	    }
   303	
   304	    $config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   305	    $type = $response['type'] ?? '';
   306	
   307	    // Don't enhance escalation or error responses.
   308	    if (in_array($type, ['escalation', 'error'])) {
   309	      return $response;
   310	    }
   311	
   312	    // Honor enhance_faq flag.
   313	    if ($type === 'faq' && !$config->get('llm.enhance_faq')) {
   314	      return $response;
   315	    }
   316	
   317	    // Honor enhance_resources flag.
   318	    if ($type === 'resources' && !$config->get('llm.enhance_resources')) {
   319	      return $response;
   320	    }
   321	
   322	    // Don't enhance if no results to summarize.
   323	    if (empty($response['results']) && empty($response['message'])) {
   324	      return $response;
   325	    }
   326	
   327	    try {
   328	      $summary = $this->generateSummary($response, $userQuery);
   329	      if ($summary) {
   330	        $response['llm_summary'] = $summary;
   331	        $response['llm_enhanced'] = TRUE;
   332	      }
   333	    }
   334	    catch (\Exception $e) {
   335	      $this->logger->warning('LLM enhancement failed: @message', [
   336	        '@message' => $e->getMessage(),
   337	      ]);
   338	      // Re-throw if fallback_on_error is disabled.
   339	      if (!$config->get('llm.fallback_on_error')) {
   340	        throw $e;
   341	      }
   342	    }
   343	
   344	    return $response;
   345	  }
   346	
   347	  /**
   348	   * Uses LLM to help classify ambiguous intents.
   349	   *
   350	   * @param string $userQuery
   351	   *   The user's query.
   352	   * @param string $currentIntent
   353	   *   The intent detected by rule-based system.
   354	   *
   355	   * @return string
   356	   *   The classified intent (may be same as current or improved).
   357	   */
   358	  public function classifyIntent(string $userQuery, string $currentIntent = 'unknown'): string {
   359	    if (!$this->isEnabled()) {
   360	      return $currentIntent;
   361	    }
   362	
   363	    // Only use LLM for ambiguous cases.
   364	    if ($currentIntent !== 'unknown') {
   365	      return $currentIntent;
   366	    }
   367	
   368	    try {
   369	      $sanitizedQuery = $this->policyFilter->sanitizeForLlmPrompt($userQuery);
   370	      $prompt = self::SYSTEM_PROMPTS['intent_classification'] . "\n\nUser query: " . $sanitizedQuery;
   371	
   372	      $result = $this->callLlm($prompt, [
   373	        'max_tokens' => 20,
   374	        'temperature' => 0.1,
   375	      ]);
   376	
   377	      // Validate the response is a known intent.
   378	      $validIntents = [
   379	        'faq', 'forms', 'guides', 'resources', 'apply', 'hotline', 'donate',
   380	        'housing', 'family', 'consumer', 'health', 'seniors', 'civil_rights',
   381	        'greeting', 'unknown',
   382	      ];
   383	
   384	      $classified = strtolower(trim($result));
   385	
   386	      if (in_array($classified, $validIntents)) {
   387	        return $classified;
   388	      }
   389	    }
   390	    catch (\Exception $e) {
   391	      $this->logger->warning('LLM intent classification failed: @message', [
   392	        '@message' => $e->getMessage(),
   393	      ]);
   394	    }
   395	
   396	    return $currentIntent;
   397	  }
   398	
   399	  /**
   400	   * Generates a conversational summary of results.
   401	   *
   402	   * @param array $response
   403	   *   The response data with results.
   404	   * @param string $userQuery
   405	   *   The user's original query.
   406	   *
   407	   * @return string|null
   408	   *   The generated summary or NULL on failure.
   409	   */
   410	  protected function generateSummary(array $response, string $userQuery): ?string {
   411	    $type = $response['type'] ?? 'unknown';
   412	    $results = $response['results'] ?? [];
   413	
   414	    // Build context from results.
   415	    $context = $this->buildResultContext($type, $results);
   416	
   417	    if (empty($context)) {
   418	      return NULL;
   419	    }
   420	
   421	    // Select appropriate system prompt.
   422	    $systemPrompt = match ($type) {
   423	      'faq' => self::SYSTEM_PROMPTS['faq_summary'],
   424	      'resources' => self::SYSTEM_PROMPTS['resource_summary'],
   425	      default => self::SYSTEM_PROMPTS['default'],
   426	    };
   427	
   428	    // Sanitize user query to remove PII before sending to LLM.
   429	    $sanitizedQuery = $this->policyFilter->sanitizeForLlmPrompt($userQuery);
   430	
   431	    // Build the full prompt.
   432	    $prompt = $systemPrompt . "\n\n";
   433	    $prompt .= "User's question: " . $sanitizedQuery . "\n\n";
   434	    $prompt .= "Information to summarize:\n" . $context;
   435	
   436	    // Call the LLM.
   437	    $config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   438	
   439	    return $this->callLlm($prompt, [
   440	      'max_tokens' => $config->get('llm.max_tokens') ?? 150,
   441	      'temperature' => $config->get('llm.temperature') ?? 0.3,
   442	    ]);
   443	  }
   444	
   445	  /**
   446	   * Builds context string from results.
   447	   *
   448	   * @param string $type
   449	   *   The response type.
   450	   * @param array $results
   451	   *   The results array.
   452	   *
   453	   * @return string
   454	   *   Formatted context for the LLM.
   455	   */
   456	  protected function buildResultContext(string $type, array $results): string {
   457	    if (empty($results)) {
   458	      return '';
   459	    }
   460	
   461	    $context = '';
   462	
   463	    switch ($type) {
   464	      case 'faq':
   465	        foreach (array_slice($results, 0, 3) as $i => $faq) {
   466	          $context .= "<retrieved_content>\n";
   467	          $context .= "FAQ " . ($i + 1) . ":\n";
   468	          $context .= "Q: " . ($faq['question'] ?? '') . "\n";
   469	          $context .= "A: " . ($faq['full_answer'] ?? $faq['answer'] ?? '') . "\n";
   470	          $context .= "</retrieved_content>\n\n";
   471	        }
   472	        break;
   473	
   474	      case 'resources':
   475	        foreach (array_slice($results, 0, 3) as $i => $resource) {
   476	          $context .= "<retrieved_content>\n";
   477	          $context .= "Resource " . ($i + 1) . ": ";
   478	          $context .= ($resource['title'] ?? '') . " (" . ($resource['type'] ?? 'resource') . ")\n";
   479	          if (!empty($resource['description'])) {
   480	            $context .= "Description: " . $resource['description'] . "\n";
   481	          }
   482	          $context .= "</retrieved_content>\n\n";
   483	        }
   484	        break;
   485	
   486	      default:
   487	        // Generic formatting.
   488	        foreach (array_slice($results, 0, 3) as $result) {
   489	          if (is_array($result)) {
   490	            $context .= "<retrieved_content>\n";
   491	            $context .= json_encode($result) . "\n";
   492	            $context .= "</retrieved_content>\n\n";
   493	          }
   494	        }
   495	    }
   496	
   497	    // Truncate to prevent excessive token usage.
   498	    return mb_substr($context, 0, 2000);
   499	  }
   500	
   501	  /**
   502	   * Calls the LLM API.
   503	   *
   504	   * @param string $prompt
   505	   *   The prompt to send.
   506	   * @param array $options
   507	   *   Options like max_tokens, temperature.
   508	   *
   509	   * @return string
   510	   *   The LLM response text.
   511	   *
   512	   * @throws \Exception
   513	   *   If the API call fails.
   514	   */
   515	
   516	  /**
   517	   * Returns the configured Gemini safety settings.
   518	   *
   519	   * @return array
   520	   *   Safety settings array for the Gemini/Vertex API payload.
   521	   */
   522	  protected function getSafetySettings(): array {
   523	    $config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   524	    $threshold = $config->get('llm.safety_threshold') ?? 'BLOCK_MEDIUM_AND_ABOVE';
   525	
   526	    // Validate against allowed values — BLOCK_NONE is intentionally excluded.
   527	    $allowed = [
   528	      'BLOCK_LOW_AND_ABOVE',
   529	      'BLOCK_MEDIUM_AND_ABOVE',
   530	      'BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH',
   531	    ];
   532	    if (!in_array($threshold, $allowed, TRUE)) {
   533	      $threshold = 'BLOCK_MEDIUM_AND_ABOVE';
   534	    }
   535	
   536	    $categories = [
   537	      'HARM_CATEGORY_HARASSMENT',
   538	      'HARM_CATEGORY_HATE_SPEECH',
   539	      'HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT',
   540	      'HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS_CONTENT',
   541	    ];
   542	
   543	    return array_map(fn($cat) => [
   544	      'category' => $cat,
   545	      'threshold' => $threshold,
   546	    ], $categories);
   547	  }
   548	
   549	  protected function callLlm(string $prompt, array $options = []): string {
   550	    $config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   551	    $provider = $config->get('llm.provider') ?? 'gemini_api';
   552	    $model = $config->get('llm.model') ?? 'gemini-1.5-flash';
   553	    $temperature = $options['temperature'] ?? 0.3;
   554	    $cacheTtl = (int) ($config->get('llm.cache_ttl') ?? 3600);
   555	
   556	    // Check cache (skip for high temperature to allow variation).
   557	    // Key includes policy_version so bumping it invalidates all cached responses.
   558	    if ($this->cache && $cacheTtl > 0 && $temperature <= 0.5) {
   559	      $cacheKey = 'llm:' . hash('sha256', implode('|', [
   560	        $prompt,
   561	        $model,
   562	        (string) ($options['max_tokens'] ?? 150),
   563	        (string) $temperature,
   564	        static::POLICY_VERSION,
   565	      ]));
   566	      $cached = $this->cache->get($cacheKey);
   567	      if ($cached) {
   568	        $this->lastUsage = NULL;
   569	        return $cached->data;
   570	      }
   571	    }
   572	
   573	    // Circuit breaker check (after cache — cached responses always served).
   574	    if ($this->circuitBreaker && !$this->circuitBreaker->isAvailable()) {
   575	      throw new \RuntimeException('LLM circuit breaker is open, skipping API call.');
   576	    }
   577	
   578	    // Global rate limit check (after cache + circuit breaker, before API call).
   579	    if ($this->rateLimiter && !$this->rateLimiter->isAllowed()) {
   580	      throw new \RuntimeException('LLM global rate limit exceeded, skipping API call.');
   581	    }
   582	
   583	    try {
   584	      if ($provider === 'vertex_ai') {
   585	        $result = $this->callVertexAi($prompt, $options);
   586	      }
   587	      else {
   588	        $result = $this->callGeminiApi($prompt, $options);
   589	      }
   590	      $this->circuitBreaker?->recordSuccess();
   591	      $this->rateLimiter?->recordCall();
   592	    }
   593	    catch (\Exception $e) {
   594	      $this->circuitBreaker?->recordFailure();
   595	      throw $e;
   596	    }
   597	
   598	    // Store in cache.
   599	    if ($this->cache && $cacheTtl > 0 && $temperature <= 0.5 && isset($cacheKey)) {
   600	      $this->cache->set($cacheKey, $result, time() + $cacheTtl, ['ilas_site_assistant:llm']);
   601	    }
   602	
   603	    return $result;
   604	  }
   605	
   606	  /**
   607	   * Calls the Gemini API directly (using API key).
   608	   *
   609	   * @param string $prompt
   610	   *   The prompt.
   611	   * @param array $options
   612	   *   Options.
   613	   *
   614	   * @return string
   615	   *   The response text.
   616	   */
   617	  protected function callGeminiApi(string $prompt, array $options): string {
   618	    $config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   619	    $apiKey = $config->get('llm.api_key');
   620	    $model = $config->get('llm.model') ?? 'gemini-1.5-flash';
   621	
   622	    if (empty($apiKey)) {
   623	      throw new \Exception('Gemini API key not configured');
   624	    }
   625	
   626	    $url = self::GEMINI_API_ENDPOINT . '/' . $model . ':generateContent';
   627	
   628	    $payload = [
   629	      'contents' => [
   630	        [
   631	          'parts' => [
   632	            ['text' => $prompt],
   633	          ],
   634	        ],
   635	      ],
   636	      'generationConfig' => [
   637	        'maxOutputTokens' => $options['max_tokens'] ?? 150,
   638	        'temperature' => $options['temperature'] ?? 0.3,
   639	        'topP' => 0.8,
   640	        'topK' => 40,
   641	      ],
   642	      'safetySettings' => $this->getSafetySettings(),
   643	    ];
   644	
   645	    return $this->makeApiRequest($url, $payload, ['x-goog-api-key' => $apiKey]);
   646	  }
   647	
   648	  /**
   649	   * Calls Vertex AI (using service account).
   650	   *
   651	   * @param string $prompt
   652	   *   The prompt.
   653	   * @param array $options
   654	   *   Options.
   655	   *
   656	   * @return string
   657	   *   The response text.
   658	   */
   659	  protected function callVertexAi(string $prompt, array $options): string {
   660	    $config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   661	
   662	    $projectId = $config->get('llm.project_id');
   663	    $location = $config->get('llm.location') ?? 'us-central1';
   664	    $model = $config->get('llm.model') ?? 'gemini-1.5-flash';
   665	
   666	    if (empty($projectId)) {
   667	      throw new \Exception('Vertex AI project ID not configured');
   668	    }
   669	
   670	    // Get access token.
   671	    $accessToken = $this->getVertexAiAccessToken();
   672	
   673	    $url = sprintf(
   674	      self::VERTEX_AI_ENDPOINT,
   675	      $location,
   676	      $projectId,
   677	      $location,
   678	      $model
   679	    );
   680	
   681	    $payload = [
   682	      'contents' => [
   683	        [
   684	          'role' => 'user',
   685	          'parts' => [
   686	            ['text' => $prompt],
   687	          ],
   688	        ],
   689	      ],
   690	      'generationConfig' => [
   691	        'maxOutputTokens' => $options['max_tokens'] ?? 150,
   692	        'temperature' => $options['temperature'] ?? 0.3,
   693	        'topP' => 0.8,
   694	        'topK' => 40,
   695	      ],
   696	      'safetySettings' => $this->getSafetySettings(),
   697	    ];
   698	
   699	    return $this->makeApiRequest($url, $payload, [
   700	      'Authorization' => 'Bearer ' . $accessToken,
   701	    ]);
   702	  }
   703	
   704	  /**
   705	   * Makes an API request to Gemini/Vertex AI.
   706	   *
   707	   * @param string $url
   708	   *   The API URL.
   709	   * @param array $payload
   710	   *   The request payload.
   711	   * @param array $headers
   712	   *   Additional headers.
   713	   *
   714	   * @return string
   715	   *   The response text.
   716	   */
   717	  protected function makeApiRequest(string $url, array $payload, array $headers = []): string {
   718	    $config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   719	    $maxRetries = (int) ($config->get('llm.max_retries') ?? 2);
   720	    $retryableCodes = [429, 500, 502, 503, 504];
   721	
   722	    $defaultHeaders = [
   723	      'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
   724	    ];
   725	
   726	    $allHeaders = array_merge($defaultHeaders, $headers);
   727	
   728	    $attempt = 0;
   729	    while (TRUE) {
   730	      try {
   731	        $response = $this->httpClient->request('POST', $url, [
   732	          'headers' => $allHeaders,
   733	          'json' => $payload,
   734	          'timeout' => 10,
   735	        ]);
   736	
   737	        $body = json_decode($response->getBody()->getContents(), TRUE);
   738	
   739	        // Capture token usage metadata from the response.
   740	        $this->lastUsage = NULL;
   741	        if (isset($body['usageMetadata'])) {
   742	          $usage = $body['usageMetadata'];
   743	          $this->lastUsage = [
   744	            'input' => (int) ($usage['promptTokenCount'] ?? 0),
   745	            'output' => (int) ($usage['candidatesTokenCount'] ?? 0),
   746	            'total' => (int) ($usage['totalTokenCount'] ?? 0),
   747	          ];
   748	        }
   749	
   750	        // Extract text from response.
   751	        if (isset($body['candidates'][0]['content']['parts'][0]['text'])) {
   752	          $text = $body['candidates'][0]['content']['parts'][0]['text'];
   753	
   754	          // Final safety check - ensure no legal advice slipped through.
   755	          if ($this->containsLegalAdvice($text)) {
   756	            $this->logger->warning('LLM response contained potential legal advice, filtering.');
   757	            return $this->t('I found some information that may help. Please contact our Legal Advice Line for guidance specific to your situation.');
   758	          }
   759	
   760	          return trim($text);
   761	        }
   762	
   763	        // Check for blocked content.
   764	        if (isset($body['candidates'][0]['finishReason']) &&
   765	            $body['candidates'][0]['finishReason'] === 'SAFETY') {
   766	          $this->logger->warning('LLM response blocked by safety filters.');
   767	          return '';
   768	        }
   769	
   770	        throw new \Exception('Unexpected API response format');
   771	      }
   772	      catch (GuzzleException $e) {
   773	        $statusCode = ($e instanceof RequestException && $e->getResponse())
   774	          ? $e->getResponse()->getStatusCode()
   775	          : 0;
   776	
   777	        // Retry on retryable status codes if we have retries left.
   778	        if ($attempt < $maxRetries && in_array($statusCode, $retryableCodes, TRUE)) {
   779	          $attempt++;
   780	          // Exponential backoff with jitter: 500ms * 2^attempt + random(0-250ms).
   781	          $delayMs = (int) (500 * pow(2, $attempt - 1) + random_int(0, 250));
   782	          usleep($delayMs * 1000);
   783	          $this->logger->notice('LLM API request retry @attempt/@max after HTTP @code', [
   784	            '@attempt' => $attempt,
   785	            '@max' => $maxRetries,
   786	            '@code' => $statusCode,
   787	          ]);
   788	          continue;
   789	        }
   790	
   791	        throw new \Exception('API request failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
   792	      }
   793	    }
   794	  }
   795	
   796	  /**
   797	   * Gets an access token for Vertex AI.
   798	   *
   799	   * This uses the default application credentials (service account).
   800	   *
   801	   * @return string
   802	   *   The access token.
   803	   */
   804	  protected function getVertexAiAccessToken(): string {
   805	    $config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   806	
   807	    // Option 1: Service account JSON key stored in config.
   808	    $serviceAccountJson = $config->get('llm.service_account_json');
   809	    if (!empty($serviceAccountJson)) {
   810	      return $this->getTokenFromServiceAccount($serviceAccountJson);
   811	    }
   812	
   813	    // Option 2: Use metadata server (when running on GCP).
   814	    return $this->getTokenFromMetadataServer();
   815	  }
   816	
   817	  /**
   818	   * Gets access token from service account JSON.
   819	   *
   820	   * @param string $json
   821	   *   The service account JSON.
   822	   *
   823	   * @return string
   824	   *   The access token.
   825	   */
   826	  protected function getTokenFromServiceAccount(string $json): string {
   827	    $credentials = json_decode($json, TRUE);
   828	
   829	    if (!$credentials || empty($credentials['private_key']) || empty($credentials['client_email'])) {
   830	      throw new \Exception('Invalid service account JSON');
   831	    }
   832	
   833	    // Create JWT.
   834	    $header = [
   835	      'alg' => 'RS256',
   836	      'typ' => 'JWT',
   837	    ];
   838	
   839	    $now = time();
   840	    $payload = [
   841	      'iss' => $credentials['client_email'],
   842	      'scope' => 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform',
   843	      'aud' => 'https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token',
   844	      'iat' => $now,
   845	      'exp' => $now + 3600,
   846	    ];
   847	
   848	    $headerEncoded = $this->base64UrlEncode(json_encode($header));
   849	    $payloadEncoded = $this->base64UrlEncode(json_encode($payload));
   850	
   851	    $signatureInput = $headerEncoded . '.' . $payloadEncoded;
   852	
   853	    openssl_sign($signatureInput, $signature, $credentials['private_key'], 'SHA256');
   854	    $signatureEncoded = $this->base64UrlEncode($signature);
   855	
   856	    $jwt = $signatureInput . '.' . $signatureEncoded;
   857	
   858	    // Exchange JWT for access token.
   859	    $response = $this->httpClient->request('POST', 'https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token', [
   860	      'form_params' => [
   861	        'grant_type' => 'urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:jwt-bearer',
   862	        'assertion' => $jwt,
   863	      ],
   864	    ]);
   865	
   866	    $body = json_decode($response->getBody()->getContents(), TRUE);
   867	
   868	    if (empty($body['access_token'])) {
   869	      throw new \Exception('Failed to get access token');
   870	    }
   871	
   872	    return $body['access_token'];
   873	  }
   874	
   875	  /**
   876	   * Gets access token from GCP metadata server.
   877	   *
   878	   * @return string
   879	   *   The access token.
   880	   */
   881	  protected function getTokenFromMetadataServer(): string {
   882	    try {
   883	      $response = $this->httpClient->request('GET',
   884	        'http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/service-accounts/default/token',
   885	        [
   886	          'headers' => [
   887	            'Metadata-Flavor' => 'Google',
   888	          ],
   889	          'timeout' => 5,
   890	        ]
   891	      );
   892	
   893	      $body = json_decode($response->getBody()->getContents(), TRUE);
   894	
   895	      if (empty($body['access_token'])) {
   896	        throw new \Exception('No access token in metadata response');
   897	      }
   898	
   899	      return $body['access_token'];
   900	    }
   901	    catch (\Exception $e) {
   902	      throw new \Exception('Failed to get token from metadata server. Are you running on GCP? Error: ' . $e->getMessage());
   903	    }
   904	  }
   905	
   906	  /**
   907	   * Base64 URL encode.
   908	   */
   909	  protected function base64UrlEncode(string $data): string {
   910	    return rtrim(strtr(base64_encode($data), '+/', '-_'), '=');
   911	  }
   912	
   913	  /**
   914	   * Checks if text contains potential legal advice.
   915	   *
   916	   * Based on ILAS Conversation Policy v4.1 Disallowed Content Rules.
   917	   *
   918	   * @param string $text
   919	   *   The text to check.
   920	   *
   921	   * @return bool
   922	   *   TRUE if legal advice detected.
   923	   */
   924	  protected function containsLegalAdvice(string $text): bool {
   925	    // Normalize input to defeat evasion techniques (e.g., "y.o.u s.h.o.u.l.d").
   926	    $text = InputNormalizer::normalize($text);
   927	
   928	    $patterns = [
   929	      // Interpreting laws or citing statutes.
   930	      '/idaho\s+code\s*(§|section)/i',
   931	      '/i\.c\.\s*§/i',
   932	      '/under\s+(the\s+)?(law|statute|code)/i',
   933	      '/according\s+to\s+(the\s+)?(law|statute)/i',
   934	      '/(statute|code)\s+(says|states|requires)/i',
   935	
   936	      // Predicting legal outcomes.
   937	      '/you\s+(will|would)\s+(likely|probably)\s+(win|lose|succeed|fail)/i',
   938	      '/your\s+chances\s+(of|are)/i',
   939	      '/the\s+court\s+will\s+(likely|probably)/i',
   940	      '/you\s+(are|\'re)\s+(likely|probably)\s+to\s+(win|lose)/i',
   941	
   942	      // Advising on legal strategy.
   943	      '/you\s+should\s+(file|sue|appeal|claim|motion)/i',
   944	      '/i\s+(would\s+)?(advise|recommend|suggest)\s+(you|that\s+you)/i',
   945	      '/my\s+(legal\s+)?advice\s+is/i',
   946	      '/the\s+best\s+(legal\s+)?(strategy|approach)\s+is/i',
   947	      '/you\s+need\s+to\s+(file|submit|send)/i',
   948	
   949	      // Recommending specific actions with legal consequence.
   950	      '/you\s+should\s+(stop\s+paying|withhold|break\s+your)/i',
   951	      '/don\'t\s+(pay|respond|go\s+to\s+court)/i',
   952	      '/ignore\s+the\s+(notice|summons|order)/i',
   953	      '/you\s+have\s+the\s+right\s+to/i',
   954	
   955	      // Definitive eligibility statements.
   956	      '/you\s+(definitely|clearly|certainly)\s+qualify/i',
   957	      '/you\s+(do|don\'t)\s+qualify\s+for/i',
   958	    ];
   959	
   960	    foreach ($patterns as $pattern) {
   961	      if (preg_match($pattern, $text)) {
   962	        return TRUE;
   963	      }
   964	    }
   965	
   966	    return FALSE;
   967	  }
   968	
   969	  /**
   970	   * Generates a friendly greeting response.
   971	   *
   972	   * @param string $userQuery
   973	   *   The user's greeting.
   974	   *
   975	   * @return string|null
   976	   *   A friendly response or NULL to use default.
   977	   */
   978	  public function generateGreeting(string $userQuery): ?string {
   979	    if (!$this->isEnabled()) {
   980	      return NULL;
   981	    }
   982	
   983	    $config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   984	
   985	    if (!$config->get('llm.enhance_greetings')) {
   986	      return NULL;
   987	    }
   988	
   989	    try {
   990	      $sanitizedQuery = $this->policyFilter->sanitizeForLlmPrompt($userQuery);
   991	      $prompt = self::SYSTEM_PROMPTS['default'] . "\n\n";
   992	      $prompt .= "The user just said: \"" . $sanitizedQuery . "\"\n\n";
   993	      $prompt .= "Respond with a brief, friendly greeting (1 sentence) and ask how you can help them find information on the ILAS website today.";
   994	
   995	      return $this->callLlm($prompt, [
   996	        'max_tokens' => 50,
   997	        'temperature' => 0.7,
   998	      ]);
   999	    }
  1000	    catch (\Exception $e) {
  1001	      return NULL;
  1002	    }
  1003	  }
  1004	
  1005	}

===== web/modules/custom/ilas_site_assistant/src/Service/ResourceFinder.php =====
     1	<?php
     2	
     3	namespace Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service;
     4	
     5	use Drupal\Core\Entity\EntityTypeManagerInterface;
     6	use Drupal\Core\Cache\CacheBackendInterface;
     7	use Drupal\Core\Config\ConfigFactoryInterface;
     8	use Drupal\Core\Language\LanguageManagerInterface;
     9	use Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service\PiiRedactor;
    10	use Drupal\search_api\Entity\Index;
    11	
    12	/**
    13	 * Service for finding forms, guides, and resources.
    14	 *
    15	 * Uses Search API content index for text search with fallback to
    16	 * direct entity queries when the index is unavailable.
    17	 *
    18	 * When vector search is enabled, supplements sparse lexical results with
    19	 * semantic search from a Pinecone-backed vector index.
    20	 */
    21	class ResourceFinder {
    22	
    23	  /**
    24	   * Cache TTL for per-query memoization (seconds).
    25	   */
    26	  const QUERY_CACHE_TTL = 300;
    27	
    28	  /**
    29	   * Maximum tolerated duration for a vector search call (ms).
    30	   */
    31	  const MAX_VECTOR_MS = 2000;
    32	
    33	  /**
    34	   * Backoff duration after a vector search timeout/failure (seconds).
    35	   */
    36	  const VECTOR_BACKOFF_SECONDS = 120;
    37	
    38	  /**
    39	   * Timestamp (epoch seconds) until which vector search is skipped due to a
    40	   * recent timeout/failure. Static so it applies across instances per request.
    41	   *
    42	   * @var int
    43	   */
    44	  protected static int $vectorBackoffUntil = 0;
    45	  /**
    46	   * The entity type manager.
    47	   *
    48	   * @var \Drupal\Core\Entity\EntityTypeManagerInterface
    49	   */
    50	  protected $entityTypeManager;
    51	
    52	  /**
    53	   * The topic resolver service.
    54	   *
    55	   * @var \Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service\TopicResolver
    56	   */
    57	  protected $topicResolver;
    58	
    59	  /**
    60	   * The config factory.
    61	   *
    62	   * @var \Drupal\Core\Config\ConfigFactoryInterface
    63	   */
    64	  protected $configFactory;
    65	
    66	  /**
    67	   * The cache backend.
    68	   *
    69	   * @var \Drupal\Core\Cache\CacheBackendInterface
    70	   */
    71	  protected $cache;
    72	
    73	  /**
    74	   * The language manager.
    75	   *
    76	   * @var \Drupal\Core\Language\LanguageManagerInterface
    77	   */
    78	  protected $languageManager;
    79	
    80	  /**
    81	   * The ranking enhancer service.
    82	   *
    83	   * @var \Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service\RankingEnhancer
    84	   */
    85	  protected $rankingEnhancer;
    86	
    87	  /**
    88	   * The Search API index.
    89	   *
    90	   * @var \Drupal\search_api\IndexInterface|null
    91	   */
    92	  protected $index;
    93	
    94	  /**
    95	   * Cache ID for resource data.
    96	   */
    97	  const CACHE_ID = 'ilas_site_assistant.resources';
    98	
    99	  /**
   100	   * The dedicated Search API index ID for assistant resources.
   101	   */
   102	  const INDEX_ID = 'assistant_resources';
   103	
   104	  /**
   105	   * Fallback Search API index ID (generic content index).
   106	   */
   107	  const FALLBACK_INDEX_ID = 'content';
   108	
   109	  /**
   110	   * Constructs a ResourceFinder object.
   111	   */
   112	  public function __construct(
   113	    EntityTypeManagerInterface $entity_type_manager,
   114	    TopicResolver $topic_resolver,
   115	    CacheBackendInterface $cache,
   116	    LanguageManagerInterface $language_manager,
   117	    RankingEnhancer $ranking_enhancer = NULL,
   118	    ConfigFactoryInterface $config_factory = NULL
   119	  ) {
   120	    $this->entityTypeManager = $entity_type_manager;
   121	    $this->topicResolver = $topic_resolver;
   122	    $this->cache = $cache;
   123	    $this->languageManager = $language_manager;
   124	    $this->rankingEnhancer = $ranking_enhancer;
   125	    $this->configFactory = $config_factory;
   126	  }
   127	
   128	  /**
   129	   * Gets the current language code.
   130	   *
   131	   * @return string
   132	   *   The current language code (defaults to 'en').
   133	   */
   134	  protected function getCurrentLanguage() {
   135	    return $this->languageManager->getCurrentLanguage()->getId();
   136	  }
   137	
   138	  /**
   139	   * Gets the Search API index.
   140	   *
   141	   * Tries the dedicated assistant_resources index first. Falls back to the
   142	   * generic content index if the dedicated index is unavailable.
   143	   *
   144	   * @return \Drupal\search_api\IndexInterface|null
   145	   *   The index or NULL if not available.
   146	   */
   147	  protected function getIndex() {
   148	    if ($this->index === NULL) {
   149	      // Try dedicated assistant resources index first.
   150	      $this->index = Index::load(self::INDEX_ID);
   151	      if (!$this->index || !$this->index->status()) {
   152	        // Fall back to generic content index.
   153	        $this->index = Index::load(self::FALLBACK_INDEX_ID);
   154	      }
   155	    }
   156	    return $this->index;
   157	  }
   158	
   159	  /**
   160	   * Checks if the dedicated assistant resources index is in use.
   161	   *
   162	   * @return bool
   163	   *   TRUE if using the dedicated index, FALSE if using fallback.
   164	   */
   165	  public function isUsingDedicatedIndex(): bool {
   166	    $index = $this->getIndex();
   167	    return $index && $index->id() === self::INDEX_ID;
   168	  }
   169	
   170	  /**
   171	   * Checks if Search API index is available.
   172	   *
   173	   * @return bool
   174	   *   TRUE if the index is available and usable.
   175	   */
   176	  public function isIndexAvailable() {
   177	    $index = $this->getIndex();
   178	    return $index && $index->status();
   179	  }
   180	
   181	  /**
   182	   * Gets all resources indexed for search.
   183	   *
   184	   * @return array
   185	   *   Array of resource data.
   186	   */
   187	  public function getAllResources() {
   188	    $cache = $this->cache->get(self::CACHE_ID);
   189	    if ($cache) {
   190	      return $cache->data;
   191	    }
   192	
   193	    $resources = $this->indexResources();
   194	
   195	    // Cache for 1 hour.
   196	    $this->cache->set(self::CACHE_ID, $resources, time() + 3600, ['node_list:resource']);
   197	
   198	    return $resources;
   199	  }
   200	
   201	  /**
   202	   * Indexes all resource nodes.
   203	   *
   204	   * @return array
   205	   *   Array of indexed resources.
   206	   */
   207	  protected function indexResources() {
   208	    $resources = [];
   209	    $node_storage = $this->entityTypeManager->getStorage('node');
   210	
   211	    // Load all published resource nodes.
   212	    $nids = $node_storage->getQuery()
   213	      ->condition('type', 'resource')
   214	      ->condition('status', 1)
   215	      ->accessCheck(TRUE)
   216	      ->execute();
   217	
   218	    $nodes = $node_storage->loadMultiple($nids);
   219	
   220	    foreach ($nodes as $node) {
   221	      $resource = [
   222	        'id' => $node->id(),
   223	        'title' => $node->getTitle(),
   224	        'title_lower' => strtolower($node->getTitle()),
   225	        'url' => $node->toUrl()->toString(),
   226	        'topics' => [],
   227	        'topic_names' => [],
   228	        'service_areas' => [],
   229	        'type' => $this->determineResourceType($node),
   230	        'has_file' => FALSE,
   231	        'has_link' => FALSE,
   232	        'description' => '',
   233	      ];
   234	
   235	      // Get topics.
   236	      if ($node->hasField('field_topics') && !$node->get('field_topics')->isEmpty()) {
   237	        foreach ($node->get('field_topics')->referencedEntities() as $topic) {
   238	          $resource['topics'][] = $topic->id();
   239	          $resource['topic_names'][] = strtolower($topic->getName());
   240	        }
   241	      }
   242	
   243	      // Get service areas.
   244	      if ($node->hasField('field_service_areas') && !$node->get('field_service_areas')->isEmpty()) {
   245	        foreach ($node->get('field_service_areas')->referencedEntities() as $area) {
   246	          $resource['service_areas'][] = [
   247	            'id' => $area->id(),
   248	            'name' => $area->getName(),
   249	          ];
   250	        }
   251	      }
   252	
   253	      // Check for file attachment.
   254	      if ($node->hasField('field_file') && !$node->get('field_file')->isEmpty()) {
   255	        $resource['has_file'] = TRUE;
   256	      }
   257	
   258	      // Check for external link.
   259	      if ($node->hasField('field_link') && !$node->get('field_link')->isEmpty()) {
   260	        $resource['has_link'] = TRUE;
   261	      }
   262	
   263	      // Get description/body if available.
   264	      if ($node->hasField('field_main_content') && !$node->get('field_main_content')->isEmpty()) {
   265	        $body = $node->get('field_main_content')->value;
   266	        $resource['description'] = $this->cleanDescription(strip_tags($body), $node->getTitle());
   267	      }
   268	
   269	      // Build search keywords.
   270	      $resource['keywords'] = $this->extractKeywords(
   271	        $node->getTitle() . ' ' . implode(' ', $resource['topic_names']) . ' ' . $resource['description']
   272	      );
   273	
   274	      $resources[$node->id()] = $resource;
   275	    }
   276	
   277	    return $resources;
   278	  }
   279	
   280	  /**
   281	   * Determines the type of resource (form, guide, or general).
   282	   *
   283	   * @param \Drupal\node\NodeInterface $node
   284	   *   The node entity.
   285	   *
   286	   * @return string
   287	   *   The resource type: 'form', 'guide', or 'resource'.
   288	   */
   289	  protected function determineResourceType($node) {
   290	    $title = strtolower($node->getTitle());
   291	
   292	    // Check for form indicators.
   293	    $form_keywords = ['form', 'application', 'worksheet', 'checklist', 'fillable'];
   294	    foreach ($form_keywords as $keyword) {
   295	      if (strpos($title, $keyword) !== FALSE) {
   296	        return 'form';
   297	      }
   298	    }
   299	
   300	    // Check for guide indicators.
   301	    $guide_keywords = ['guide', 'how to', 'instructions', 'manual', 'handbook', 'step-by-step'];
   302	    foreach ($guide_keywords as $keyword) {
   303	      if (strpos($title, $keyword) !== FALSE) {
   304	        return 'guide';
   305	      }
   306	    }
   307	
   308	    return 'resource';
   309	  }
   310	
   311	  /**
   312	   * Extracts keywords from text.
   313	   *
   314	   * @param string $text
   315	   *   The text to extract keywords from.
   316	   *
   317	   * @return array
   318	   *   Array of lowercase keywords.
   319	   */
   320	  protected function extractKeywords(string $text) {
   321	    $text = strtolower($text);
   322	    $text = preg_replace('/[^\w\s]/', ' ', $text);
   323	    $words = preg_split('/\s+/', $text);
   324	
   325	    $stop_words = [
   326	      'a', 'an', 'the', 'and', 'or', 'of', 'to', 'in', 'for', 'on', 'with',
   327	      'is', 'are', 'this', 'that', 'your', 'our', 'how', 'what',
   328	    ];
   329	
   330	    return array_filter($words, function ($word) use ($stop_words) {
   331	      return strlen($word) >= 3 && !in_array($word, $stop_words);
   332	    });
   333	  }
   334	
   335	  /**
   336	   * Finds forms matching a query.
   337	   *
   338	   * @param string $query
   339	   *   The search query.
   340	   * @param int $limit
   341	   *   Maximum results to return.
   342	   *
   343	   * @return array
   344	   *   Array of matching forms.
   345	   */
   346	  public function findForms(string $query, int $limit = 3) {
   347	    return $this->findByType($query, 'form', $limit);
   348	  }
   349	
   350	  /**
   351	   * Finds guides matching a query.
   352	   *
   353	   * @param string $query
   354	   *   The search query.
   355	   * @param int $limit
   356	   *   Maximum results to return.
   357	   *
   358	   * @return array
   359	   *   Array of matching guides.
   360	   */
   361	  public function findGuides(string $query, int $limit = 3) {
   362	    return $this->findByType($query, 'guide', $limit);
   363	  }
   364	
   365	  /**
   366	   * Finds resources matching a query (all types).
   367	   *
   368	   * @param string $query
   369	   *   The search query.
   370	   * @param int $limit
   371	   *   Maximum results to return.
   372	   *
   373	   * @return array
   374	   *   Array of matching resources.
   375	   */
   376	  public function findResources(string $query, int $limit = 3) {
   377	    return $this->findByType($query, NULL, $limit);
   378	  }
   379	
   380	  /**
   381	   * Finds resources by type and query.
   382	   *
   383	   * @param string $query
   384	   *   The search query.
   385	   * @param string|null $type
   386	   *   The resource type filter (form, guide, or NULL for all).
   387	   * @param int $limit
   388	   *   Maximum results to return.
   389	   *
   390	   * @return array
   391	   *   Array of matching resources.
   392	   */
   393	  protected function findByType(string $query, ?string $type, int $limit) {
   394	    $cache_key = $this->buildQueryCacheKey($query, $type, $limit);
   395	    if ($cache_key) {
   396	      $cached = $this->cache->get($cache_key);
   397	      if ($cached) {
   398	        return $cached->data;
   399	      }
   400	    }
   401	
   402	    $index = $this->getIndex();
   403	
   404	    // Use Search API if available.
   405	    if ($index && $index->status()) {
   406	      $results = $this->findByTypeSearchApi($query, $type, $limit);
   407	      if ($cache_key) {
   408	        $this->cache->set($cache_key, $results, time() + self::QUERY_CACHE_TTL, [
   409	          'node_list',
   410	          'config:ilas_site_assistant.settings',
   411	        ]);
   412	      }
   413	      return $results;
   414	    }
   415	
   416	    // Fall back to legacy method.
   417	    $results = $this->findByTypeLegacy($query, $type, $limit);
   418	    if ($cache_key) {
   419	      $this->cache->set($cache_key, $results, time() + self::QUERY_CACHE_TTL, [
   420	        'node_list',
   421	        'config:ilas_site_assistant.settings',
   422	      ]);
   423	    }
   424	    return $results;
   425	  }
   426	
   427	  /**
   428	   * Builds a cache key for memoizing resource queries without storing PII.
   429	   */
   430	  protected function buildQueryCacheKey(string $query, ?string $type, int $limit): ?string {
   431	    $sanitized = PiiRedactor::redactForStorage($query, 120);
   432	    if ($sanitized === '') {
   433	      return NULL;
   434	    }
   435	    $langcode = $this->getCurrentLanguage();
   436	    $type_token = $type ?: 'all';
   437	    $hash = hash('sha256', $sanitized . '|' . $type_token . '|' . $limit . '|' . $langcode);
   438	    return 'resources.search:' . $hash;
   439	  }
   440	
   441	  /**
   442	   * Finds resources using Search API.
   443	   *
   444	   * @param string $query
   445	   *   The search query.
   446	   * @param string|null $type
   447	   *   The resource type filter (form, guide, or NULL for all).
   448	   * @param int $limit
   449	   *   Maximum results to return.
   450	   *
   451	   * @return array
   452	   *   Array of matching resources.
   453	   */
   454	  protected function findByTypeSearchApi(string $query, ?string $type, int $limit) {
   455	    $index = $this->getIndex();
   456	    $using_dedicated = ($index->id() === self::INDEX_ID);
   457	
   458	    try {
   459	      $search_query = $index->query();
   460	      $search_query->keys($query);
   461	
   462	      // Only filter by content type when using the generic content index.
   463	      // The dedicated assistant_resources index only contains resource nodes.
   464	      if (!$using_dedicated) {
   465	        $search_query->addCondition('type', 'resource');
   466	      }
   467	
   468	      // Filter by current language to avoid duplicate results for translations.
   469	      $langcode = $this->getCurrentLanguage();
   470	      $search_query->addCondition('search_api_language', $langcode);
   471	
   472	      // Retrieve more results than limit to allow for type filtering.
   473	      $fetch_limit = $type ? $limit * 3 : $limit;
   474	      $search_query->range(0, $fetch_limit);
   475	
   476	      $results = $search_query->execute();
   477	      $items = [];
   478	
   479	      // Extract keywords from query for relevance filtering.
   480	      // Only needed for the generic index which may return boilerplate matches.
   481	      $query_keywords = $using_dedicated ? [] : $this->extractKeywords($query);
   482	
   483	      foreach ($results->getResultItems() as $result_item) {
   484	        try {
   485	          $node = $result_item->getOriginalObject()->getValue();
   486	
   487	          if (!$node) {
   488	            continue;
   489	          }
   490	
   491	          // Determine resource type from title.
   492	          $resource_type = $this->determineResourceType($node);
   493	
   494	          // Filter by type if specified.
   495	          if ($type !== NULL && $resource_type !== $type) {
   496	            continue;
   497	          }
   498	
   499	          $item = $this->buildResourceItem($node);
   500	          $item['type'] = $resource_type;
   501	          $item['score'] = $result_item->getScore() ?? 0;
   502	
   503	          // Relevance check: only needed for the generic content index to
   504	          // filter out false positives from boilerplate/footer content.
   505	          // The dedicated index only indexes relevant fields (title, body,
   506	          // topics, service areas) so its scores are trustworthy.
   507	          if (!$using_dedicated && !empty($query_keywords) && !$this->hasRelevantMatch($item, $query_keywords)) {
   508	            continue;
   509	          }
   510	
   511	          $items[] = $item;
   512	
   513	          // Stop if we have enough results.
   514	          if (count($items) >= $limit) {
   515	            break;
   516	          }
   517	        }
   518	        catch (\Exception $e) {
   519	          continue;
   520	        }
   521	      }
   522	
   523	      // If Search API returned few results, try topic-based boost.
   524	      if (count($items) < $limit) {
   525	        $topic = $this->topicResolver->resolveFromText($query);
   526	        if ($topic) {
   527	          $topic_results = $this->findByTopic($topic['id'], $limit - count($items));
   528	          foreach ($topic_results as $topic_item) {
   529	            // Avoid duplicates.
   530	            $exists = FALSE;
   531	            foreach ($items as $item) {
   532	              if ($item['id'] == $topic_item['id']) {
   533	                $exists = TRUE;
   534	                break;
   535	              }
   536	            }
   537	            if (!$exists && ($type === NULL || $topic_item['type'] === $type)) {
   538	              $items[] = $topic_item;
   539	            }
   540	          }
   541	        }
   542	      }
   543	
   544	      // Supplement with vector search if still sparse.
   545	      $items = $this->supplementWithVectorResults($items, $query, $type, $limit);
   546	
   547	      return $items;
   548	    }
   549	    catch (\Exception $e) {
   550	      \Drupal::logger('ilas_site_assistant')->warning('Search API query failed: @message', [
   551	        '@message' => $e->getMessage(),
   552	      ]);
   553	      return $this->findByTypeLegacy($query, $type, $limit);
   554	    }
   555	  }
   556	
   557	  /**
   558	   * Builds a resource item from a node entity.
   559	   *
   560	   * @param \Drupal\node\NodeInterface $node
   561	   *   The node entity.
   562	   *
   563	   * @return array
   564	   *   The resource item data.
   565	   */
   566	  protected function buildResourceItem($node) {
   567	    $item = [
   568	      'id' => $node->id(),
   569	      'title' => $node->getTitle(),
   570	      'url' => $node->toUrl()->toString(),
   571	      'type' => 'resource',
   572	      'has_file' => FALSE,
   573	      'has_link' => FALSE,
   574	      'description' => '',
   575	      'topics' => [],
   576	    ];
   577	
   578	    // Get topics.
   579	    if ($node->hasField('field_topics') && !$node->get('field_topics')->isEmpty()) {
   580	      foreach ($node->get('field_topics')->referencedEntities() as $topic) {
   581	        $item['topics'][] = strtolower($topic->getName());
   582	      }
   583	    }
   584	
   585	    // Check for file attachment.
   586	    if ($node->hasField('field_file') && !$node->get('field_file')->isEmpty()) {
   587	      $item['has_file'] = TRUE;
   588	    }
   589	
   590	    // Check for external link.
   591	    if ($node->hasField('field_link') && !$node->get('field_link')->isEmpty()) {
   592	      $item['has_link'] = TRUE;
   593	    }
   594	
   595	    // Get description/body if available.
   596	    if ($node->hasField('field_main_content') && !$node->get('field_main_content')->isEmpty()) {
   597	      $body = $node->get('field_main_content')->value;
   598	      $item['description'] = $this->cleanDescription(strip_tags($body), $node->getTitle());
   599	    }
   600	
   601	    $item['source'] = 'lexical';
   602	
   603	    return $item;
   604	  }
   605	
   606	  /**
   607	   * Checks if a result item has a relevant match in title or description.
   608	   *
   609	   * This filters out false positives where the search term only matched
   610	   * in boilerplate content (footer, sidebar, etc.) but not in the actual
   611	   * page content.
   612	   *
   613	   * @param array $item
   614	   *   The resource item.
   615	   * @param array $keywords
   616	   *   Keywords extracted from the search query.
   617	   *
   618	   * @return bool
   619	   *   TRUE if at least one keyword appears in title or description.
   620	   */
   621	  protected function hasRelevantMatch(array $item, array $keywords) {
   622	    $title_lower = strtolower($item['title'] ?? '');
   623	    $description_lower = strtolower($item['description'] ?? '');
   624	    $topics_str = strtolower(implode(' ', $item['topics'] ?? []));
   625	
   626	    foreach ($keywords as $keyword) {
   627	      // Check title (most important).
   628	      if (strpos($title_lower, $keyword) !== FALSE) {
   629	        return TRUE;
   630	      }
   631	      // Check description.
   632	      if (strpos($description_lower, $keyword) !== FALSE) {
   633	        return TRUE;
   634	      }
   635	      // Check topics.
   636	      if (strpos($topics_str, $keyword) !== FALSE) {
   637	        return TRUE;
   638	      }
   639	    }
   640	
   641	    return FALSE;
   642	  }
   643	
   644	  // =========================================================================
   645	  // Vector search methods (Pinecone fallback enrichment)
   646	  // =========================================================================
   647	
   648	  /**
   649	   * Gets the vector search configuration.
   650	   *
   651	   * @return array
   652	   *   Vector search config with keys: enabled, resource_index_id,
   653	   *   fallback_threshold, min_vector_score, score_normalization_factor,
   654	   *   min_lexical_score.
   655	   */
   656	  protected function getVectorSearchConfig(): array {
   657	    if (!$this->configFactory) {
   658	      return ['enabled' => FALSE];
   659	    }
   660	    $config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   661	    return $config->get('vector_search') ?? ['enabled' => FALSE];
   662	  }
   663	
   664	  /**
   665	   * Validates that a vector index uses cosine similarity metric.
   666	   *
   667	   * Our score thresholds (min_vector_score) and normalization assume cosine
   668	   * similarity scores in the 0-1 range. Other metrics (euclidean, dotproduct)
   669	   * have different score ranges and semantics that would break scoring logic.
   670	   *
   671	   * @param \Drupal\search_api\Entity\Index $vector_index
   672	   *   The Search API vector index to validate.
   673	   *
   674	   * @return bool
   675	   *   TRUE if the index uses cosine similarity, FALSE otherwise.
   676	   */
   677	  protected function validateVectorMetric($vector_index): bool {
   678	    try {
   679	      $server = $vector_index->getServerInstance();
   680	      if (!$server) {
   681	        return FALSE;
   682	      }
   683	      $backend_config = $server->getBackendConfig();
   684	      $metric = $backend_config['database_settings']['metric'] ?? '';
   685	      if ($metric !== 'cosine_similarity') {
   686	        \Drupal::logger('ilas_site_assistant')->warning(
   687	          'Vector search metric mismatch: expected cosine_similarity, got @metric.',
   688	          ['@metric' => $metric]
   689	        );
   690	        return FALSE;
   691	      }
   692	      return TRUE;
   693	    }
   694	    catch (\Exception $e) {
   695	      \Drupal::logger('ilas_site_assistant')->warning(
   696	        'Could not validate vector search metric: @message',
   697	        ['@message' => $e->getMessage()]
   698	      );
   699	      return FALSE;
   700	    }
   701	  }
   702	
   703	  /**
   704	   * Supplements lexical results with vector search when results are sparse.
   705	   *
   706	   * Only fires when vector search is enabled and lexical results are below
   707	   * the fallback threshold. Merges by node ID, keeping the higher-scored
   708	   * version of any duplicate.
   709	   *
   710	   * @param array $lexical_items
   711	   *   Results from lexical search.
   712	   * @param string $query
   713	   *   The original search query.
   714	   * @param string|null $type
   715	   *   Optional resource type filter.
   716	   * @param int $limit
   717	   *   Maximum total results to return.
   718	   *
   719	   * @return array
   720	   *   Merged results, limited to $limit.
   721	   */
   722	  protected function supplementWithVectorResults(array $lexical_items, string $query, ?string $type, int $limit): array {
   723	    $vector_config = $this->getVectorSearchConfig();
   724	
   725	    if (empty($vector_config['enabled'])) {
   726	      return $lexical_items;
   727	    }
   728	
   729	    $threshold = $vector_config['fallback_threshold'] ?? 2;
   730	    $min_lexical_score = $vector_config['min_lexical_score'] ?? 0;
   731	
   732	    // Fire vector search when lexical results are sparse (count-based) OR
   733	    // when all lexical results score below the quality threshold.
   734	    $has_enough_results = count($lexical_items) >= $threshold;
   735	    $has_quality_results = TRUE;
   736	    if ($min_lexical_score > 0 && !empty($lexical_items)) {
   737	      $best_score = max(array_column($lexical_items, 'score') ?: [0]);
   738	      $has_quality_results = $best_score >= $min_lexical_score;
   739	    }
   740	
   741	    if ($has_enough_results && $has_quality_results) {
   742	      return $lexical_items;
   743	    }
   744	
   745	    $vector_items = $this->findByTypeVector($query, $type, $limit);
   746	
   747	    if (empty($vector_items)) {
   748	      return $lexical_items;
   749	    }
   750	
   751	    // Build a map of existing items keyed by node ID.
   752	    $merged = [];
   753	    foreach ($lexical_items as $item) {
   754	      $merged[$item['id']] = $item;
   755	    }
   756	
   757	    // Merge vector items, keeping higher-scored version for duplicates.
   758	    foreach ($vector_items as $item) {
   759	      if (!isset($merged[$item['id']])) {
   760	        $merged[$item['id']] = $item;
   761	      }
   762	      elseif (($item['score'] ?? 0) > ($merged[$item['id']]['score'] ?? 0)) {
   763	        $merged[$item['id']] = $item;
   764	      }
   765	    }
   766	
   767	    // Sort by score descending and limit.
   768	    $results = array_values($merged);
   769	    usort($results, function ($a, $b) {
   770	      return ($b['score'] ?? 0) <=> ($a['score'] ?? 0);
   771	    });
   772	
   773	    return array_slice($results, 0, $limit);
   774	  }
   775	
   776	  /**
   777	   * Searches resources using the vector (Pinecone) index.
   778	   *
   779	   * @param string $query
   780	   *   The search query.
   781	   * @param string|null $type
   782	   *   Optional resource type filter (form, guide, or NULL for all).
   783	   * @param int $limit
   784	   *   Maximum results to return.
   785	   *
   786	   * @return array
   787	   *   Array of matching resource items with normalized scores.
   788	   */
   789	  protected function findByTypeVector(string $query, ?string $type, int $limit): array {
   790	    if (time() < static::$vectorBackoffUntil) {
   791	      return [];
   792	    }
   793	
   794	    $vector_config = $this->getVectorSearchConfig();
   795	    $index_id = $vector_config['resource_index_id'] ?? 'assistant_resources_vector';
   796	    $min_score = $vector_config['min_vector_score'] ?? 0.70;
   797	    $normalization = $vector_config['score_normalization_factor'] ?? 100;
   798	
   799	    try {
   800	      $vector_index = Index::load($index_id);
   801	      if (!$vector_index || !$vector_index->status()) {
   802	        return [];
   803	      }
   804	
   805	      // Validate that the index uses cosine similarity metric.
   806	      if (!$this->validateVectorMetric($vector_index)) {
   807	        return [];
   808	      }
   809	
   810	      $search_query = $vector_index->query();
   811	      $search_query->keys($query);
   812	
   813	      // Fetch extra results to allow for type filtering.
   814	      $fetch_limit = $type ? $limit * 3 : $limit;
   815	      $search_query->range(0, $fetch_limit);
   816	
   817	      // Filter by current language.
   818	      $langcode = $this->getCurrentLanguage();
   819	      $search_query->addCondition('search_api_language', $langcode);
   820	
   821	      $start_time = microtime(TRUE);
   822	      $results = $search_query->execute();
   823	      $elapsed_ms = round((microtime(TRUE) - $start_time) * 1000);
   824	
   825	      if ($elapsed_ms > self::MAX_VECTOR_MS) {
   826	        static::$vectorBackoffUntil = time() + self::VECTOR_BACKOFF_SECONDS;
   827	        \Drupal::logger('ilas_site_assistant')->warning(
   828	          'Vector resource search exceeded @ms ms (threshold @thresh). Entering backoff.',
   829	          ['@ms' => $elapsed_ms, '@thresh' => self::MAX_VECTOR_MS]
   830	        );
   831	      }
   832	
   833	      $items = [];
   834	
   835	      foreach ($results->getResultItems() as $result_item) {
   836	        try {
   837	          // Get the raw cosine similarity score (0-1).
   838	          $raw_score = $result_item->getScore() ?? 0;
   839	
   840	          // Skip results below the minimum vector score threshold.
   841	          if ($raw_score < $min_score) {
   842	            continue;
   843	          }
   844	
   845	          $node = $result_item->getOriginalObject()->getValue();
   846	          if (!$node) {
   847	            continue;
   848	          }
   849	
   850	          // Filter by resource type if specified.
   851	          $resource_type = $this->determineResourceType($node);
   852	          if ($type !== NULL && $resource_type !== $type) {
   853	            continue;
   854	          }
   855	
   856	          $item = $this->buildResourceItem($node);
   857	          $item['type'] = $resource_type;
   858	          // Normalize vector score to be comparable with lexical scores.
   859	          $item['score'] = $raw_score * $normalization;
   860	          $item['vector_score'] = $raw_score;
   861	          $item['source'] = 'vector';
   862	          $items[] = $item;
   863	
   864	          if (count($items) >= $limit) {
   865	            break;
   866	          }
   867	        }
   868	        catch (\Exception $e) {
   869	          continue;
   870	        }
   871	      }
   872	
   873	      if (!empty($items)) {
   874	        \Drupal::logger('ilas_site_assistant')->info('Vector resource search returned @count results (@ms ms) for query "@query"', [
   875	          '@count' => count($items),
   876	          '@ms' => $elapsed_ms,
   877	          '@query' => PiiRedactor::redactForLog($query),
   878	        ]);
   879	      }
   880	
   881	      return $items;
   882	    }
   883	    catch (\Exception $e) {
   884	      $exception_class = get_class($e);
   885	      $level = 'error';
   886	      $category = 'unexpected';
   887	
   888	      if ($e instanceof \Drupal\search_api\SearchApiException) {
   889	        $category = 'search_api';
   890	        $level = 'warning';
   891	      }
   892	      elseif (str_contains($exception_class, 'GuzzleHttp') || str_contains($exception_class, 'ConnectException')) {
   893	        $category = 'http_transport';
   894	        $level = 'warning';
   895	      }
   896	      elseif (str_contains($e->getMessage(), 'not found') || str_contains($e->getMessage(), 'does not exist')) {
   897	        $category = 'index_not_found';
   898	      }
   899	
   900	      static::$vectorBackoffUntil = time() + self::VECTOR_BACKOFF_SECONDS;
   901	      \Drupal::logger('ilas_site_assistant')->log($level,
   902	        'Vector resource search failed [@category]: @class - @message (backing off @seconds s)', [
   903	          '@category' => $category,
   904	          '@class' => $exception_class,
   905	          '@message' => $e->getMessage(),
   906	          '@seconds' => self::VECTOR_BACKOFF_SECONDS,
   907	        ]
   908	      );
   909	      return [];
   910	    }
   911	  }
   912	
   913	  /**
   914	   * Finds resources using legacy method (direct entity query).
   915	   *
   916	   * @param string $query
   917	   *   The search query.
   918	   * @param string|null $type
   919	   *   The resource type filter.
   920	   * @param int $limit
   921	   *   Maximum results.
   922	   *
   923	   * @return array
   924	   *   Array of matching resources.
   925	   */
   926	  protected function findByTypeLegacy(string $query, ?string $type, int $limit) {
   927	    $resources = $this->getAllResources();
   928	
   929	    // Use enhanced ranking if available.
   930	    if ($this->rankingEnhancer) {
   931	      // Convert to format expected by ranking enhancer.
   932	      $items = [];
   933	      foreach ($resources as $resource) {
   934	        $items[] = [
   935	          'id' => $resource['id'],
   936	          'title' => $resource['title'],
   937	          'url' => $resource['url'],
   938	          'type' => $resource['type'],
   939	          'description' => $resource['description'],
   940	          'has_file' => $resource['has_file'],
   941	          'has_link' => $resource['has_link'],
   942	          'topics' => $resource['topic_names'],
   943	        ];
   944	      }
   945	      return $this->rankingEnhancer->scoreResourceResults($items, $query, $type, $limit);
   946	    }
   947	
   948	    // Fallback to basic ranking.
   949	    $query_lower = strtolower($query);
   950	    $query_keywords = $this->extractKeywords($query);
   951	
   952	    // Also try to resolve topic from query.
   953	    $topic = $this->topicResolver->resolveFromText($query);
   954	    $topic_id = $topic ? $topic['id'] : NULL;
   955	
   956	    $results = [];
   957	
   958	    foreach ($resources as $resource) {
   959	      // Filter by type if specified.
   960	      if ($type !== NULL && $resource['type'] !== $type) {
   961	        continue;
   962	      }
   963	
   964	      $score = 0;
   965	
   966	      // Exact topic match (highest weight).
   967	      if ($topic_id && in_array($topic_id, $resource['topics'])) {
   968	        $score += 10;
   969	      }
   970	
   971	      // Title substring match.
   972	      if (strpos($resource['title_lower'], $query_lower) !== FALSE) {
   973	        $score += 8;
   974	      }
   975	
   976	      // Topic name match.
   977	      foreach ($resource['topic_names'] as $topic_name) {
   978	        if (strpos($query_lower, $topic_name) !== FALSE || strpos($topic_name, $query_lower) !== FALSE) {
   979	          $score += 5;
   980	        }
   981	      }
   982	
   983	      // Keyword overlap.
   984	      $overlap = array_intersect($query_keywords, $resource['keywords']);
   985	      $score += count($overlap) * 2;
   986	
   987	      if ($score > 0) {
   988	        $results[] = [
   989	          'id' => $resource['id'],
   990	          'title' => $resource['title'],
   991	          'url' => $resource['url'],
   992	          'type' => $resource['type'],
   993	          'description' => $resource['description'],
   994	          'has_file' => $resource['has_file'],
   995	          'has_link' => $resource['has_link'],
   996	          'topics' => $resource['topic_names'],
   997	          'score' => $score,
   998	          'source' => 'lexical',
   999	        ];
  1000	      }
  1001	    }
  1002	
  1003	    // Sort by score descending.
  1004	    usort($results, function ($a, $b) {
  1005	      return $b['score'] - $a['score'];
  1006	    });
  1007	
  1008	    return array_slice($results, 0, $limit);
  1009	  }
  1010	
  1011	  /**
  1012	   * Finds resources by topic ID.
  1013	   *
  1014	   * @param int $topic_id
  1015	   *   The topic term ID.
  1016	   * @param int $limit
  1017	   *   Maximum results to return.
  1018	   *
  1019	   * @return array
  1020	   *   Array of matching resources.
  1021	   */
  1022	  public function findByTopic(int $topic_id, int $limit = 5) {
  1023	    $resources = $this->getAllResources();
  1024	    $results = [];
  1025	
  1026	    foreach ($resources as $resource) {
  1027	      if (in_array($topic_id, $resource['topics'])) {
  1028	        $results[] = [
  1029	          'id' => $resource['id'],
  1030	          'title' => $resource['title'],
  1031	          'url' => $resource['url'],
  1032	          'type' => $resource['type'],
  1033	          'description' => $resource['description'],
  1034	          'has_file' => $resource['has_file'],
  1035	          'has_link' => $resource['has_link'],
  1036	          'source' => 'lexical',
  1037	        ];
  1038	      }
  1039	    }
  1040	
  1041	    return array_slice($results, 0, $limit);
  1042	  }
  1043	
  1044	  /**
  1045	   * Finds resources by service area.
  1046	   *
  1047	   * @param int $service_area_id
  1048	   *   The service area term ID.
  1049	   * @param int $limit
  1050	   *   Maximum results to return.
  1051	   *
  1052	   * @return array
  1053	   *   Array of matching resources.
  1054	   */
  1055	  public function findByServiceArea(int $service_area_id, int $limit = 5) {
  1056	    $resources = $this->getAllResources();
  1057	    $results = [];
  1058	
  1059	    foreach ($resources as $resource) {
  1060	      foreach ($resource['service_areas'] as $area) {
  1061	        if ($area['id'] == $service_area_id) {
  1062	          $results[] = [
  1063	            'id' => $resource['id'],
  1064	            'title' => $resource['title'],
  1065	            'url' => $resource['url'],
  1066	            'type' => $resource['type'],
  1067	            'description' => $resource['description'],
  1068	            'source' => 'lexical',
  1069	          ];
  1070	          break;
  1071	        }
  1072	      }
  1073	    }
  1074	
  1075	    return array_slice($results, 0, $limit);
  1076	  }
  1077	
  1078	  /**
  1079	   * Cleans a description string for display as a resource summary.
  1080	   *
  1081	   * Strips boilerplate phrases, removes title duplication, normalizes
  1082	   * whitespace, and caps at 240 characters ending on a word boundary.
  1083	   *
  1084	   * @param string $raw_text
  1085	   *   The raw body text (already stripped of HTML tags).
  1086	   * @param string $title
  1087	   *   The resource title (used to avoid duplication).
  1088	   *
  1089	   * @return string
  1090	   *   Cleaned description suitable for display.
  1091	   */
  1092	  protected function cleanDescription(string $raw_text, string $title = ''): string {
  1093	    // Decode HTML entities left behind by strip_tags() (e.g. &nbsp; -> U+00A0).
  1094	    $text = html_entity_decode($raw_text, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8');
  1095	    // Replace non-breaking spaces (U+00A0) with normal spaces.
  1096	    $text = str_replace("\xC2\xA0", ' ', $text);
  1097	    // Normalize whitespace (collapse newlines, tabs, multiple spaces).
  1098	    $text = preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', trim($text));
  1099	
  1100	    if (empty($text)) {
  1101	      return '';
  1102	    }
  1103	
  1104	    // Remove common navigation/boilerplate phrases that appear at the start.
  1105	    $boilerplate_patterns = [
  1106	      '/^(Home\s*[>»›|\/]\s*)+/i',
  1107	      '/^(Skip to (main )?content\.?\s*)/i',
  1108	      '/^(You are here:?\s*)/i',
  1109	      '/^(Breadcrumb\s*)/i',
  1110	      '/^(Main navigation\s*)/i',
  1111	      '/^(Idaho Legal Aid Services?\s*[>»›|\/]?\s*)/i',
  1112	      '/^(ILAS\s*[>»›|\/]?\s*)/i',
  1113	    ];
  1114	    foreach ($boilerplate_patterns as $pattern) {
  1115	      $text = preg_replace($pattern, '', $text);
  1116	    }
  1117	
  1118	    // Remove global repeated phrases that appear in many resource bodies.
  1119	    $global_noise = [
  1120	      '/Idaho Legal Aid Services provides free legal help to low-income Idahoans\.?\s*/i',
  1121	      '/This (information|resource|document|form) (is|was) (provided|prepared|created) (by|for) Idaho Legal Aid Services?\.?\s*/i',
  1122	      '/For more information,?\s*(please\s*)?(visit|call|contact).*$/i',
  1123	      '/If you need (legal )?(help|advice|assistance),?\s*(please\s*)?(call|contact|apply|visit).*$/i',
  1124	      '/Disclaimer:.*$/i',
  1125	      '/Note:\s*This is not legal advice\.?\s*/i',
  1126	      '/Last (updated|revised|modified):?\s*\d.*$/i',
  1127	    ];
  1128	    foreach ($global_noise as $pattern) {
  1129	      $text = preg_replace($pattern, '', $text);
  1130	    }
  1131	
  1132	    // Remove leading duplication of the title.
  1133	    if (!empty($title)) {
  1134	      $escaped_title = preg_quote($title, '/');
  1135	      $text = preg_replace('/^\s*' . $escaped_title . '\s*[\.\:\-]?\s*/i', '', $text);
  1136	    }
  1137	
  1138	    $text = trim($text);
  1139	
  1140	    if (empty($text)) {
  1141	      return '';
  1142	    }
  1143	
  1144	    // Cap at 240 characters, breaking at word boundary.
  1145	    if (mb_strlen($text) > 240) {
  1146	      $text = mb_substr($text, 0, 240);
  1147	      // Break at last space to avoid mid-word truncation.
  1148	      $last_space = strrpos($text, ' ');
  1149	      if ($last_space !== FALSE && $last_space > 160) {
  1150	        $text = substr($text, 0, $last_space);
  1151	      }
  1152	      $text = rtrim($text, '.,;:!? ') . '…';
  1153	    }
  1154	
  1155	    return $text;
  1156	  }
  1157	
  1158	  /**
  1159	   * Clears the resource cache.
  1160	   */
  1161	  public function clearCache() {
  1162	    $this->cache->delete(self::CACHE_ID);
  1163	  }
  1164	
  1165	}

===== web/modules/custom/ilas_site_assistant/src/Service/FaqIndex.php =====
     1	<?php
     2	
     3	namespace Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service;
     4	
     5	use Drupal\Core\Entity\EntityTypeManagerInterface;
     6	use Drupal\Core\Cache\CacheBackendInterface;
     7	use Drupal\Core\Config\ConfigFactoryInterface;
     8	use Drupal\Core\Language\LanguageManagerInterface;
     9	use Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service\PiiRedactor;
    10	use Drupal\search_api\Entity\Index;
    11	
    12	/**
    13	 * Service for searching FAQ and accordion content via Search API.
    14	 *
    15	 * Uses the faq_accordion Search API index to provide full-text search
    16	 * with stemming, partial matching, and deep-link URL generation.
    17	 *
    18	 * When vector search is enabled, supplements sparse lexical results with
    19	 * semantic search from a Pinecone-backed vector index.
    20	 */
    21	class FaqIndex {
    22	
    23	  /**
    24	   * Cache TTL for per-query memoization (seconds).
    25	   *
    26	   * Short-lived to avoid serving stale content and keeps DB/cache footprint
    27	   * modest for Pantheon Basic (no Redis/Solr).
    28	   */
    29	  const QUERY_CACHE_TTL = 300;
    30	
    31	  /**
    32	   * Maximum tolerated duration for a vector search call (ms) before we
    33	   * temporarily disable vector queries to protect latency.
    34	   */
    35	  const MAX_VECTOR_MS = 2000;
    36	
    37	  /**
    38	   * Backoff duration after a vector search timeout/failure (seconds).
    39	   */
    40	  const VECTOR_BACKOFF_SECONDS = 120;
    41	
    42	  /**
    43	   * Timestamp (epoch seconds) until which vector search is skipped due to a
    44	   * recent timeout/failure. Static so it applies across instances per request.
    45	   *
    46	   * @var int
    47	   */
    48	  protected static int $vectorBackoffUntil = 0;
    49	
    50	  /**
    51	   * The entity type manager.
    52	   *
    53	   * @var \Drupal\Core\Entity\EntityTypeManagerInterface
    54	   */
    55	  protected $entityTypeManager;
    56	
    57	  /**
    58	   * The cache backend.
    59	   *
    60	   * @var \Drupal\Core\Cache\CacheBackendInterface
    61	   */
    62	  protected $cache;
    63	
    64	  /**
    65	   * The config factory.
    66	   *
    67	   * @var \Drupal\Core\Config\ConfigFactoryInterface
    68	   */
    69	  protected $configFactory;
    70	
    71	  /**
    72	   * The language manager.
    73	   *
    74	   * @var \Drupal\Core\Language\LanguageManagerInterface
    75	   */
    76	  protected $languageManager;
    77	
    78	  /**
    79	   * The ranking enhancer service.
    80	   *
    81	   * @var \Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service\RankingEnhancer
    82	   */
    83	  protected $rankingEnhancer;
    84	
    85	  /**
    86	   * The Search API index.
    87	   *
    88	   * @var \Drupal\search_api\IndexInterface|null
    89	   */
    90	  protected $index;
    91	
    92	  /**
    93	   * Cache ID for parent URL mappings.
    94	   */
    95	  const PARENT_URL_CACHE_ID = 'ilas_site_assistant.parent_urls';
    96	
    97	  /**
    98	   * The Search API index ID.
    99	   */
   100	  const INDEX_ID = 'faq_accordion';
   101	
   102	  /**
   103	   * Constructs a FaqIndex object.
   104	   */
   105	  public function __construct(
   106	    EntityTypeManagerInterface $entity_type_manager,
   107	    CacheBackendInterface $cache,
   108	    ConfigFactoryInterface $config_factory,
   109	    LanguageManagerInterface $language_manager,
   110	    RankingEnhancer $ranking_enhancer = NULL
   111	  ) {
   112	    $this->entityTypeManager = $entity_type_manager;
   113	    $this->cache = $cache;
   114	    $this->configFactory = $config_factory;
   115	    $this->languageManager = $language_manager;
   116	    $this->rankingEnhancer = $ranking_enhancer;
   117	  }
   118	
   119	  /**
   120	   * Gets the current language code.
   121	   *
   122	   * @return string
   123	   *   The current language code (defaults to 'en').
   124	   */
   125	  protected function getCurrentLanguage() {
   126	    return $this->languageManager->getCurrentLanguage()->getId();
   127	  }
   128	
   129	  /**
   130	   * Gets the Search API index.
   131	   *
   132	   * @return \Drupal\search_api\IndexInterface|null
   133	   *   The index or NULL if not available.
   134	   */
   135	  protected function getIndex() {
   136	    if ($this->index === NULL) {
   137	      $this->index = Index::load(self::INDEX_ID);
   138	    }
   139	    return $this->index;
   140	  }
   141	
   142	  /**
   143	   * Checks if Search API index is available and usable.
   144	   *
   145	   * @return bool
   146	   *   TRUE if the index is available.
   147	   */
   148	  public function isIndexAvailable() {
   149	    $index = $this->getIndex();
   150	    return $index && $index->status();
   151	  }
   152	
   153	  /**
   154	   * Searches FAQs and accordions by query.
   155	   *
   156	   * @param string $query
   157	   *   The search query.
   158	   * @param int $limit
   159	   *   Maximum results to return.
   160	   * @param string|null $type
   161	   *   Filter by type: 'faq_item', 'accordion_item', or NULL for all.
   162	   *
   163	   * @return array
   164	   *   Array of matching items with deep-link URLs.
   165	   */
   166	  public function search(string $query, int $limit = 5, ?string $type = NULL) {
   167	    $cache_key = $this->buildQueryCacheKey($query, $limit, $type);
   168	    if ($cache_key) {
   169	      $cached = $this->cache->get($cache_key);
   170	      if ($cached) {
   171	        return $cached->data;
   172	      }
   173	    }
   174	
   175	    $index = $this->getIndex();
   176	
   177	    // Fall back to legacy method if index not available.
   178	    if (!$index || !$index->status()) {
   179	      return $this->searchLegacy($query, $limit);
   180	    }
   181	
   182	    try {
   183	      $search_query = $index->query();
   184	      $search_query->keys($query);
   185	      $search_query->range(0, $limit);
   186	
   187	      // Filter by current language to avoid duplicate results for translations.
   188	      $langcode = $this->getCurrentLanguage();
   189	      $search_query->addCondition('search_api_language', $langcode);
   190	
   191	      // Filter by paragraph type if specified.
   192	      if ($type) {
   193	        $search_query->addCondition('paragraph_type', $type);
   194	      }
   195	
   196	      // Execute search.
   197	      $results = $search_query->execute();
   198	
   199	      $items = [];
   200	      foreach ($results->getResultItems() as $result_item) {
   201	        try {
   202	          $item = $this->buildResultItem($result_item);
   203	          if ($item) {
   204	            $items[] = $item;
   205	          }
   206	        }
   207	        catch (\Exception $e) {
   208	          // Skip items that fail to load.
   209	          continue;
   210	        }
   211	      }
   212	
   213	      // Supplement with vector search if lexical results are sparse.
   214	      $items = $this->supplementWithVectorResults($items, $query, $limit, $type);
   215	
   216	      if ($cache_key) {
   217	        $this->cache->set($cache_key, $items, time() + self::QUERY_CACHE_TTL, [
