   569	      'oos_civil_product_liability' => 'Civil: Product liability',
   570	
   571	      // In scope.
   572	      'in_scope_no_oos_triggers' => 'In scope: No out-of-scope triggers',
   573	    ];
   574	
   575	    return $descriptions[$reason_code] ?? 'Unknown reason code';
   576	  }
   577	
   578	  /**
   579	   * Batch classify multiple messages.
   580	   *
   581	   * @param array $messages
   582	   *   Array of messages to classify.
   583	   *
   584	   * @return array
   585	   *   Array of classification results keyed by original keys.
   586	   */
   587	  public function classifyBatch(array $messages): array {
   588	    $results = [];
   589	    foreach ($messages as $key => $message) {
   590	      $results[$key] = $this->classify($message);
   591	    }
   592	    return $results;
   593	  }
   594	
   595	  /**
   596	   * Gets statistics about classification rules.
   597	   *
   598	   * @return array
   599	   *   Statistics array.
   600	   */
   601	  public function getRuleStatistics(): array {
   602	    $stats = [
   603	      'total_categories' => count($this->rules),
   604	      'total_patterns' => 0,
   605	      'categories' => [],
   606	    ];
   607	
   608	    foreach ($this->rules as $category_key => $rule) {
   609	      $patternCount = count($rule['patterns']);
   610	      $stats['total_patterns'] += $patternCount;
   611	      $stats['categories'][$category_key] = [
   612	        'category' => $rule['category'],
   613	        'response_type' => $rule['response_type'],
   614	        'pattern_count' => $patternCount,
   615	      ];
   616	    }
   617	
   618	    return $stats;
   619	  }
   620	
   621	  /**
   622	   * Gets all reason codes for a category.
   623	   *
   624	   * @param string $category
   625	   *   The category constant.
   626	   *
   627	   * @return array
   628	   *   Array of reason codes.
   629	   */
   630	  public function getReasonCodesForCategory(string $category): array {
   631	    $codes = [];
   632	    foreach ($this->rules as $rule) {
   633	      if ($rule['category'] === $category) {
   634	        $codes = array_merge($codes, array_values($rule['patterns']));
   635	      }
   636	    }
   637	    return $codes;
   638	  }
   639	
   640	}

===== web/modules/custom/ilas_site_assistant/src/Service/TurnClassifier.php =====
     1	<?php
     2	
     3	namespace Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service;
     4	
     5	/**
     6	 * Classifies conversation turns as NEW, FOLLOW_UP, INVENTORY, or RESET.
     7	 *
     8	 * Pure-PHP static utility with no Drupal dependencies. Called before intent
     9	 * routing to determine turn type, enabling proactive context propagation
    10	 * and inventory routing without waiting for routing to fail.
    11	 */
    12	class TurnClassifier {
    13	
    14	  /**
    15	   * Turn type constants.
    16	   */
    17	  const TURN_NEW = 'NEW';
    18	  const TURN_FOLLOW_UP = 'FOLLOW_UP';
    19	  const TURN_INVENTORY = 'INVENTORY';
    20	  const TURN_RESET = 'RESET';
    21	
    22	  /**
    23	   * Maximum seconds since last history entry for follow-up detection.
    24	   */
    25	  const FOLLOW_UP_TIME_WINDOW = 600;
    26	
    27	  /**
    28	   * Maximum word count for short-message follow-up heuristic.
    29	   */
    30	  const SHORT_MESSAGE_MAX_WORDS = 4;
    31	
    32	  /**
    33	   * Anaphoric reference patterns that signal a follow-up.
    34	   *
    35	   * These pronouns/phrases reference a prior response without naming
    36	   * the topic explicitly.
    37	   */
    38	  const ANAPHORIC_PATTERNS = [
    39	    'that',
    40	    'those',
    41	    'this',
    42	    'these',
    43	    'it',
    44	    'them',
    45	    'more about',
    46	    'tell me more',
    47	    'more info',
    48	    'more information',
    49	    'more details',
    50	    'what about',
    51	    'how about',
    52	    'can you explain',
    53	    'explain that',
    54	    'go on',
    55	    'continue',
    56	    'and also',
    57	    'what else',
    58	    'anything else',
    59	    // Spanish.
    60	    'eso',
    61	    'esto',
    62	    'esos',
    63	    'mas sobre',
    64	    'dime mas',
    65	    'mas informacion',
    66	    'que mas',
    67	  ];
    68	
    69	  /**
    70	   * Inventory patterns — catalog/browse requests (EN + ES).
    71	   *
    72	   * Matched case-insensitively against the full message.
    73	   */
    74	  const INVENTORY_PATTERNS = [
    75	    // Forms inventory.
    76	    '/\b(?:what|which)\s+forms?\s+(?:do\s+you\s+have|are\s+available|exist|are\s+there)\b/i',
    77	    '/\b(?:show|list|give)\s+(?:me\s+)?(?:all|every|the)\s+forms?\b/i',
    78	    '/\ball\s+(?:the\s+)?(?:available\s+)?forms?\b/i',
    79	    '/\blist\s+(?:of\s+)?forms?\b/i',
    80	    // Guides inventory.
    81	    '/\b(?:what|which)\s+guides?\s+(?:do\s+you\s+have|are\s+available|exist|are\s+there)\b/i',
    82	    '/\b(?:show|list|give)\s+(?:me\s+)?(?:all|every|the)\s+guides?\b/i',
    83	    '/\ball\s+(?:the\s+)?(?:available\s+)?guides?\b/i',
    84	    '/\blist\s+(?:of\s+)?guides?\b/i',
    85	    // Services inventory.
    86	    '/\b(?:what|which)\s+services?\s+(?:do\s+you\s+(?:have|offer|provide)|are\s+available|exist)\b/i',
    87	    '/\b(?:what)\s+(?:can\s+you|do\s+you)\s+help\s+with\b/i',
    88	    '/\b(?:show|list|give)\s+(?:me\s+)?(?:all|every|the)\s+services?\b/i',
    89	    '/\blist\s+everything\b/i',
    90	    '/\bshow\s+me\s+everything\b/i',
    91	    // Spanish patterns.
    92	    '/\b(?:que|cuales)\s+formularios?\s+(?:tienen|hay)\b/i',
    93	    '/\b(?:que|cuales)\s+guias?\s+(?:tienen|hay)\b/i',
    94	    '/\b(?:que|cuales)\s+servicios?\s+(?:tienen|ofrecen)\b/i',
    95	    '/\b(?:mostrar|listar)\s+(?:todos?\s+(?:los?\s+)?)?(?:formularios?|guias?|servicios?)\b/i',
    96	  ];
    97	
    98	  /**
    99	   * Classifies a conversation turn.
   100	   *
   101	   * Priority order:
   102	   * 1. RESET — explicit topic-shift signal (reuses HistoryIntentResolver)
   103	   * 2. INVENTORY — catalog/browse request pattern match
   104	   * 3. FOLLOW_UP — anaphoric reference or short message with recent history
   105	   * 4. NEW — default
   106	   *
   107	   * @param string $message
   108	   *   The current user message.
   109	   * @param array $server_history
   110	   *   Array of history entries with 'timestamp' keys.
   111	   * @param int $now
   112	   *   Current timestamp (injectable for testing).
   113	   *
   114	   * @return string
   115	   *   One of TURN_NEW, TURN_FOLLOW_UP, TURN_INVENTORY, TURN_RESET.
   116	   */
   117	  public static function classifyTurn(string $message, array $server_history, int $now): string {
   118	    // 1. RESET: check for explicit topic-shift signals.
   119	    if (HistoryIntentResolver::detectResetSignal($message)) {
   120	      return self::TURN_RESET;
   121	    }
   122	
   123	    // 2. INVENTORY: check for catalog/browse request patterns.
   124	    if (self::detectInventory($message)) {
   125	      return self::TURN_INVENTORY;
   126	    }
   127	
   128	    // 3. FOLLOW_UP: anaphoric references or short messages with recent history.
   129	    if (self::detectFollowUp($message, $server_history, $now)) {
   130	      return self::TURN_FOLLOW_UP;
   131	    }
   132	
   133	    // 4. Default: NEW turn.
   134	    return self::TURN_NEW;
   135	  }
   136	
   137	  /**
   138	   * Detects if the message is an inventory/catalog request.
   139	   *
   140	   * @param string $message
   141	   *   The user message.
   142	   *
   143	   * @return bool
   144	   *   TRUE if message matches an inventory pattern.
   145	   */
   146	  public static function detectInventory(string $message): bool {
   147	    foreach (self::INVENTORY_PATTERNS as $pattern) {
   148	      if (preg_match($pattern, $message)) {
   149	        return TRUE;
   150	      }
   151	    }
   152	    return FALSE;
   153	  }
   154	
   155	  /**
   156	   * Resolves the inventory subtype from the message.
   157	   *
   158	   * @param string $message
   159	   *   The user message.
   160	   *
   161	   * @return string
   162	   *   One of 'forms_inventory', 'guides_inventory', 'services_inventory'.
   163	   */
   164	  public static function resolveInventoryType(string $message): string {
   165	    $lower = mb_strtolower(trim($message));
   166	
   167	    if (preg_match('/\b(?:guide|guides|guia|guias)\b/', $lower)) {
   168	      return 'guides_inventory';
   169	    }
   170	    if (preg_match('/\b(?:service|services|servicio|servicios|help\s+with)\b/', $lower)) {
   171	      return 'services_inventory';
   172	    }
   173	    // Default to forms inventory (most common catalog request).
   174	    return 'forms_inventory';
   175	  }
   176	
   177	  /**
   178	   * Detects if the message is a follow-up to a prior turn.
   179	   *
   180	   * Two heuristics:
   181	   * 1. Message contains anaphoric reference patterns.
   182	   * 2. Message is short (<= 4 words) AND there is recent history.
   183	   *
   184	   * @param string $message
   185	   *   The user message.
   186	   * @param array $server_history
   187	   *   Array of history entries.
   188	   * @param int $now
   189	   *   Current timestamp.
   190	   *
   191	   * @return bool
   192	   *   TRUE if likely a follow-up.
   193	   */
   194	  public static function detectFollowUp(string $message, array $server_history, int $now): bool {
   195	    // Must have history to follow up on.
   196	    if (empty($server_history)) {
   197	      return FALSE;
   198	    }
   199	
   200	    // Check recency: most recent entry must be within time window.
   201	    $last_entry = end($server_history);
   202	    $last_timestamp = $last_entry['timestamp'] ?? 0;
   203	    if (($now - $last_timestamp) > self::FOLLOW_UP_TIME_WINDOW) {
   204	      return FALSE;
   205	    }
   206	
   207	    // Heuristic 1: anaphoric reference detected.
   208	    if (self::hasAnaphoricReference($message)) {
   209	      return TRUE;
   210	    }
   211	
   212	    // Heuristic 2: short message with recent history.
   213	    $word_count = count(preg_split('/\s+/', trim($message)));
   214	    if ($word_count <= self::SHORT_MESSAGE_MAX_WORDS) {
   215	      return TRUE;
   216	    }
   217	
   218	    return FALSE;
   219	  }
   220	
   221	  /**
   222	   * Checks if the message contains an anaphoric reference.
   223	   *
   224	   * @param string $message
   225	   *   The user message.
   226	   *
   227	   * @return bool
   228	   *   TRUE if an anaphoric pattern is found.
   229	   */
   230	  public static function hasAnaphoricReference(string $message): bool {
   231	    $lower = mb_strtolower(trim($message));
   232	
   233	    foreach (self::ANAPHORIC_PATTERNS as $pattern) {
   234	      // Use word boundary for single words, substring match for multi-word.
   235	      if (str_contains($pattern, ' ')) {
   236	        if (str_contains($lower, $pattern)) {
   237	          return TRUE;
   238	        }
   239	      }
   240	      else {
   241	        // Word boundary match to avoid false positives
   242	        // (e.g., "that" in "bathroom").
   243	        if (preg_match('/\b' . preg_quote($pattern, '/') . '\b/', $lower)) {
   244	          return TRUE;
   245	        }
   246	      }
   247	    }
   248	
   249	    return FALSE;
   250	  }
   251	
   252	}

===== web/modules/custom/ilas_site_assistant/src/Service/IntentRouter.php =====
     1	<?php
     2	
     3	namespace Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service;
     4	
     5	use Drupal\Core\Config\ConfigFactoryInterface;
     6	use Drupal\Core\StringTranslation\StringTranslationTrait;
     7	
     8	/**
     9	 * Service for routing user messages to intents.
    10	 *
    11	 * Based on ILAS Intent + Routing Map v5 / Decision Tree Spec v2.0.
    12	 * Enhanced with phrase detection, synonym mapping, negative filtering,
    13	 * disambiguation prompts, and urgent safety fast-path.
    14	 */
    15	class IntentRouter {
    16	
    17	  use StringTranslationTrait;
    18	
    19	  /**
    20	   * Confidence thresholds.
    21	   */
    22	  const CONFIDENCE_HIGH = 0.85;
    23	  const CONFIDENCE_MEDIUM = 0.70;
    24	  const CONFIDENCE_LOW = 0.50;
    25	
    26	  /**
    27	   * The config factory.
    28	   *
    29	   * @var \Drupal\Core\Config\ConfigFactoryInterface
    30	   */
    31	  protected $configFactory;
    32	
    33	  /**
    34	   * The topic resolver service.
    35	   *
    36	   * @var \Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service\TopicResolver
    37	   */
    38	  protected $topicResolver;
    39	
    40	  /**
    41	   * The keyword extractor service.
    42	   *
    43	   * @var \Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service\KeywordExtractor
    44	   */
    45	  protected $keywordExtractor;
    46	
    47	  /**
    48	   * The topic router service.
    49	   *
    50	   * @var \Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service\TopicRouter
    51	   */
    52	  protected $topicRouter;
    53	
    54	  /**
    55	   * The navigation intent detector service.
    56	   *
    57	   * @var \Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service\NavigationIntent|null
    58	   */
    59	  protected $navigationIntent;
    60	
    61	  /**
    62	   * The disambiguator service.
    63	   *
    64	   * @var \Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service\Disambiguator|null
    65	   */
    66	  protected $disambiguator;
    67	
    68	  /**
    69	   * The top intents pack service.
    70	   *
    71	   * @var \Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service\TopIntentsPack|null
    72	   */
    73	  protected $topIntentsPack;
    74	
    75	  /**
    76	   * Intent patterns.
    77	   *
    78	   * @var array
    79	   */
    80	  protected $patterns;
    81	
    82	  /**
    83	   * Urgent safety triggers.
    84	   *
    85	   * @var array
    86	   */
    87	  protected $urgentSafetyTriggers;
    88	
    89	  /**
    90	   * Disambiguation rules.
    91	   *
    92	   * @var array
    93	   */
    94	  protected $disambiguationRules;
    95	
    96	  /**
    97	   * Constructs an IntentRouter object.
    98	   */
    99	  public function __construct(ConfigFactoryInterface $config_factory, TopicResolver $topic_resolver, KeywordExtractor $keyword_extractor, TopicRouter $topic_router = NULL, NavigationIntent $navigation_intent = NULL, Disambiguator $disambiguator = NULL, TopIntentsPack $top_intents_pack = NULL) {
   100	    $this->configFactory = $config_factory;
   101	    $this->topicResolver = $topic_resolver;
   102	    $this->keywordExtractor = $keyword_extractor;
   103	    $this->topicRouter = $topic_router;
   104	    $this->navigationIntent = $navigation_intent;
   105	    $this->disambiguator = $disambiguator;
   106	    $this->topIntentsPack = $top_intents_pack;
   107	    $this->initializePatterns();
   108	    $this->initializeUrgentSafetyTriggers();
   109	    $this->initializeDisambiguationRules();
   110	  }
   111	
   112	  /**
   113	   * Initializes intent detection patterns.
   114	   */
   115	  protected function initializePatterns() {
   116	    $this->patterns = [
   117	      // Greeting patterns.
   118	      'greeting' => [
   119	        'patterns' => [
   120	          '/^(hi|hello|hey|good\s*(morning|afternoon|evening)|greetings)[\s!.?]*$/i',
   121	          '/^(what\'?s?\s*up|howdy|yo)[\s!.?]*$/i',
   122	          '/^(hola|buenos?\s*(dias?|tardes?|noches?))[\s!.?]*$/i',
   123	        ],
   124	        'keywords' => ['hi', 'hello', 'hey', 'greetings', 'hola'],
   125	        'weight' => 0.8,
   126	      ],
   127	
   128	      // Eligibility intent (separate from apply).
   129	      'eligibility' => [
   130	        'patterns' => [
   131	          '/\b(do\s*i\s*qualify|am\s*i\s*eligible|eligibility|who\s*(can|is\s*able\s*to)\s*(get|qualify))/i',
   132	          '/\b(who\s*can\s*get\s*help|who\s*do\s*you\s*(help|serve))/i',
   133	          '/\b(income\s*(limit|requirement|guideline)|qualify\s*for\s*(help|services))/i',
   134	          '/\b(can\s*i\s*get\s*help|can\s*you\s*help\s*me)/i',
   135	          '/\b(quailfy|qualfy)\b/i',
   136	        ],
   137	        'keywords' => ['qualify', 'eligible', 'eligibility', 'who can get help', 'calificar'],
   138	        'weight' => 0.9,
   139	      ],
   140	
   141	      // Apply for help intent.
   142	      'apply_for_help' => [
   143	        'patterns' => [
   144	          '/\b(apply|aply|application|sign\s*up)\s*(for)?\s*(help|assistance|services)?/i',
   145	          '/\bhow\s*(do\s*i|can\s*i|to)\s*(apply|get\s*started|aplicar)/i',
   146	          '/\bneed\s*(legal)?\s*(help|assistance|a\s*lawyer|an?\s*attorney)/i',
   147	          '/\bget\s*started/i',
   148	          '/\bwant\s*to\s*apply/i',
   149	          '/\b(find|get|need|looking\s*for)\s*(a|an)?\s*(lawyer|lawer|attorney|abogado|legal\s*(help|aid|assistance))/i',
   150	          '/\bhow\s*(do\s*i|can\s*i|to)\s*(find|get)\s*(a|an)?\s*(lawyer|attorney)/i',
   151	          '/\b(necesito|quiero)\s*(ayuda|un\s*abogado)/i',
   152	          '/\b(como\s*(aplico|aplicar)|aplicar\s*para)/i',
   153	          '/\bayuda\s*(legal|con\s*mi\s*caso)/i',
   154	          '/\babogado\s*gratis/i',
   155	          // Gap 2: free lawyer / pro bono patterns (also matches normalized free_lawyer token).
   156	          '/\bfree[_\s]lawyer\b|\bfree[_\s]legal\b|\bfree[_\s]attorney\b/i',
   157	          '/\b(free|pro\s*bono)\s+(lawyer|attorney|legal\s+(?:aid|help))\b/i',
   158	          // Gap 4: veterans seeking legal help.
   159	          '/\bveteran[_\s]legal[_\s]help\b/i',
   160	          '/\blegal\s+(help|aid|services?|assistance)\s+(for\s+)?(veterans?|military|vets?)\b/i',
   161	          '/\b(veterans?|military|vets?)\s+(legal\s+)?(help|aid|services?|assistance|lawyer|attorney)\b/i',
   162	        ],
   163	        'keywords' => ['apply', 'application', 'sign_up', 'get_help', 'need_help', 'get_started', 'necesito', 'aplicar', 'abogado'],
   164	        'weight' => 0.95,
   165	      ],
   166	
   167	      // Legacy alias for 'apply'.
   168	      'apply' => [
   169	        'alias_of' => 'apply_for_help',
   170	      ],
   171	
   172	      // Legal advice line intent.
   173	      // NOTE: Exclude debt collector contexts - "collector calling me" is NOT a hotline request.
   174	      'legal_advice_line' => [
   175	        'patterns' => [
   176	          // Explicit hotline/advice line keywords.
   177	          '/\b(hotline|hot\s*line|help\s*line|advice\s*line|advise\s*line)\b/i',
   178	          // "Call you" / "call legal aid" patterns (user wants to contact ILAS).
   179	          '/\b(call|phone)\s*(you(r)?|legal\s*aid|the\s*office|someone\s*there)\b/i',
   180	          '/\bcontact\s*(a|the)?\s*(lawyer|attorney|someone)\b/i',
   181	          '/\bspeak\s*(with|to)\s*(someone|a\s*person|a\s*real\s*person)/i',
   182	          '/\bphone\s*(number|consultation)/i',
   183	          '/\b(wanna|want\s*to)\s*talk\s*(to\s*(someone|you|a\s*lawyer))?/i',
   184	          '/\btelephone\b/i',
   185	          '/\b(linea\s*de\s*ayuda)\b/i',
   186	          '/\b(telefono|numero\s*de\s*telefono)\b/i',
   187	        ],
   188	        // Negative patterns - if these match, don't route to legal_advice_line.
   189	        'negative_patterns' => [
   190	          '/\b(debt|bill)\s*collector/i',
   191	          '/\bcreditor\s*(is\s*)?(calling|harassing)/i',

   195	          '/\bcalling\s*me\s*at\s*work/i',
   196	        ],
   197	        'keywords' => ['hotline', 'advice_line', 'talk_to_someone', 'speak', 'phone_number', 'linea'],
   198	        'weight' => 0.9,
   199	      ],
   200	
   201	      // Legacy alias for 'hotline'.
   202	      'hotline' => [
   203	        'alias_of' => 'legal_advice_line',
   204	      ],

   250	      'faq' => [

   263	          '/\bpreguntas\s*frecuentes/i',
   264	          // Gap 3: small claims / filing fees.
   265	          '/\bsmall[_\s]claims\b/i',
   266	          '/\b(court|filing)\s+fees?\b/i',
   267	          '/\bhow\s+much\s+(does\s+it\s+cost|to\s+file)\b/i',
   268	        ],
   269	        'keywords' => ['faq', 'question', 'questions', 'frequently_asked', 'preguntas'],
   270	        'weight' => 0.75,
   271	      ],
   272	
   273	      // Forms inventory intent — catalog/browse requests (no specific topic).
   274	      'forms_inventory' => [

   281	          '/\bdo\s*you\s*have\s*(any\s*)?(forms?|documents?|paperwork)/i',
   282	        ],
   283	        'keywords' => ['all_forms', 'list_forms', 'available_forms'],
   284	        'weight' => 0.90,
   285	      ],
   286	
   287	      // Forms finder intent.
   288	      'forms_finder' => [
   289	        'patterns' => [
   290	          '/\b(find|get|need|download|where)\s*(a|the|is|are)?\s*(form|froms|formulario)/i',
   291	          '/\b(form|formulario)\s*(for|to|about)/i',
   292	          '/\bapplication\s*form/i',
   293	          '/\b(eviction|divorce|custody|guardianship|bankruptcy|small\s*claims)\s*(form|paperwork|papers)/i',
   294	          '/\b(court\s*papers|legal\s*documents)/i',
   295	          '/\bprotective\s*order\s*(form|paperwork)/i',

   297	          '/\bchild\s*custody\s*(form|papers)/i',
   298	          '/\b(documentos|formularios)\s*(para|de)/i',
   299	          '/\bpapeles\s*(de|para)/i',
   300	          // Gap 6: Spanish protection/restraining order forms.
   301	          '/\border[_\s]de[_\s](restricci[oó]n|protecci[oó]n)\b/ui',
   302	          '/\b(formulario|forma|papeles)\s+(para\s+)?(orden|protecci[oó]n)\b/ui',
   303	        ],

   305	        'weight' => 0.85,
   306	      ],
   307	
   308	      // Legacy alias for 'forms'.
   309	      'forms' => [
   310	        'alias_of' => 'forms_finder',
   311	      ],
   312	
   313	      // Guides finder intent.
   314	      'guides_finder' => [
   315	        'patterns' => [
   316	          '/\b(find|get|need|read|where)\s*(a|the|is|are)?\s*(guide|giude|giudes|guia)/i',
   317	          '/\b(guide|guia)\s*(for|to|about|on)/i',
   318	          '/\bhow\s*to\s*(guide|manual)/i',
   319	          '/\bstep[\s-]*by[\s-]*step/i',
   320	          '/\bself[\s-]*help\s*(resources?|guide)/i',
   321	          '/\b(tenant|renter)\s*rights?\s*(guide|info)/i',
   322	          '/\bhow\s*to\s*represent\s*myself/i',
   323	          '/\blegal\s*information\s*articles?/i',
   324	          '/\binfo\s*on\s*(divorce|eviction|custody)/i',
   325	          '/\bwhat\s*are\s*my\s*rights\s*as\s*a\s*(renter|tenant)/i',
   326	          '/\bguias?\s*legales?/i',
   327	          '/\binstrucciones/i',
   328	        ],
   329	        'keywords' => ['guide', 'guides', 'manual', 'instructions', 'how-to', 'step_by_step', 'self_help', 'guia', 'guias'],
   330	        'weight' => 0.8,
   331	      ],
   332	
   333	      // Legacy alias for 'guides'.
   334	      'guides' => [
   335	        'alias_of' => 'guides_finder',
   336	      ],
   337	
   338	      // Resources intent.
   339	      'resources' => [
   340	        'patterns' => [
   341	          '/\b(find|get|need|where)\s*(a|the|is|are)?\s*resource/i',
   342	          '/\bresource\s*(for|about|on)/i',
   343	          '/\bdownload|printable|pdf/i',
   344	        ],
   345	        'keywords' => ['resource', 'resources', 'download', 'printable'],
   346	        'weight' => 0.7,
   347	      ],
   348	
   349	      // Risk Detector intent.
   350	      'risk_detector' => [
   351	        'patterns' => [
   352	          '/\b(risk\s*(detector|assessment|quiz|tool))/i',
   353	          '/\b(legal\s*risk|check\s*my\s*risk)/i',
   354	          '/\b(senior|elder|elderly)\s*(risk|quiz|assessment|legal)/i',
   355	          '/\blegal\s*(checkup|wellness)\s*(check|tool)?/i',
   356	          '/\bi\'?m\s*\d+\s*(years?\s*old)?.*legal\s*(problems?|issues?)/i',
   357	          '/\bcheck\s*if\s*i\s*need\s*help\s*as\s*(a\s*)?(senior|elder)/i',
   358	          '/\b(evaluacion|riesgo)\s*(legal|de\s*riesgo)/i',
   359	        ],
   360	        'keywords' => ['risk_detector', 'risk_assessment', 'risk_quiz', 'legal_risk', 'senior_legal', 'legal_checkup'],
   361	        'weight' => 0.9,
   362	      ],
   363	
   364	      // Donations intent.
   365	      'donations' => [
   366	        'patterns' => [
   367	          // Core donate words (no bare "give" or "support").
   368	          '/\b(donate|donatoin|dontae|donation|contribute|donar)/i',

   376	          '/\b(i\s*want\s*to|i\'?d?\s*like\s*to|can\s*i|how\s*do\s*i)\s*(give|support)\b/i',
   377	          '/\bgive\s*(back\s*)?to\s*(you|legal\s*aid|the\s*organization|your)/i',
   378	          '/\bsupport\s*(your|the|this)\s*(work|mission|cause|organization)/i',
   379	          '/\bways\s*to\s*(give|support|help)\b/i',

   381	        ],
   382	        'keywords' => ['donate', 'donation', 'contribute', 'gift', 'donar', 'donacion'],
   383	        'weight' => 0.9,
   384	      ],

   724	  /**
   725	   * Vague / single-word queries that are too ambiguous to route confidently.
   726	   *
   727	   * Each entry maps a lowercased query to the disambiguation rule key.
   728	   *
   729	   * @var array
   730	   */
   731	  protected $vagueQueries;
   732	
   733	  /**
   734	   * Patterns that indicate the user is seeking specific legal advice,
   735	   * which is out of scope (we cannot give legal advice).
   736	   *
   737	   * @var array
   738	   */
   739	  protected $legalAdvicePatterns;
   740	
   741	  /**
   742	   * Initializes disambiguation rules.
   743	   */
   744	  protected function initializeDisambiguationRules() {
   745	    $this->disambiguationRules = [
   746	      // Topic detected but no clear action.
   747	      'topic_no_action' => [
   748	        'condition' => 'topic_only',
   749	        'question' => 'What would you like to do?',
   750	        'options' => [
   751	          ['label' => 'Find forms', 'intent' => 'forms_finder'],
   752	          ['label' => 'Read a guide', 'intent' => 'guides_finder'],
   753	          ['label' => 'Apply for legal help', 'intent' => 'apply_for_help'],
   754	          ['label' => 'Call advice line', 'intent' => 'legal_advice_line'],
   755	        ],
   756	      ],
   757	      // Apply vs information.
   758	      'apply_vs_info' => [
   759	        'condition' => 'apply_info_ambiguous',
   760	        'question' => 'Are you looking for information or do you need legal help?',
   761	        'options' => [
   762	          ['label' => 'Find information', 'intent' => 'faq'],
   763	          ['label' => 'Apply for legal help', 'intent' => 'apply_for_help'],
   764	        ],
   765	      ],
   766	      // Forms vs guides.
   767	      'forms_vs_guides' => [
   768	        'condition' => 'forms_guides_ambiguous',
   769	        'question' => 'What type of help do you need?',
   770	        'options' => [
   771	          ['label' => 'Find forms', 'intent' => 'forms_finder'],
   772	          ['label' => 'Read a guide', 'intent' => 'guides_finder'],
   773	          ['label' => 'Apply for legal help', 'intent' => 'apply_for_help'],
   774	        ],
   775	      ],
   776	      // Contact disambiguation.
   777	      'contact_how' => [
   778	        'condition' => 'contact_ambiguous',
   779	        'question' => 'How would you like to contact us?',
   780	        'options' => [
   781	          ['label' => 'Call Legal Advice Line', 'intent' => 'legal_advice_line'],
   782	          ['label' => 'Find office locations', 'intent' => 'offices_contact'],
   783	          ['label' => 'Apply online', 'intent' => 'apply_for_help'],
   784	        ],
   785	      ],
   786	      // Generic help — no specific action.
   787	      'generic_help' => [
   788	        'condition' => 'help_ambiguous',
   789	        'question' => 'How can we help you today?',
   790	        'options' => [
   791	          ['label' => 'Apply for legal help', 'intent' => 'apply_for_help'],
   792	          ['label' => 'Find office locations', 'intent' => 'offices_contact'],
   793	          ['label' => 'Find forms', 'intent' => 'forms_finder'],
   794	          ['label' => 'Read a guide', 'intent' => 'guides_finder'],
   795	        ],
   796	      ],
   797	    ];
   798	
   799	    // Vague / too-short queries that should trigger clarification instead
   800	    // of routing confidently. Keyed by lowercased exact query.
   801	    $this->vagueQueries = [
   802	      'help' => 'generic_help',
   803	      'can you help' => 'generic_help',
   804	      'can you help me' => 'generic_help',
   805	      'i need help' => 'generic_help',
   806	      'where can i get help' => 'generic_help',
   807	      'information' => 'apply_vs_info',
   808	      'i want to apply' => 'apply_vs_info',
   809	      'forms' => 'forms_vs_guides',
   810	      'phone' => 'contact_how',
   811	      'ayuda' => 'generic_help',
   812	      'formularios' => 'forms_vs_guides',
   813	    ];
   814	
   815	    // Patterns indicating the user is seeking specific legal advice
   816	    // (outcome predictions, should-I questions). These are out-of-scope.
   817	    $this->legalAdvicePatterns = [
   818	      '/\b(should\s*i|do\s*i\s*have\s*a\s*case|will\s*i\s*win|chances?\s*of\s*winning)/i',
   819	      '/\blegal\s*advice\s*(about|on|for|regarding)\b/i',
   820	      '/\bcan\s*i\s*sue\b/i',
   821	      '/\bshould\s*i\s*sign\b/i',
   822	      '/\btell\s*me\s*(if\s*i\s*should|my\s*chances)/i',
   823	      '/\bwhat\s*should\s*i\s*do\s*about\s*(my|the)\b/i',
   824	    ];
   825	  }
   826	
   827	  /**
   828	   * Routes a user message to an intent.
   829	   *
   830	   * @param string $message
   831	   *   The user's message.
   832	   * @param array $context
   833	   *   Conversation context.
   834	   *
   835	   * @return array
   836	   *   Intent array with 'type', 'confidence', and additional data.
   837	   */
   838	  public function route(string $message, array $context = []) {
   839	    // Step 1: Run through keyword extraction pipeline.
   840	    $extraction = $this->keywordExtractor->extract($message);
   841	
   842	    // Step 2: Check for URGENT SAFETY triggers FIRST (highest priority).
   843	    $urgent_result = $this->checkUrgentSafety($message);
   844	    if ($urgent_result) {
   845	      return $urgent_result;
   846	    }
   847	
   848	    // Step 3: Check for high-risk situations from extraction (legacy support).
   849	    if ($extraction['high_risk']) {
   850	      return $this->buildHighRiskIntent($extraction['high_risk'], $message, $extraction);
   851	    }
   852	
   853	    // Step 4: Check for out-of-scope requests.
   854	    if ($extraction['out_of_scope']) {
   855	      return [
   856	        'type' => 'out_of_scope',
   857	        'confidence' => 0.9,
   858	        'extraction' => $extraction,
   859	      ];
   860	    }
   861	
   862	    // Step 5: Use normalized text for intent matching.
   863	    $normalized = $extraction['normalized'];
   864	    $original = $extraction['original'];
   865	
   866	    // Check for greeting first (only if message is very short).
   867	    // Skip greeting detection if message contains topic-specific keywords
   868	    // to prevent false positives like "child custody forms" being detected
   869	    // as greeting because "child" contains "hi" as a substring.
   870	    if (strlen($message) < 30 && $this->matchesIntent($original, 'greeting') && !$this->containsTopicKeywords($original)) {
   871	      return [
   872	        'type' => 'greeting',
   873	        'confidence' => 0.95,
   874	        'extraction' => $extraction,
   875	      ];
   876	    }
   877	
   878	    // Step 5a: Check for vague/ambiguous queries that need clarification.
   879	    // This runs BEFORE topic routing so single-word topic queries like
   880	    // "divorce" or "forms" get a clarification prompt instead of being
   881	    // routed to a topic page without context.
   882	    // Use the new Disambiguator service for deterministic vague query detection.
   883	    if ($this->disambiguator) {
   884	      $disamb_result = $this->disambiguator->check($message, [], ['extraction' => $extraction]);
   885	      if ($disamb_result && in_array($disamb_result['reason'] ?? '', ['vague_query', 'topic_without_action'])) {
   886	        $disamb_result['extraction'] = $extraction;
   887	        return $disamb_result;
   888	      }
   889	    }
   890	    // Fallback to legacy vague query check if disambiguator not available.
   891	    else {
   892	      $vague_result = $this->checkVagueQuery($message, $extraction);
   893	      if ($vague_result) {
   894	        return $vague_result;
   895	      }
   896	    }
   897	
   898	    // Step 5a2: Check for legal-advice-seeking patterns (out of scope).
   899	    $legal_advice_result = $this->checkLegalAdviceSeeking($message, $extraction);
   900	    if ($legal_advice_result) {
   901	      return $legal_advice_result;
   902	    }
   903	
   904	    // Step 5b: TopicRouter - handle short/single-token topic queries.
   905	    // This catches bare topic words like "divorce", "eviction", "custody"
   906	    // that should ask what action the user wants (forms, guides, apply).
   907	    if ($this->topicRouter && str_word_count($message) <= 3) {
   908	      $topic_route = $this->topicRouter->route($message);
   909	      if ($topic_route) {
   910	        $service_area = $topic_route['service_area'];
   911	        // Single topic words are inherently ambiguous — the user hasn't
   912	        // specified an action. Return disambiguation instead of routing.
   913	        return [
   914	          'type' => 'disambiguation',
   915	          'area' => $service_area,
   916	          'intent_source' => 'topic_router',
   917	          'confidence' => 0.5,
   918	          'needs_disambiguation' => TRUE,
   919	          'disambiguation' => $this->getTopicDisambiguation($service_area),
   920	          'topic_route' => $topic_route,
   921	          'extraction' => $extraction,
   922	        ];
   923	      }
   924	    }
   925	
   926	    // Step 5c: NavigationIntent - detect "where do I find X" / "show me X"
   927	    // navigation queries and resolve to a specific page URL.
   928	    if ($this->navigationIntent) {
   929	      $nav_result = $this->navigationIntent->detect($message);
   930	      if ($nav_result && !empty($nav_result['top_match']) && $nav_result['confidence'] >= 0.65) {
   931	        $top = $nav_result['top_match'];
   932	        return [
   933	          'type' => 'navigation',
   934	          'page_key' => $top['page_key'],
   935	          'page_url' => $top['url'],
   936	          'page_label' => $top['label'],
   937	          'confidence' => $nav_result['confidence'],
   938	          'match_type' => $top['match_type'],
   939	          'has_nav_phrasing' => $nav_result['has_nav_phrasing'],
   940	          'all_matches' => $nav_result['matches'],
   941	          'extraction' => $extraction,
   942	        ];
   943	      }
   944	    }
   945	
   946	    // Step 6: Score all intents and find matches.
   947	    $matches = $this->scoreAllIntents($message, $extraction);
   948	
   949	    // Step 7: Check if disambiguation is needed.
   950	    $disambiguation = $this->checkDisambiguation($matches, $extraction);
   951	    if ($disambiguation) {
   952	      return $disambiguation;
   953	    }
   954	
   955	    // Step 8: Return highest confidence match if above threshold.
   956	    if (!empty($matches) && $matches[0]['confidence'] >= self::CONFIDENCE_LOW) {
   957	      $best = $matches[0];
   958	      return [
   959	        'type' => $best['intent'],
   960	        'confidence' => $best['confidence'],
   961	        'extraction' => $extraction,
   962	        'competing_intents' => array_slice($matches, 1, 2),
   963	      ];
   964	    }
   965	
   966	    // Step 9: Check topic/service area intents.
   967	    $topic_intents = [
   968	      'topic_housing',
   969	      'topic_family',
   970	      'topic_seniors',
   971	      'topic_benefits',
   972	      'topic_health',
   973	      'topic_consumer',
   974	      'topic_civil_rights',
   975	      'topic_employment',
   976	    ];
   977	
   978	    foreach ($topic_intents as $intent) {
   979	      if ($this->matchesIntent($original, $intent) || $this->matchesIntent($normalized, $intent)) {
   980	        // Topic detected - may need disambiguation.
   981	        $service_area = $this->patterns[$intent]['service_area'];
   982	        return [
   983	          'type' => 'service_area',
   984	          'area' => $service_area,
   985	          'intent_source' => $intent,
   986	          'confidence' => 0.7,
   987	          'needs_disambiguation' => TRUE,
   988	          'disambiguation' => $this->getTopicDisambiguation($service_area),
   989	          'extraction' => $extraction,
   990	        ];
   991	      }
   992	    }
   993	
   994	    // Step 10: Try to detect topic from message using taxonomy.
   995	    $topic = $this->topicResolver->resolveFromText($message);
   996	    if ($topic) {
   997	      return [
   998	        'type' => 'topic',
   999	        'topic_id' => $topic['id'],
  1000	        'topic' => $topic['name'],
  1001	        'confidence' => 0.6,
  1002	        'extraction' => $extraction,
  1003	      ];
  1004	    }
  1005	
  1006	    // Step 11: Check if message looks like a question about finding something.
  1007	    if (preg_match('/\b(where|how|find|get|need|looking\s*for)\b/i', $message)) {
  1008	      return [
  1009	        'type' => 'resources',
  1010	        'topic' => $message,
  1011	        'confidence' => 0.5,
  1012	        'extraction' => $extraction,
  1013	      ];
  1014	    }
  1015	
  1016	    // Step 11b: TopIntentsPack synonym fallback — catches sub-topic intents
  1017	    // like "custody", "eviction", "debt collection" that have no regex
  1018	    // patterns but do have synonyms in the pack.
  1019	    if ($this->topIntentsPack && mb_strlen(trim($message)) >= 4) {
  1020	      $pack_match = $this->topIntentsPack->matchSynonyms(mb_strtolower(trim($message)));
  1021	      if ($pack_match) {
  1022	        $pack_entry = $this->topIntentsPack->lookup($pack_match);
  1023	        return [
  1024	          'type' => $pack_match,
  1025	          'confidence' => 0.60,
  1026	          'source' => 'top_intents_pack',
  1027	          'pack_entry' => $pack_entry,
  1028	          'extraction' => $extraction,
  1029	        ];
  1030	      }
  1031	    }
  1032	
  1033	    // Step 12: Default: unknown intent (triggers fallback).
  1034	    return [
  1035	      'type' => 'unknown',
  1036	      'confidence' => 0.2,
  1037	      'extraction' => $extraction,
  1038	    ];
  1039	  }
  1040	
  1041	  /**
  1042	   * Checks for urgent safety triggers.
  1043	   *
  1044	   * @param string $message
  1045	   *   The user's message.
  1046	   *
  1047	   * @return array|null
  1048	   *   Urgent safety intent or NULL.
  1049	   */
  1050	  protected function checkUrgentSafety(string $message): ?array {
  1051	    $message_lower = strtolower($message);
  1052	
  1053	    foreach ($this->urgentSafetyTriggers as $category => $config) {
  1054	      foreach ($config['triggers'] as $trigger) {
  1055	        if (strpos($message_lower, strtolower($trigger)) !== FALSE) {
  1056	          // Check if dampeners should suppress this match.
  1057	          if ($this->isUrgencyDampened($message_lower, $category)) {
  1058	            continue;
  1059	          }
  1060	          return [
  1061	            'type' => 'urgent_safety',
  1062	            'category' => $category,
  1063	            'confidence' => 1.0,
  1064	            'escalation_level' => $config['escalation_level'],
  1065	            'response_template' => $config['response_template'],
  1066	            'trigger_matched' => $trigger,
  1067	          ];
  1068	        }
  1069	      }
  1070	    }
  1071	
  1072	    return NULL;
  1073	  }
  1074	
  1075	  /**
  1076	   * Checks if an urgency match should be dampened (suppressed).
  1077	   *
  1078	   * Dampeners prevent false positives on purely informational queries.
  1079	   * For example, "how long do I have to respond" should not trigger urgency
  1080	   * because the user is asking about deadlines, not reporting one.
  1081	   *
  1082	   * @param string $message_lower
  1083	   *   The lowercase message.
  1084	   * @param string $category
  1085	   *   The urgency category.
  1086	   *
  1087	   * @return bool
  1088	   *   TRUE if the match should be suppressed.
  1089	   */
  1090	  protected function isUrgencyDampened(string $message_lower, string $category): bool {
  1091	    // Informational query patterns that should NOT trigger urgency.
  1092	    $dampeners = [
  1093	      'urgent_deadline' => [
  1094	        'how long do i have',
  1095	        'what is the deadline',
  1096	        'when is the deadline',
  1097	        'typical deadline',
  1098	        'general deadline',
  1099	        'deadline information',
  1100	        'deadline for eviction',
  1101	        'how many days',
  1102	        'how much time do i have',
  1103	        'cuanto tiempo tengo',
  1104	        'cual es la fecha limite',
  1105	      ],
  1106	    ];
  1107	
  1108	    if (!isset($dampeners[$category])) {
  1109	      return FALSE;
  1110	    }
  1111	
  1112	    foreach ($dampeners[$category] as $dampener) {
  1113	      if (strpos($message_lower, $dampener) !== FALSE) {
  1114	        return TRUE;
  1115	      }
  1116	    }
  1117	
  1118	    return FALSE;
  1119	  }
  1120	
  1121	  /**
  1122	   * Scores all intents against the message.
  1123	   *
  1124	   * @param string $message
  1125	   *   The user's message.
  1126	   * @param array $extraction
  1127	   *   The extraction result.
  1128	   *
  1129	   * @return array
  1130	   *   Sorted array of intent matches with confidence scores.
  1131	   */
  1132	  protected function scoreAllIntents(string $message, array $extraction): array {
  1133	    $matches = [];
  1134	    $original = $extraction['original'];
  1135	    $normalized = $extraction['normalized'];
  1136	
  1137	    $primary_intents = [
  1138	      'eligibility',
  1139	      'apply_for_help',
  1140	      'legal_advice_line',
  1141	      'offices_contact',
  1142	      'services_overview',
  1143	      'risk_detector',
  1144	      'donations',
  1145	      'feedback',
  1146	      'faq',
  1147	      'forms_inventory',
  1148	      'forms_finder',
  1149	      'guides_finder',
  1150	      'resources',
  1151	    ];
  1152	
  1153	    foreach ($primary_intents as $intent) {
  1154	      // Skip if alias.
  1155	      if (isset($this->patterns[$intent]['alias_of'])) {
  1156	        continue;
  1157	      }
  1158	
  1159	      // Skip if negative keywords are present for this intent.
  1160	      if ($this->keywordExtractor->hasNegativeKeyword($intent, $original)) {
  1161	        continue;
  1162	      }
  1163	
  1164	      $confidence = $this->calculateIntentConfidence($intent, $original, $normalized, $extraction);
  1165	
  1166	      if ($confidence > 0.3) {
  1167	        $matches[] = [
  1168	          'intent' => $intent,
  1169	          'confidence' => $confidence,
  1170	        ];
  1171	      }
  1172	    }
  1173	
  1174	    // Sort by confidence descending.
  1175	    usort($matches, function ($a, $b) {
  1176	      return $b['confidence'] <=> $a['confidence'];
  1177	    });
  1178	
  1179	    return $matches;
  1180	  }
  1181	
  1182	  /**
  1183	   * Calculates confidence score for a specific intent.
  1184	   *
  1185	   * @param string $intent
  1186	   *   The intent to check.
  1187	   * @param string $original
  1188	   *   Original message.
  1189	   * @param string $normalized
  1190	   *   Normalized message.
  1191	   * @param array $extraction
  1192	   *   Extraction data.
  1193	   *
  1194	   * @return float
  1195	   *   Confidence score 0-1.
  1196	   */
  1197	  protected function calculateIntentConfidence(string $intent, string $original, string $normalized, array $extraction): float {
  1198	    if (!isset($this->patterns[$intent])) {
  1199	      return 0.0;
  1200	    }
  1201	
  1202	    $base_weight = $this->patterns[$intent]['weight'] ?? 0.7;
  1203	    $confidence = 0.0;
  1204	
  1205	    // Check patterns.
  1206	    $pattern_matches = 0;
  1207	    if (!empty($this->patterns[$intent]['patterns'])) {
  1208	      foreach ($this->patterns[$intent]['patterns'] as $pattern) {
  1209	        if (preg_match($pattern, $original) || preg_match($pattern, $normalized)) {
  1210	          $pattern_matches++;
  1211	        }
  1212	      }
  1213	    }
  1214	
  1215	    if ($pattern_matches > 0) {
  1216	      // Base confidence from pattern match.
  1217	      $confidence = $base_weight;
  1218	      // Bonus for multiple pattern matches.
  1219	      $confidence += min(0.1, $pattern_matches * 0.03);
  1220	    }
  1221	
  1222	    // Check negative patterns - if any match, this intent should not be selected.
  1223	    if (!empty($this->patterns[$intent]['negative_patterns'])) {
  1224	      foreach ($this->patterns[$intent]['negative_patterns'] as $negative_pattern) {
  1225	        if (preg_match($negative_pattern, $original) || preg_match($negative_pattern, $normalized)) {
  1226	          // Negative pattern matched - return 0 confidence.
  1227	          return 0.0;
  1228	        }
  1229	      }
  1230	    }
  1231	
  1232	    // Check keyword matches.
  1233	    $keyword_matches = 0;
  1234	    if (!empty($this->patterns[$intent]['keywords'])) {
  1235	      $message_lower = strtolower($original);
  1236	      foreach ($this->patterns[$intent]['keywords'] as $keyword) {
  1237	        if (strpos($message_lower, strtolower($keyword)) !== FALSE ||
  1238	            strpos($message_lower, str_replace('_', ' ', strtolower($keyword))) !== FALSE) {
  1239	          $keyword_matches++;
  1240	        }
  1241	      }
  1242	    }
  1243	
  1244	    if ($keyword_matches > 0 && $confidence == 0) {
  1245	      // Keyword-only match gets lower confidence.
  1246	      $confidence = $base_weight * 0.8;
  1247	    }
  1248	    elseif ($keyword_matches > 0) {
  1249	      // Bonus for keyword matches on top of pattern.
  1250	      $confidence += min(0.1, $keyword_matches * 0.02);
  1251	    }
  1252	
  1253	    // Phrase match bonus.
  1254	    if (!empty($extraction['phrases_found'])) {
  1255	      $confidence += 0.05;
  1256	    }
  1257	
  1258	    // Short message penalty.
  1259	    if (str_word_count($original) < 3) {
  1260	      $confidence *= 0.85;
  1261	    }
  1262	
  1263	    // Cap at 1.0.
  1264	    return min(1.0, $confidence);
  1265	  }
  1266	
  1267	  /**
  1268	   * Checks if disambiguation is needed.
  1269	   *
  1270	   * Uses the Disambiguator service for deterministic confidence-delta
  1271	   * checks. Falls back to legacy logic if the service is not available.
  1272	   *
  1273	   * @param array $matches
  1274	   *   Scored intent matches.
  1275	   * @param array $extraction
  1276	   *   Extraction data.
  1277	   *
  1278	   * @return array|null
  1279	   *   Disambiguation response or NULL.
  1280	   */
  1281	  protected function checkDisambiguation(array $matches, array $extraction): ?array {
  1282	    // No matches - no disambiguation needed.
  1283	    if (empty($matches)) {
  1284	      return NULL;
  1285	    }
  1286	
  1287	    $best = $matches[0];
  1288	    $second = $matches[1] ?? NULL;
  1289	
  1290	    // High confidence with clear separation - no disambiguation.
  1291	    if ($best['confidence'] >= self::CONFIDENCE_HIGH) {
  1292	      // Even at high confidence, check for known confusable pairs
  1293	      // with very small delta.
  1294	      if (!$second || ($best['confidence'] - $second['confidence']) >= 0.10) {
  1295	        return NULL;
  1296	      }
  1297	    }
  1298	
  1299	    // Use the Disambiguator service for delta-based disambiguation.
  1300	    if ($this->disambiguator && count($matches) >= 2) {
  1301	      $disamb_result = $this->disambiguator->check(
  1302	        $extraction['original'] ?? '',
  1303	        $matches,
  1304	        ['extraction' => $extraction]
  1305	      );
  1306	      if ($disamb_result) {
  1307	        $disamb_result['extraction'] = $extraction;
  1308	        return $disamb_result;
  1309	      }
  1310	    }
  1311	
  1312	    // Legacy fallback: Check for competing intents with similar confidence.
  1313	    if ($second) {
  1314	      $delta = $best['confidence'] - $second['confidence'];
  1315	      $pair = $this->getIntentPairDisambiguation($best['intent'], $second['intent']);
  1316	
  1317	      // Known confusable pair with tight scores → disambiguate.
  1318	      if ($pair && $delta < 0.12) {
  1319	        return [
  1320	          'type' => 'disambiguation',
  1321	          'confidence' => $best['confidence'],
  1322	          'question' => $pair['question'],
  1323	          'options' => $pair['options'],
  1324	          'competing_intents' => [$best, $second],
  1325	          'extraction' => $extraction,
  1326	        ];
  1327	      }
  1328	
  1329	      // Unknown pair but still very close → generic disambiguation.
  1330	      if ($delta < 0.08 && $best['confidence'] < self::CONFIDENCE_HIGH) {
  1331	        return [
  1332	          'type' => 'disambiguation',
  1333	          'confidence' => $best['confidence'],
  1334	          'question' => 'I want to make sure I help you with the right thing. What are you looking for?',
  1335	          'options' => [
  1336	            ['label' => 'Apply for legal help', 'intent' => 'apply_for_help'],
  1337	            ['label' => 'Find forms', 'intent' => 'forms_finder'],
  1338	            ['label' => 'Read a guide', 'intent' => 'guides_finder'],
  1339	            ['label' => 'Call advice line', 'intent' => 'legal_advice_line'],
  1340	          ],
  1341	          'competing_intents' => [$best, $second],
  1342	          'extraction' => $extraction,
  1343	        ];
  1344	      }
  1345	    }
  1346	
  1347	    // Check specific disambiguation conditions.
  1348	    // Contact ambiguity.
  1349	    if (in_array($best['intent'], ['legal_advice_line', 'offices_contact', 'apply_for_help'])) {
  1350	      if (preg_match('/\b(contact|reach|get\s*in\s*touch)\b/i', $extraction['original'])) {
  1351	        return [
  1352	          'type' => 'disambiguation',
  1353	          'confidence' => $best['confidence'],
  1354	          'question' => $this->disambiguationRules['contact_how']['question'],
  1355	          'options' => $this->disambiguationRules['contact_how']['options'],
  1356	          'extraction' => $extraction,
  1357	        ];
  1358	      }
  1359	    }
  1360	
  1361	    return NULL;
  1362	  }
  1363	
  1364	  /**
  1365	   * Checks if the message is a known vague/ambiguous query.
  1366	   *
  1367	   * These are short, under-specified queries where the user's intent is
  1368	   * genuinely unclear. Instead of guessing (and likely guessing wrong),
  1369	   * we return a clarifying question with quick-reply options.
  1370	   *
  1371	   * This method is deterministic — no LLM call.
  1372	   *
  1373	   * @param string $message
  1374	   *   The user message.
  1375	   * @param array $extraction
  1376	   *   Extraction result.
  1377	   *
  1378	   * @return array|null
  1379	   *   Disambiguation intent or NULL if not vague.
  1380	   */
  1381	  protected function checkVagueQuery(string $message, array $extraction): ?array {
  1382	    $key = strtolower(trim(preg_replace('/[?.!]+$/', '', $message)));
  1383	
  1384	    if (isset($this->vagueQueries[$key])) {
  1385	      $rule_key = $this->vagueQueries[$key];
  1386	      $rule = $this->disambiguationRules[$rule_key] ?? $this->disambiguationRules['generic_help'];
  1387	
  1388	      return [
  1389	        'type' => 'disambiguation',
  1390	        'confidence' => 0.3,
  1391	        'needs_disambiguation' => TRUE,
  1392	        'question' => $rule['question'],
  1393	        'options' => $rule['options'],
  1394	        'vague_query' => TRUE,
  1395	        'extraction' => $extraction,
  1396	      ];
  1397	    }
  1398	
  1399	    return NULL;
  1400	  }
  1401	
  1402	  /**
  1403	   * Checks if the message is seeking specific legal advice (out of scope).
  1404	   *
  1405	   * Patterns like "should I sue", "can I sue my landlord", "will I win",
  1406	   * "legal advice about custody" indicate the user wants a legal opinion
  1407	   * rather than navigational help. These are out-of-scope.
  1408	   *
  1409	   * @param string $message
  1410	   *   The user message.
  1411	   * @param array $extraction
  1412	   *   Extraction result.
  1413	   *
  1414	   * @return array|null
  1415	   *   Out-of-scope intent or NULL.
  1416	   */
  1417	  protected function checkLegalAdviceSeeking(string $message, array $extraction): ?array {
  1418	    foreach ($this->legalAdvicePatterns as $pattern) {
  1419	      if (preg_match($pattern, $message)) {
  1420	        return [
  1421	          'type' => 'out_of_scope',
  1422	          'confidence' => 0.85,
  1423	          'reason' => 'legal_advice_request',
  1424	          'extraction' => $extraction,
  1425	        ];
  1426	      }
  1427	    }
  1428	
  1429	    return NULL;
  1430	  }
  1431	
  1432	  /**
  1433	   * Gets disambiguation for a topic service area.
  1434	   *
  1435	   * @param string $service_area
  1436	   *   The service area.
  1437	   *
  1438	   * @return array
  1439	   *   Disambiguation options.
  1440	   */
  1441	  protected function getTopicDisambiguation(string $service_area): array {
  1442	    $area_label = ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $service_area));
  1443	
  1444	    return [
  1445	      'question' => $this->t('I can help with @area issues. What would you like to do?', ['@area' => $area_label]),
  1446	      'options' => [
  1447	        ['label' => $this->t('Find @area forms', ['@area' => $area_label]), 'intent' => 'forms_finder', 'topic' => $service_area],
  1448	        ['label' => $this->t('Read @area guide', ['@area' => $area_label]), 'intent' => 'guides_finder', 'topic' => $service_area],
  1449	        ['label' => $this->t('Apply for legal help'), 'intent' => 'apply_for_help'],
  1450	        ['label' => $this->t('Call advice line'), 'intent' => 'legal_advice_line'],
  1451	      ],
  1452	    ];
  1453	  }
  1454	
  1455	  /**
  1456	   * Gets disambiguation for competing intent pairs.
  1457	   *
  1458	   * @param string $intent1
  1459	   *   First intent.
  1460	   * @param string $intent2
  1461	   *   Second intent.
  1462	   *
  1463	   * @return array|null
  1464	   *   Disambiguation config or NULL.
  1465	   */
  1466	  protected function getIntentPairDisambiguation(string $intent1, string $intent2): ?array {
  1467	    $pair = [$intent1, $intent2];
  1468	    sort($pair);
  1469	    $key = implode(':', $pair);
  1470	
  1471	    $pairs = [
  1472	      'apply_for_help:eligibility' => [
  1473	        'question' => 'Do you want to check eligibility or start an application?',
  1474	        'options' => [
  1475	          ['label' => 'Check if I qualify', 'intent' => 'eligibility'],
  1476	          ['label' => 'Start application', 'intent' => 'apply_for_help'],
  1477	        ],
  1478	      ],
  1479	      'apply_for_help:services_overview' => [
  1480	        'question' => 'Are you looking for information about our services or do you want to apply?',
  1481	        'options' => [
  1482	          ['label' => 'Learn about services', 'intent' => 'services_overview'],
  1483	          ['label' => 'Apply for legal help', 'intent' => 'apply_for_help'],
  1484	        ],
  1485	      ],
  1486	      'forms_finder:guides_finder' => [
  1487	        'question' => 'What type of help do you need?',
  1488	        'options' => [
  1489	          ['label' => 'Find forms to fill out', 'intent' => 'forms_finder'],
  1490	          ['label' => 'Read a how-to guide', 'intent' => 'guides_finder'],
  1491	        ],
  1492	      ],
  1493	      'legal_advice_line:offices_contact' => [
  1494	        'question' => 'How would you like to contact us?',
  1495	        'options' => [
  1496	          ['label' => 'Call Legal Advice Line', 'intent' => 'legal_advice_line'],
  1497	          ['label' => 'Find office location', 'intent' => 'offices_contact'],
  1498	        ],
  1499	      ],
  1500	      'donations:feedback' => [
  1501	        'question' => 'What would you like to do?',
  1502	        'options' => [
  1503	          ['label' => 'Make a donation', 'intent' => 'donations'],
  1504	          ['label' => 'Give feedback or volunteer', 'intent' => 'feedback'],
  1505	        ],
  1506	      ],
  1507	      'faq:guides_finder' => [
  1508	        'question' => 'What would be most helpful?',
  1509	        'options' => [
  1510	          ['label' => 'Quick answer to a question', 'intent' => 'faq'],
  1511	          ['label' => 'Detailed guide', 'intent' => 'guides_finder'],
  1512	        ],
  1513	      ],
  1514	      'faq:services_overview' => [
  1515	        'question' => 'What are you looking for?',
  1516	        'options' => [
  1517	          ['label' => 'Answers to common questions', 'intent' => 'faq'],
  1518	          ['label' => 'Overview of our services', 'intent' => 'services_overview'],
  1519	        ],
  1520	      ],
  1521	      'apply_for_help:legal_advice_line' => [
  1522	        'question' => 'How would you like to get help?',
  1523	        'options' => [
  1524	          ['label' => 'Apply online', 'intent' => 'apply_for_help'],
  1525	          ['label' => 'Call Legal Advice Line', 'intent' => 'legal_advice_line'],
  1526	        ],
  1527	      ],
  1528	    ];
  1529	
  1530	    return $pairs[$key] ?? NULL;
  1531	  }
  1532	
  1533	  /**
  1534	   * Builds a high-risk intent response.
  1535	   *
  1536	   * @param string $risk_category
  1537	   *   The high-risk category.
  1538	   * @param string $message
  1539	   *   The original message.
  1540	   * @param array $extraction
  1541	   *   The extraction result.
  1542	   *
  1543	   * @return array
  1544	   *   The intent array.
  1545	   */
  1546	  protected function buildHighRiskIntent(string $risk_category, string $message, array $extraction): array {
  1547	    $intent = [
  1548	      'type' => 'high_risk',
  1549	      'risk_category' => $risk_category,
  1550	      'confidence' => 0.95,
  1551	      'extraction' => $extraction,
  1552	    ];
  1553	
  1554	    switch ($risk_category) {
  1555	      case 'high_risk_dv':
  1556	        $intent['primary_action'] = '/apply-for-help';
  1557	        $intent['secondary_action'] = 'National DV Hotline';
  1558	        $intent['safety_language_required'] = TRUE;
  1559	        break;
  1560	
  1561	      case 'high_risk_eviction':
  1562	        $intent['primary_action'] = '/apply-for-help';
  1563	        $intent['secondary_action'] = '/forms';
  1564	        $intent['safety_language_required'] = TRUE;
  1565	        break;
  1566	
  1567	      case 'high_risk_scam':
  1568	        $intent['primary_action'] = '/apply-for-help';
  1569	        $intent['secondary_action'] = 'FTC reporting';
  1570	        $intent['safety_language_required'] = TRUE;
  1571	        break;
  1572	
  1573	      case 'high_risk_deadline':
  1574	        $intent['primary_action'] = '/legal-advice-line';
  1575	        $intent['secondary_action'] = '/apply-for-help';
  1576	        $intent['safety_language_required'] = TRUE;
  1577	        break;
  1578	    }
  1579	
  1580	    return $intent;
  1581	  }
  1582	
  1583	  /**
  1584	   * Checks if a message matches an intent.
  1585	   *
  1586	   * @param string $message
  1587	   *   The message to check.
  1588	   * @param string $intent
  1589	   *   The intent key.
  1590	   *
  1591	   * @return bool
  1592	   *   TRUE if the message matches the intent.
  1593	   */
  1594	  protected function matchesIntent(string $message, string $intent) {
  1595	    if (!isset($this->patterns[$intent])) {
  1596	      return FALSE;
  1597	    }
  1598	
  1599	    // Handle aliases.
  1600	    if (isset($this->patterns[$intent]['alias_of'])) {
  1601	      $intent = $this->patterns[$intent]['alias_of'];
  1602	    }
  1603	
  1604	    $pattern_data = $this->patterns[$intent];
  1605	
  1606	    // Check regex patterns.
  1607	    if (!empty($pattern_data['patterns'])) {
  1608	      foreach ($pattern_data['patterns'] as $pattern) {
  1609	        if (preg_match($pattern, $message)) {
  1610	          return TRUE;
  1611	        }
  1612	      }
  1613	    }
  1614	
  1615	    // Check keywords using word boundary matching to avoid false positives
  1616	    // (e.g., "hi" matching inside "child").
  1617	    if (!empty($pattern_data['keywords'])) {
  1618	      $message_lower = strtolower($message);
  1619	      foreach ($pattern_data['keywords'] as $keyword) {
  1620	        $keyword_lower = strtolower($keyword);
  1621	        // Use word boundary pattern for exact word matching.
  1622	        $pattern = '/\b' . preg_quote($keyword_lower, '/') . '\b/';
  1623	        if (preg_match($pattern, $message_lower)) {
  1624	          return TRUE;
  1625	        }
  1626	        // Also check underscore-joined version.
  1627	        $keyword_underscore = str_replace(' ', '_', $keyword_lower);
  1628	        if ($keyword_underscore !== $keyword_lower) {
  1629	          $pattern_underscore = '/\b' . preg_quote($keyword_underscore, '/') . '\b/';
  1630	          if (preg_match($pattern_underscore, $message_lower)) {
  1631	            return TRUE;
  1632	          }
  1633	        }
  1634	      }
  1635	    }
  1636	
  1637	    return FALSE;
  1638	  }
  1639	
  1640	  /**
  1641	   * Resolves an intent alias to its canonical name.
  1642	   *
  1643	   * @param string $intent
  1644	   *   The intent (possibly an alias).
  1645	   *
  1646	   * @return string
  1647	   *   The canonical intent name.
  1648	   */
  1649	  public function resolveIntentAlias(string $intent): string {
  1650	    if (isset($this->patterns[$intent]['alias_of'])) {
  1651	      return $this->patterns[$intent]['alias_of'];
  1652	    }
  1653	    return $intent;
  1654	  }
  1655	
  1656	  /**
  1657	   * Suggests topics matching a query.
  1658	   *
  1659	   * @param string $query
  1660	   *   The search query.
  1661	   *
  1662	   * @return array
  1663	   *   Array of matching topics.
  1664	   */
  1665	  public function suggestTopics(string $query) {
  1666	    return $this->topicResolver->searchTopics($query, 5);
  1667	  }
  1668	
  1669	  /**
  1670	   * Gets detailed information about a topic.
  1671	   *
  1672	   * @param int $topic_id
  1673	   *   The topic term ID.
  1674	   *
  1675	   * @return array|null
  1676	   *   Topic information or NULL if not found.
  1677	   */
  1678	  public function getTopicInfo(int $topic_id) {
  1679	    return $this->topicResolver->getTopicInfo($topic_id);
  1680	  }
  1681	
  1682	  /**
  1683	   * Routes a message and returns debug information.
  1684	   *

  1686	   *   The user's message.
  1687	   *
  1688	   * @return array
  1689	   *   Detailed routing result with extraction data.

  1691	  public function routeWithDebug(string $message): array {
  1692	    return $this->route($message);
  1693	  }
  1694	
  1695	  /**
  1696	   * Gets the safe response template for an intent.
  1697	   *
  1698	   * @param string $intent
  1699	   *   The intent type.
  1700	   * @param array $context
  1701	   *   Additional context (e.g., topic, category).
  1702	   *
  1703	   * @return array
  1704	   *   Response template with message, links, and cta.
  1705	   */
  1706	  public function getSafeResponseTemplate(string $intent, array $context = []): array {
  1707	    $canonical_urls = $this->getCanonicalUrls();
  1708	
  1709	    switch ($intent) {
  1710	      case 'urgent_safety':
  1711	        return $this->getUrgentSafetyTemplate($context['category'] ?? 'urgent_dv');
  1712	
  1713	      case 'apply_for_help':
  1714	        return [
  1715	          'message' => $this->t('Idaho Legal Aid provides free legal help to eligible Idahoans. To find out if you qualify and apply for assistance, you can complete our online application or call our Legal Advice Line.'),
  1716	          'links' => [
  1717	            ['label' => $this->t('Apply for Help'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['apply'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1718	            ['label' => $this->t('Legal Advice Line'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['hotline'], 'type' => 'secondary'],
  1719	          ],
  1720	        ];
  1721	
  1722	      case 'legal_advice_line':
  1723	        return [
  1724	          'message' => $this->t('Our Legal Advice Line can help answer your legal questions and determine if you qualify for ILAS services.'),
  1725	          'links' => [
  1726	            ['label' => $this->t('Contact Legal Advice Line'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['hotline'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1727	          ],
  1728	        ];
  1729	
  1730	      case 'offices_contact':
  1731	        return [
  1732	          'message' => $this->t('Idaho Legal Aid has offices throughout Idaho. Find the location nearest you.'),
  1733	          'links' => [
  1734	            ['label' => $this->t('Find Offices'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['offices'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1735	          ],
  1736	        ];
  1737	
  1738	      case 'forms_finder':
  1739	        $topic = $context['topic'] ?? NULL;
  1740	        if ($topic) {
  1741	          return [
  1742	            'message' => $this->t('Here are forms related to @topic. Need help completing them? Call our Legal Advice Line.', ['@topic' => $topic]),
  1743	            'links' => [
  1744	              ['label' => $this->t('View Forms'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['forms'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1745	              ['label' => $this->t('Legal Advice Line'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['hotline'], 'type' => 'secondary'],
  1746	            ],
  1747	          ];
  1748	        }
  1749	        return [
  1750	          'message' => $this->t('Browse our collection of legal forms. Need help completing them? Call our Legal Advice Line.'),
  1751	          'links' => [
  1752	            ['label' => $this->t('Find Forms'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['forms'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1753	            ['label' => $this->t('Legal Advice Line'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['hotline'], 'type' => 'secondary'],
  1754	          ],
  1755	        ];
  1756	
  1757	      case 'guides_finder':
  1758	        return [
  1759	          'message' => $this->t('Our self-help guides provide step-by-step information on common legal issues.'),
  1760	          'links' => [
  1761	            ['label' => $this->t('Find Guides'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['guides'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1762	          ],
  1763	        ];
  1764	
  1765	      case 'donations':
  1766	        return [
  1767	          'message' => $this->t('Thank you for considering a donation! Your support helps us provide free legal services to Idahoans in need.'),
  1768	          'links' => [
  1769	            ['label' => $this->t('Donate'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['donate'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1770	          ],
  1771	        ];
  1772	
  1773	      case 'feedback':
  1774	        return [
  1775	          'message' => $this->t('We value your feedback. Please share your experience or concerns.'),
  1776	          'links' => [
  1777	            ['label' => $this->t('Give Feedback'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['feedback'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1778	          ],
  1779	        ];
  1780	
  1781	      case 'faq':
  1782	        return [
  1783	          'message' => $this->t('Browse our frequently asked questions for answers to common legal questions.'),
  1784	          'links' => [
  1785	            ['label' => $this->t('View FAQs'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['faq'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1786	          ],
  1787	        ];
  1788	
  1789	      case 'risk_detector':
  1790	        return [
  1791	          'message' => $this->t('Our Legal Risk Detector can help identify potential legal issues you may be facing.'),
  1792	          'links' => [
  1793	            ['label' => $this->t('Take Assessment'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['senior_risk_detector'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1794	          ],
  1795	        ];
  1796	
  1797	      case 'services_overview':
  1798	        return [
  1799	          'message' => $this->t('Idaho Legal Aid Services provides free civil legal help in areas including housing, family law, consumer issues, public benefits, and more.'),
  1800	          'links' => [
  1801	            ['label' => $this->t('Our Services'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['services'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1802	            ['label' => $this->t('Apply for Help'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['apply'], 'type' => 'secondary'],
  1803	          ],
  1804	        ];
  1805	
  1806	      case 'out_of_scope':
  1807	        return $this->getOutOfScopeTemplate($context['reason'] ?? 'general');
  1808	
  1809	      default:
  1810	        return [
  1811	          'message' => $this->t("I'm not sure I understood. Are you looking for help with a legal issue?"),
  1812	          'links' => [
  1813	            ['label' => $this->t('Apply for Help'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['apply'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1814	            ['label' => $this->t('Legal Advice Line'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['hotline'], 'type' => 'secondary'],
  1815	          ],
  1816	        ];
  1817	    }
  1818	  }
  1819	
  1820	  /**
  1821	   * Gets urgent safety response template.
  1822	   *
  1823	   * @param string $category
  1824	   *   The urgent category.
  1825	   *
  1826	   * @return array
  1827	   *   Response template.
  1828	   */
  1829	  protected function getUrgentSafetyTemplate(string $category): array {
  1830	    $canonical_urls = $this->getCanonicalUrls();
  1831	
  1832	    switch ($category) {
  1833	      case 'urgent_dv':
  1834	        return [
  1835	          'message' => $this->t("If you are in immediate danger, please call 911.\n\nFor domestic violence support:\n- National DV Hotline: 1-800-799-7233\n- Idaho DV Hotline: 1-800-669-3176\n\nIdaho Legal Aid can help with protection orders and safety planning."),
  1836	          'links' => [
  1837	            ['label' => $this->t('Call 911'), 'url' => 'tel:911', 'type' => 'emergency'],
  1838	            ['label' => $this->t('National DV Hotline'), 'url' => 'tel:18007997233', 'type' => 'crisis'],
  1839	            ['label' => $this->t('Apply for Help'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['apply'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1840	            ['label' => $this->t('Legal Advice Line'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['hotline'], 'type' => 'secondary'],
  1841	          ],
  1842	          'safety_notice' => TRUE,
  1843	        ];
  1844	
  1845	      case 'urgent_eviction':
  1846	        return [
  1847	          'message' => $this->t("If you have an eviction hearing today or tomorrow, act now:\n\n1. Go to court at the scheduled time\n2. Ask for a continuance if you need more time\n3. Call our Legal Advice Line immediately\n\nWe may be able to help you respond to your eviction."),
  1848	          'links' => [
  1849	            ['label' => $this->t('Legal Advice Line'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['hotline'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1850	            ['label' => $this->t('Apply for Help'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['apply'], 'type' => 'secondary'],
  1851	            ['label' => $this->t('Eviction Forms'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['forms'] . '?topic=eviction', 'type' => 'tertiary'],
  1852	          ],
  1853	          'safety_notice' => TRUE,
  1854	        ];
  1855	
  1856	      case 'urgent_scam':
  1857	        return [
  1858	          'message' => $this->t("If you're experiencing identity theft or a scam:\n\n1. Contact your bank immediately if you shared financial info\n2. Report to FTC: reportfraud.ftc.gov or 1-877-438-4338\n3. Place a fraud alert with credit bureaus\n\nIdaho Legal Aid can help with consumer fraud cases."),
  1859	          'links' => [
  1860	            ['label' => $this->t('Apply for Help'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['apply'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1861	            ['label' => $this->t('Legal Advice Line'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['hotline'], 'type' => 'secondary'],
  1862	            ['label' => $this->t('Consumer Guide'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['service_areas']['consumer'], 'type' => 'tertiary'],
  1863	          ],
  1864	          'safety_notice' => TRUE,
  1865	        ];
  1866	
  1867	      case 'urgent_deadline':
  1868	        return [
  1869	          'message' => $this->t("If you have a legal deadline today or tomorrow:\n\n1. Don't ignore the deadline - this can result in a default judgment\n2. Call our Legal Advice Line now for urgent guidance\n3. If you can't meet the deadline, you may be able to request an extension"),
  1870	          'links' => [
  1871	            ['label' => $this->t('Legal Advice Line'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['hotline'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1872	            ['label' => $this->t('Apply for Help'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['apply'], 'type' => 'secondary'],
  1873	          ],
  1874	          'safety_notice' => TRUE,
  1875	        ];
  1876	
  1877	      default:
  1878	        return [
  1879	          'message' => $this->t("If this is an emergency, please call 911.\n\nFor legal help, contact our Legal Advice Line."),
  1880	          'links' => [
  1881	            ['label' => $this->t('Call 911'), 'url' => 'tel:911', 'type' => 'emergency'],
  1882	            ['label' => $this->t('Legal Advice Line'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['hotline'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1883	          ],
  1884	          'safety_notice' => TRUE,
  1885	        ];
  1886	    }
  1887	  }
  1888	
  1889	  /**
  1890	   * Gets out-of-scope response template.
  1891	   *
  1892	   * @param string $reason
  1893	   *   The reason for out-of-scope.
  1894	   *
  1895	   * @return array
  1896	   *   Response template.
  1897	   */
  1898	  protected function getOutOfScopeTemplate(string $reason): array {
  1899	    $canonical_urls = $this->getCanonicalUrls();
  1900	
  1901	    switch ($reason) {
  1902	      case 'criminal':
  1903	        return [
  1904	          'message' => $this->t("Idaho Legal Aid handles civil legal matters only. For criminal cases:\n\n- If you can't afford an attorney, ask the court to appoint a public defender\n- Idaho State Bar Lawyer Referral: (208) 334-4500\n\nIf you have a civil legal issue related to your situation, we may be able to help."),
  1905	          'links' => [
  1906	            ['label' => $this->t('Our Services'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['services'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1907	            ['label' => $this->t('Legal Advice Line'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['hotline'], 'type' => 'secondary'],
  1908	          ],
  1909	        ];
  1910	
  1911	      case 'immigration':
  1912	        return [
  1913	          'message' => $this->t("Idaho Legal Aid doesn't currently handle immigration cases. For immigration help:\n\n- Catholic Charities of Idaho: (208) 345-6031\n- ACLU of Idaho: (208) 344-9750"),
  1914	          'links' => [
  1915	            ['label' => $this->t('Our Services'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['services'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1916	          ],
  1917	        ];
  1918	
  1919	      case 'out_of_state':
  1920	        return [
  1921	          'message' => $this->t("Idaho Legal Aid serves Idaho residents only. For legal help in other states, LawHelp.org can connect you with legal aid in your state."),
  1922	          'links' => [
  1923	            ['label' => $this->t('LawHelp.org'), 'url' => 'https://www.lawhelp.org', 'type' => 'external'],
  1924	          ],
  1925	        ];
  1926	
  1927	      case 'business':
  1928	        return [
  1929	          'message' => $this->t("Idaho Legal Aid focuses on civil legal issues for low-income individuals. For business matters:\n\n- Idaho Secretary of State: sos.idaho.gov\n- Idaho Small Business Development Center"),
  1930	          'links' => [
  1931	            ['label' => $this->t('Our Services'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['services'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1932	          ],
  1933	        ];
  1934	
  1935	      case 'emergency_911':
  1936	        return [
  1937	          'message' => $this->t("If this is an emergency, please call 911 immediately.\n\nFor non-emergency legal help, contact our Legal Advice Line."),
  1938	          'links' => [
  1939	            ['label' => $this->t('Call 911'), 'url' => 'tel:911', 'type' => 'emergency'],
  1940	            ['label' => $this->t('Legal Advice Line'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['hotline'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1941	          ],
  1942	        ];
  1943	
  1944	      default:
  1945	        return [
  1946	          'message' => $this->t("I understand you're looking for help, but this may be outside what Idaho Legal Aid can assist with. Would you like to explore our services or speak with someone?"),
  1947	          'links' => [
  1948	            ['label' => $this->t('Our Services'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['services'], 'type' => 'primary'],
  1949	            ['label' => $this->t('Legal Advice Line'), 'url' => $canonical_urls['hotline'], 'type' => 'secondary'],
  1950	          ],
  1951	        ];
  1952	    }
  1953	  }
  1954	
  1955	  /**
  1956	   * Checks if message contains topic-specific keywords.
  1957	   *
  1958	   * Used to prevent greeting false positives on queries like
  1959	   * "child custody forms" which should not be detected as greetings.
  1960	   *
  1961	   * @param string $message
  1962	   *   The message to check.
  1963	   *
  1964	   * @return bool
  1965	   *   TRUE if the message contains topic keywords.
  1966	   */
  1967	  protected function containsTopicKeywords(string $message): bool {
  1968	    $message_lower = strtolower($message);
  1969	
  1970	    // Topic keywords that should prevent greeting detection.
  1971	    $topic_keywords = [
  1972	      // Legal topics.
  1973	      'custody', 'divorce', 'eviction', 'landlord', 'tenant',
  1974	      'bankruptcy', 'foreclosure', 'guardianship', 'adoption',
  1975	      'visitation', 'protection', 'restraining', 'support',
  1976	      'debt', 'collection', 'garnishment', 'scam', 'fraud',
  1977	      // Actions/resources.
  1978	      'forms', 'form', 'guides', 'guide', 'apply', 'application',
  1979	      'hotline', 'office', 'location', 'address', 'hours',
  1980	      'donate', 'donation', 'feedback', 'complaint', 'faq',
  1981	      'services', 'eligibility', 'qualify',
  1982	      // Family law.
  1983	      'child', 'children', 'spouse', 'husband', 'wife', 'partner',
  1984	      'family', 'domestic', 'paternity', 'alimony', 'separation',
  1985	      // Housing.
  1986	      'rent', 'lease', 'apartment', 'housing', 'home', 'mortgage',
  1987	      // Consumer.
  1988	      'credit', 'identity', 'theft', 'repossession', 'payday',
  1989	      // Employment.
  1990	      'fired', 'wages', 'employer', 'harassment', 'discrimination',
  1991	      // Benefits.
  1992	      'medicaid', 'medicare', 'snap', 'ssi', 'ssdi', 'benefits',
  1993	      'disability', 'insurance',
  1994	      // Safety.
  1995	      'violence', 'abusive', 'stalking', 'threatened', 'deadline',
  1996	      // Spanish equivalents.
  1997	      'custodia', 'divorcio', 'desalojo', 'formulario', 'formularios',
  1998	      'oficina', 'ayuda', 'abogado', 'servicios', 'violencia',
  1999	    ];
  2000	
  2001	    foreach ($topic_keywords as $keyword) {
  2002	      // Use word boundary matching.
  2003	      $pattern = '/\b' . preg_quote($keyword, '/') . '\b/i';
  2004	      if (preg_match($pattern, $message_lower)) {
  2005	        return TRUE;
  2006	      }
  2007	    }
  2008	
  2009	    return FALSE;
  2010	  }
  2011	
  2012	  /**
  2013	   * Gets canonical URLs.
