   263	        $this->logger->warning('Safety alert: skipping invalid email address @address', [
   264	          '@address' => $address,
   265	        ]);
   266	        continue;
   267	      }
   268	
   269	      $this->mailManager->mail(
   270	        'ilas_site_assistant',
   271	        'safety_alert',
   272	        $address,
   273	        'en',
   274	        $params
   275	      );
   276	    }
   277	  }
   278	
   279	}

===== web/modules/custom/ilas_site_assistant/src/Service/LlmRateLimiter.php =====
     1	<?php
     2	
     3	namespace Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service;
     4	
     5	use Drupal\Core\Config\ConfigFactoryInterface;
     6	use Drupal\Core\State\StateInterface;
     7	use Psr\Log\LoggerInterface;
     8	
     9	/**
    10	 * Global hourly rate limiter for LLM API calls.
    11	 *
    12	 * Tracks total LLM API calls across all users within a sliding window.
    13	 * When the limit is reached, new calls are skipped and the rule-based
    14	 * fallback path is used instead.
    15	 *
    16	 * State is stored in Drupal's State API (key_value table), which works
    17	 * on all Pantheon tiers without Redis.
    18	 */
    19	class LlmRateLimiter {
    20	
    21	  /**
    22	   * State API key for rate limit data.
    23	   */
    24	  const STATE_KEY = 'ilas_site_assistant.llm_rate_limit';
    25	
    26	  /**
    27	   * The state service.
    28	   *
    29	   * @var \Drupal\Core\State\StateInterface
    30	   */
    31	  protected StateInterface $state;
    32	
    33	  /**
    34	   * The config factory.
    35	   *
    36	   * @var \Drupal\Core\Config\ConfigFactoryInterface
    37	   */
    38	  protected ConfigFactoryInterface $configFactory;
    39	
    40	  /**
    41	   * The logger.
    42	   *
    43	   * @var \Psr\Log\LoggerInterface
    44	   */
    45	  protected LoggerInterface $logger;
    46	
    47	  /**
    48	   * Whether the last isAllowed() call returned FALSE.
    49	   *
    50	   * @var bool
    51	   */
    52	  protected bool $lastWasLimited = FALSE;
    53	
    54	  /**
    55	   * Constructs an LlmRateLimiter.
    56	   */
    57	  public function __construct(
    58	    StateInterface $state,
    59	    ConfigFactoryInterface $config_factory,
    60	    LoggerInterface $logger,
    61	  ) {
    62	    $this->state = $state;
    63	    $this->configFactory = $config_factory;
    64	    $this->logger = $logger;
    65	  }
    66	
    67	  /**
    68	   * Checks if an LLM call is allowed under the global rate limit.
    69	   *
    70	   * This is a read-only check — it does NOT increment the counter.
    71	   * Call recordCall() after a successful API call to increment.
    72	   *
    73	   * @return bool
    74	   *   TRUE if under limit (or limiter disabled), FALSE if limit reached.
    75	   */
    76	  public function isAllowed(): bool {
    77	    $maxPerHour = $this->getConfig('max_per_hour');
    78	
    79	    // max_per_hour: 0 disables the limiter entirely.
    80	    if ($maxPerHour === 0) {
    81	      $this->lastWasLimited = FALSE;
    82	      return TRUE;
    83	    }
    84	
    85	    $data = $this->getStateData();
    86	    $windowSeconds = $this->getConfig('window_seconds');
    87	
    88	    // If the window has expired, the counter would reset on next recordCall().
    89	    // For the check, treat an expired window as allowed.
    90	    if ((time() - $data['window_start']) >= $windowSeconds) {
    91	      $this->lastWasLimited = FALSE;
    92	      return TRUE;
    93	    }
    94	
    95	    // Check if current count is at or above the limit.
    96	    if ($data['count'] >= $maxPerHour) {
    97	      $this->lastWasLimited = TRUE;
    98	      return FALSE;
    99	    }
   100	
   101	    $this->lastWasLimited = FALSE;
   102	    return TRUE;
   103	  }
   104	
   105	  /**
   106	   * Records a successful LLM API call.
   107	   *
   108	   * Called ONLY after a successful API response (not on cache hits or errors).
   109	   * Resets the window lazily if expired, then increments the counter.
   110	   * Logs at 80% (notice) and 100% (warning) of the limit.
   111	   */
   112	  public function recordCall(): void {
   113	    $maxPerHour = $this->getConfig('max_per_hour');
   114	
   115	    // If limiter is disabled, nothing to record.
   116	    if ($maxPerHour === 0) {
   117	      return;
   118	    }
   119	
   120	    $data = $this->getStateData();
   121	    $windowSeconds = $this->getConfig('window_seconds');
   122	
   123	    // Lazy window reset: if window expired, start fresh.
   124	    if ((time() - $data['window_start']) >= $windowSeconds) {
   125	      $data = [
   126	        'count' => 1,
   127	        'window_start' => time(),
   128	      ];
   129	      $this->setStateData($data);
   130	      return;
   131	    }
   132	
   133	    // Increment counter.
   134	    $data['count']++;
   135	    $this->setStateData($data);
   136	
   137	    // Log at threshold milestones.
   138	    $threshold80 = (int) ceil($maxPerHour * 0.8);
   139	    if ($data['count'] === $threshold80) {
   140	      $this->logger->notice('LLM global rate limit at 80% (@count/@max) within current window.', [
   141	        '@count' => $data['count'],
   142	        '@max' => $maxPerHour,
   143	      ]);
   144	    }
   145	
   146	    if ($data['count'] >= $maxPerHour) {
   147	      $this->logger->warning('LLM global rate limit reached (@count/@max). Subsequent calls will be skipped until window resets.', [
   148	        '@count' => $data['count'],
   149	        '@max' => $maxPerHour,
   150	      ]);
   151	    }
   152	  }
   153	
   154	  /**
   155	   * Returns whether the last isAllowed() call was rate-limited.
   156	   *
   157	   * @return bool
   158	   *   TRUE if the last isAllowed() returned FALSE.
   159	   */
   160	  public function wasRateLimited(): bool {
   161	    return $this->lastWasLimited;
   162	  }
   163	
   164	  /**
   165	   * Returns the current rate limit state for debugging.
   166	   *
   167	   * @return array
   168	   *   Array with 'count' and 'window_start' keys.
   169	   */
   170	  public function getCurrentState(): array {
   171	    return $this->getStateData();
   172	  }
   173	
   174	  /**
   175	   * Force-resets the rate limit counter.
   176	   */
   177	  public function reset(): void {
   178	    $this->setStateData($this->defaultState());
   179	    $this->lastWasLimited = FALSE;
   180	  }
   181	
   182	  /**
   183	   * Reads rate limit state from the State API.
   184	   *
   185	   * @return array
   186	   *   State array with 'count' and 'window_start'.
   187	   */
   188	  protected function getStateData(): array {
   189	    $data = $this->state->get(self::STATE_KEY);
   190	    if (!is_array($data) || !isset($data['count'])) {
   191	      return $this->defaultState();
   192	    }
   193	    return $data;
   194	  }
   195	
   196	  /**
   197	   * Persists rate limit state.
   198	   *
   199	   * @param array $data
   200	   *   The state data to persist.
   201	   */
   202	  protected function setStateData(array $data): void {
   203	    $this->state->set(self::STATE_KEY, $data);
   204	  }
   205	
   206	  /**
   207	   * Returns the default (fresh) state.
   208	   *
   209	   * @return array
   210	   *   Default state array.
   211	   */
   212	  protected function defaultState(): array {
   213	    return [
   214	      'count' => 0,
   215	      'window_start' => time(),
   216	    ];
   217	  }
   218	
   219	  /**
   220	   * Gets a rate limit config value.
   221	   *
   222	   * @param string $key
   223	   *   The config key under llm.global_rate_limit.
   224	   *
   225	   * @return int
   226	   *   The config value.
   227	   */
   228	  protected function getConfig(string $key): int {
   229	    $defaults = [
   230	      'max_per_hour' => 500,
   231	      'window_seconds' => 3600,
   232	    ];
   233	    $config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   234	    $value = $config->get('llm.global_rate_limit.' . $key);
   235	    return (int) ($value ?? $defaults[$key] ?? 0);
   236	  }
   237	
   238	}

===== web/modules/custom/ilas_site_assistant/src/Service/LlmCircuitBreaker.php =====
     1	<?php
     2	
     3	namespace Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service;
     4	
     5	use Drupal\Core\Config\ConfigFactoryInterface;
     6	use Drupal\Core\State\StateInterface;
     7	use Psr\Log\LoggerInterface;
     8	
     9	/**
    10	 * Circuit breaker for LLM API calls.
    11	 *
    12	 * Stops calling the LLM API after detecting sustained failures, immediately
    13	 * returning to the rule-based fallback path. After a cooldown period, allows
    14	 * a single probe request through (half-open state) to test recovery.
    15	 *
    16	 * State machine:
    17	 *   closed  --[failures >= threshold]--> open
    18	 *   open    --[cooldown elapsed]-------> half_open
    19	 *   half_open --[success]--------------> closed
    20	 *   half_open --[failure]--------------> open
    21	 */
    22	class LlmCircuitBreaker {
    23	
    24	  /**
    25	   * State API key for circuit breaker data.
    26	   */
    27	  const STATE_KEY = 'ilas_site_assistant.llm_circuit_breaker';
    28	
    29	  /**
    30	   * The state service.
    31	   *
    32	   * @var \Drupal\Core\State\StateInterface
    33	   */
    34	  protected StateInterface $state;
    35	
    36	  /**
    37	   * The config factory.
    38	   *
    39	   * @var \Drupal\Core\Config\ConfigFactoryInterface
    40	   */
    41	  protected ConfigFactoryInterface $configFactory;
    42	
    43	  /**
    44	   * The logger.
    45	   *
    46	   * @var \Psr\Log\LoggerInterface
    47	   */
    48	  protected LoggerInterface $logger;
    49	
    50	  /**
    51	   * Constructs an LlmCircuitBreaker.
    52	   */
    53	  public function __construct(
    54	    StateInterface $state,
    55	    ConfigFactoryInterface $config_factory,
    56	    LoggerInterface $logger,
    57	  ) {
    58	    $this->state = $state;
    59	    $this->configFactory = $config_factory;
    60	    $this->logger = $logger;
    61	  }
    62	
    63	  /**
    64	   * Checks if the circuit allows a request through.
    65	   *
    66	   * @return bool
    67	   *   TRUE if a request is allowed (closed or half-open), FALSE if open.
    68	   */
    69	  public function isAvailable(): bool {
    70	    $data = $this->getState();
    71	
    72	    if ($data['state'] === 'closed') {
    73	      return TRUE;
    74	    }
    75	
    76	    if ($data['state'] === 'open') {
    77	      $cooldown = $this->getConfig('cooldown_seconds');
    78	      if ((time() - $data['opened_at']) >= $cooldown) {
    79	        // Transition to half-open: allow one probe request.
    80	        $data['state'] = 'half_open';
    81	        $this->setState($data);
    82	        $this->logger->notice('LLM circuit breaker transitioning from open to half_open after @cooldown s cooldown.', [
    83	          '@cooldown' => $cooldown,
    84	        ]);
    85	        return TRUE;
    86	      }
    87	      return FALSE;
    88	    }
    89	
    90	    // half_open: allow the probe request through.
    91	    return TRUE;
    92	  }
    93	
    94	  /**
    95	   * Records a successful API call.
    96	   */
    97	  public function recordSuccess(): void {
    98	    $data = $this->getState();
    99	
   100	    if ($data['state'] === 'half_open') {
   101	      // Probe succeeded — close the circuit.
   102	      $this->logger->info('LLM circuit breaker closing after successful half-open probe.');
   103	      $this->setState($this->defaultState());
   104	      return;
   105	    }
   106	
   107	    if ($data['state'] === 'closed' && $data['consecutive_failures'] > 0) {
   108	      // Reset failure counter on success.
   109	      $data['consecutive_failures'] = 0;
   110	      $data['last_failure_time'] = 0;
   111	      $this->setState($data);
   112	    }
   113	  }
   114	
   115	  /**
   116	   * Records a failed API call (after all retries exhausted).
   117	   */
   118	  public function recordFailure(): void {
   119	    $data = $this->getState();
   120	
   121	    if ($data['state'] === 'half_open') {
   122	      // Probe failed — reopen the circuit.
   123	      $data['state'] = 'open';
   124	      $data['opened_at'] = time();
   125	      $data['consecutive_failures'] = $this->getConfig('failure_threshold');
   126	      $this->setState($data);
   127	      $this->logger->warning('LLM circuit breaker reopened after failed half-open probe.');
   128	      return;
   129	    }
   130	
   131	    // Closed state: count failures.
   132	    $now = time();
   133	    $window = $this->getConfig('failure_window_seconds');
   134	
   135	    // If last failure is outside the window, reset counter.
   136	    if ($data['last_failure_time'] > 0 && ($now - $data['last_failure_time']) > $window) {
   137	      $data['consecutive_failures'] = 0;
   138	    }
   139	
   140	    $data['consecutive_failures']++;
   141	    $data['last_failure_time'] = $now;
   142	
   143	    $threshold = $this->getConfig('failure_threshold');
   144	    if ($data['consecutive_failures'] >= $threshold) {
   145	      // Trip the circuit.
   146	      $data['state'] = 'open';
   147	      $data['opened_at'] = $now;
   148	      $this->logger->warning('LLM circuit breaker opened after @count consecutive failures within @window s.', [
   149	        '@count' => $data['consecutive_failures'],
   150	        '@window' => $window,
   151	      ]);
   152	    }
   153	
   154	    $this->setState($data);
   155	  }
   156	
   157	  /**
   158	   * Returns the current circuit breaker state.
   159	   *
   160	   * @return array
   161	   *   State array with keys: state, consecutive_failures, last_failure_time,
   162	   *   opened_at.
   163	   */
   164	  public function getState(): array {
   165	    $data = $this->state->get(self::STATE_KEY);
   166	    if (!is_array($data) || !isset($data['state'])) {
   167	      return $this->defaultState();
   168	    }
   169	    return $data;
   170	  }
   171	
   172	  /**
   173	   * Force-resets the circuit breaker to closed state.
   174	   */
   175	  public function reset(): void {
   176	    $this->setState($this->defaultState());
   177	    $this->logger->info('LLM circuit breaker manually reset to closed.');
   178	  }
   179	
   180	  /**
   181	   * Returns the default (closed) state.
   182	   *
   183	   * @return array
   184	   *   Default state array.
   185	   */
   186	  protected function defaultState(): array {
   187	    return [
   188	      'state' => 'closed',
   189	      'consecutive_failures' => 0,
   190	      'last_failure_time' => 0,
   191	      'opened_at' => 0,
   192	    ];
   193	  }
   194	
   195	  /**
   196	   * Persists circuit breaker state.
   197	   *
   198	   * @param array $data
   199	   *   The state data to persist.
   200	   */
   201	  protected function setState(array $data): void {
   202	    $this->state->set(self::STATE_KEY, $data);
   203	  }
   204	
   205	  /**
   206	   * Gets a circuit breaker config value.
   207	   *
   208	   * @param string $key
   209	   *   The config key under llm.circuit_breaker.
   210	   *
   211	   * @return int
   212	   *   The config value.
   213	   */
   214	  protected function getConfig(string $key): int {
   215	    $defaults = [
   216	      'failure_threshold' => 3,
   217	      'failure_window_seconds' => 60,
   218	      'cooldown_seconds' => 300,
   219	    ];
   220	    $config = $this->configFactory->get('ilas_site_assistant.settings');
   221	    $value = $config->get('llm.circuit_breaker.' . $key);
   222	    return (int) ($value ?? $defaults[$key] ?? 0);
   223	  }
   224	
   225	}

===== web/modules/custom/ilas_site_assistant/src/Service/PerformanceMonitor.php =====
     1	<?php
     2	
     3	namespace Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Service;
     4	
     5	use Drupal\Core\State\StateInterface;
     6	use Drupal\Core\Logger\LoggerChannelInterface;
     7	
     8	/**
     9	 * Tracks chatbot API performance metrics for monitoring.
    10	 *
    11	 * Stores rolling metrics in Drupal state for lightweight monitoring.
    12	 * Use with an external alerting system or expose via /admin endpoint.
    13	 */
    14	class PerformanceMonitor {
    15	
    16	  /**
    17	   * State key for metrics storage.
    18	   */
    19	  const STATE_KEY = 'ilas_site_assistant.performance_metrics';
    20	
    21	  /**
    22	   * Rolling window size (number of requests to track).
    23	   */
    24	  const WINDOW_SIZE = 1000;
    25	
    26	  /**
    27	   * Alert thresholds.
    28	   */
    29	  const THRESHOLD_P95_MS = 2000;
    30	  const THRESHOLD_ERROR_RATE = 0.05;
    31	
    32	  /**
    33	   * The state service.
    34	   *
    35	   * @var \Drupal\Core\State\StateInterface
    36	   */
    37	  protected $state;
    38	
    39	  /**
    40	   * The logger.
    41	   *
    42	   * @var \Drupal\Core\Logger\LoggerChannelInterface
    43	   */
    44	  protected $logger;
    45	
    46	  /**
    47	   * Constructs a PerformanceMonitor.
    48	   */
    49	  public function __construct(StateInterface $state, LoggerChannelInterface $logger) {
    50	    $this->state = $state;
    51	    $this->logger = $logger;
    52	  }
    53	
    54	  /**
    55	   * Records a request's performance.
    56	   *
    57	   * @param float $duration_ms
    58	   *   Request duration in milliseconds.
    59	   * @param bool $success
    60	   *   Whether the request succeeded.
    61	   * @param string $scenario
    62	   *   The query type (short, navigation, retrieval).
    63	   * @param string $request_id
    64	   *   Optional per-request correlation ID for log tracing.
    65	   */
    66	  public function recordRequest(float $duration_ms, bool $success, string $scenario = 'unknown', string $request_id = ''): void {
    67	    $metrics = $this->getMetrics();
    68	
    69	    // Add to rolling window.
    70	    $metrics['requests'][] = [
    71	      'time' => time(),
    72	      'duration' => $duration_ms,
    73	      'success' => $success,
    74	      'scenario' => $scenario,
    75	    ];
    76	
    77	    // Trim to window size.
    78	    if (count($metrics['requests']) > self::WINDOW_SIZE) {
    79	      $metrics['requests'] = array_slice($metrics['requests'], -self::WINDOW_SIZE);
    80	    }
    81	
    82	    // Update counters.
    83	    $metrics['total_requests']++;
    84	    if (!$success) {
    85	      $metrics['total_errors']++;
    86	    }
    87	
    88	    // Check thresholds and log warnings.
    89	    $this->checkThresholds($metrics);
    90	
    91	    $this->state->set(self::STATE_KEY, $metrics);
    92	  }
    93	
    94	  /**
    95	   * Gets current metrics.
    96	   *
    97	   * @return array
    98	   *   The metrics array.
    99	   */
   100	  public function getMetrics(): array {
   101	    $default = [
   102	      'requests' => [],
   103	      'total_requests' => 0,
   104	      'total_errors' => 0,
   105	      'last_alert' => 0,
   106	    ];
   107	
   108	    return $this->state->get(self::STATE_KEY, $default);
   109	  }
   110	
   111	  /**
   112	   * Calculates summary statistics.
   113	   *
   114	   * @return array
   115	   *   Summary with p50, p95, p99, error_rate, throughput.
   116	   */
   117	  public function getSummary(): array {
   118	    $metrics = $this->getMetrics();
   119	    $requests = $metrics['requests'];
   120	
   121	    if (empty($requests)) {
   122	      return [
   123	        'p50' => 0,
   124	        'p95' => 0,
   125	        'p99' => 0,
   126	        'avg' => 0,
   127	        'error_rate' => 0,
   128	        'throughput_per_min' => 0,
   129	        'sample_size' => 0,
   130	        'status' => 'no_data',
   131	      ];
   132	    }
   133	
   134	    // Extract durations and sort.
   135	    $durations = array_column($requests, 'duration');
   136	    sort($durations);
   137	
   138	    $count = count($durations);
   139	    $errors = count(array_filter($requests, fn($r) => !$r['success']));
   140	
   141	    // Calculate percentiles.
   142	    $p50 = $durations[(int) floor($count * 0.50)] ?? 0;
   143	    $p95 = $durations[(int) floor($count * 0.95)] ?? 0;
   144	    $p99 = $durations[(int) floor($count * 0.99)] ?? 0;
   145	    $avg = array_sum($durations) / $count;
   146	
   147	    // Calculate throughput (requests in last minute).
   148	    $one_minute_ago = time() - 60;
   149	    $recent = array_filter($requests, fn($r) => $r['time'] >= $one_minute_ago);
   150	    $throughput = count($recent);
   151	
   152	    // Determine status.
   153	    $error_rate = $count > 0 ? $errors / $count : 0;
   154	    $status = 'healthy';
   155	    if ($p95 > self::THRESHOLD_P95_MS) {
   156	      $status = 'degraded_latency';
   157	    }
   158	    if ($error_rate > self::THRESHOLD_ERROR_RATE) {
   159	      $status = 'degraded_errors';
   160	    }
   161	
   162	    return [
   163	      'p50' => round($p50, 1),
   164	      'p95' => round($p95, 1),
   165	      'p99' => round($p99, 1),
   166	      'avg' => round($avg, 1),
   167	      'error_rate' => round($error_rate * 100, 2),
   168	      'throughput_per_min' => $throughput,
   169	      'sample_size' => $count,
   170	      'status' => $status,
   171	      'thresholds' => [
   172	        'p95_threshold_ms' => self::THRESHOLD_P95_MS,
   173	        'error_rate_threshold' => self::THRESHOLD_ERROR_RATE * 100,
   174	      ],
   175	    ];
   176	  }
   177	
   178	  /**
   179	   * Checks thresholds and logs warnings.
   180	   *
   181	   * Uses the in-memory $metrics array (which includes the current request)
   182	   * instead of re-reading state. Mutates $metrics['last_alert'] by reference
   183	   * so the single state->set() in recordRequest() persists the cooldown.
   184	   */
   185	  protected function checkThresholds(array &$metrics): void {
   186	    // Only alert once per 5 minutes to avoid log spam.
   187	    if (time() - $metrics['last_alert'] < 300) {
   188	      return;
   189	    }
   190	
   191	    $requests = $metrics['requests'];
   192	    if (empty($requests)) {
   193	      return;
   194	    }
   195	
   196	    // In-memory summary calculation (avoids stale state re-read).
   197	    $durations = array_column($requests, 'duration');
   198	    sort($durations);
   199	    $count = count($durations);
   200	    $errors = count(array_filter($requests, fn($r) => !$r['success']));
   201	    $p95 = $durations[(int) floor($count * 0.95)] ?? 0;
   202	    $error_rate = $count > 0 ? $errors / $count : 0;
   203	
   204	    $alerted = FALSE;
   205	
   206	    if ($p95 > self::THRESHOLD_P95_MS) {
   207	      $this->logger->warning('Chatbot API latency degraded: P95 = @p95ms (threshold: @threshold ms)', [
   208	        '@p95' => round($p95, 1),
   209	        '@threshold' => self::THRESHOLD_P95_MS,
   210	      ]);
   211	      $alerted = TRUE;
   212	    }
   213	
   214	    if ($error_rate > self::THRESHOLD_ERROR_RATE) {
   215	      $this->logger->warning('Chatbot API error rate elevated: @rate% (threshold: @threshold%)', [
   216	        '@rate' => round($error_rate * 100, 2),
   217	        '@threshold' => self::THRESHOLD_ERROR_RATE * 100,
   218	      ]);
   219	      $alerted = TRUE;
   220	    }
   221	
   222	    if ($alerted) {
   223	      $metrics['last_alert'] = time();
   224	    }
   225	  }
   226	
   227	  /**
   228	   * Resets metrics (for testing or maintenance).
   229	   */
   230	  public function reset(): void {
   231	    $this->state->delete(self::STATE_KEY);
   232	  }
   233	
   234	}

===== web/modules/custom/ilas_site_assistant/src/Commands/KbImportCommands.php =====
     1	<?php
     2	
     3	namespace Drupal\ilas_site_assistant\Commands;
     4	
     5	use Drupal\Core\Entity\EntityTypeManagerInterface;
     6	use Drupal\paragraphs\Entity\Paragraph;
     7	use Drush\Commands\DrushCommands;
     8	use Symfony\Component\Yaml\Yaml;
     9	
    10	/**
    11	 * Drush commands for importing KB content.
    12	 */
    13	class KbImportCommands extends DrushCommands {
    14	
    15	  /**
    16	   * The entity type manager.
    17	   *
    18	   * @var \Drupal\Core\Entity\EntityTypeManagerInterface
    19	   */
    20	  protected $entityTypeManager;
    21	
    22	  /**
    23	   * Constructs a KbImportCommands object.
    24	   */
    25	  public function __construct(EntityTypeManagerInterface $entity_type_manager) {
    26	    parent::__construct();
    27	    $this->entityTypeManager = $entity_type_manager;
    28	  }
    29	
    30	  /**
    31	   * Import FAQ stubs from YAML file.
    32	   *
    33	   * @param string $file
    34	   *   Path to the YAML file containing FAQ stubs.
    35	   * @param array $options
    36	   *   Command options.
    37	   *
    38	   * @command ilas:kb-import
    39	   * @aliases kb-import
    40	   * @option dry-run Show what would be imported without creating entities.
    41	   * @option node-id Node ID to attach paragraphs to (required for actual import).
    42	   * @usage ilas:kb-import config/kb-stubs/top5-gap-faq-stubs.yml --dry-run
    43	   *   Preview FAQ import.
    44	   * @usage ilas:kb-import config/kb-stubs/top5-gap-faq-stubs.yml --node-id=123
    45	   *   Import FAQs to node 123.
    46	   */
    47	  public function kbImport($file, array $options = ['dry-run' => FALSE, 'node-id' => NULL]) {
    48	    $module_path = \Drupal::service('extension.list.module')->getPath('ilas_site_assistant');
    49	    $file_path = $module_path . '/' . $file;
    50	
    51	    if (!file_exists($file_path)) {
    52	      // Try absolute path.
    53	      $file_path = $file;
    54	    }
    55	
    56	    if (!file_exists($file_path)) {
    57	      $this->logger()->error("File not found: {$file_path}");
    58	      return 1;
    59	    }
    60	
    61	    $this->logger()->notice("Loading FAQ stubs from: {$file_path}");
    62	
    63	    try {
    64	      $data = Yaml::parseFile($file_path);
    65	    }
    66	    catch (\Exception $e) {
    67	      $this->logger()->error("Failed to parse YAML: " . $e->getMessage());
    68	      return 1;
    69	    }
    70	
    71	    if (empty($data['faq_stubs'])) {
    72	      $this->logger()->error("No faq_stubs found in file.");
    73	      return 1;
    74	    }
    75	
    76	    $stubs = $data['faq_stubs'];
    77	    $this->logger()->notice("Found " . count($stubs) . " FAQ stubs.");
    78	
    79	    $dry_run = $options['dry-run'];
    80	    $node_id = $options['node-id'];
    81	
    82	    if (!$dry_run && empty($node_id)) {
    83	      $this->logger()->error("--node-id is required for actual import. Use --dry-run to preview.");
    84	      return 1;
    85	    }
    86	
    87	    $node = NULL;
    88	    if (!$dry_run) {
    89	      $node = $this->entityTypeManager->getStorage('node')->load($node_id);
    90	      if (!$node) {
    91	        $this->logger()->error("Node {$node_id} not found.");
    92	        return 1;
    93	      }
    94	      $this->logger()->notice("Will attach paragraphs to node: " . $node->label());
    95	    }
    96	
    97	    $created = 0;
    98	    foreach ($stubs as $stub) {
    99	      $this->logger()->notice("Processing: {$stub['id']}");
   100	      $this->logger()->notice("  Question: " . substr($stub['question'], 0, 60) . "...");
   101	      $this->logger()->notice("  Category: {$stub['category']}");
   102	      $this->logger()->notice("  Anchor: {$stub['anchor_id']}");
   103	
   104	      if (!$dry_run) {
   105	        // Create the paragraph.
   106	        $paragraph = Paragraph::create([
   107	          'type' => 'faq_item',
   108	          'field_faq_question' => $stub['question'],
   109	          'field_faq_answer' => [
   110	            'value' => $stub['answer'],
   111	            'format' => 'basic_html',
   112	          ],
   113	        ]);
   114	
   115	        // Add anchor_id field if it exists.
   116	        if ($paragraph->hasField('field_anchor_id')) {
   117	          $paragraph->set('field_anchor_id', $stub['anchor_id']);
   118	        }
   119	
   120	        $paragraph->save();
   121	        $created++;
   122	
   123	        $this->logger()->success("  Created paragraph ID: " . $paragraph->id());
   124	
   125	        // Note: Attaching to node requires knowing the field name.
   126	        // This would typically be done manually or with additional logic.
   127	      }
   128	    }
   129	
   130	    if ($dry_run) {
   131	      $this->logger()->notice("DRY RUN complete. Would create " . count($stubs) . " FAQ paragraphs.");
   132	    }
   133	    else {
   134	      $this->logger()->success("Created {$created} FAQ paragraphs.");
   135	      $this->logger()->notice("NOTE: Paragraphs created but not attached to node. Attach manually via the node edit form.");
   136	    }
   137	
   138	    return 0;
   139	  }
   140	
   141	  /**
   142	   * List available KB stub files.
   143	   *
   144	   * @command ilas:kb-list
   145	   * @aliases kb-list
   146	   */
   147	  public function kbList() {
   148	    $module_path = \Drupal::service('extension.list.module')->getPath('ilas_site_assistant');
   149	    $stub_dir = $module_path . '/config/kb-stubs';
   150	
   151	    if (!is_dir($stub_dir)) {
   152	      $this->logger()->notice("No kb-stubs directory found.");
   153	      return;
   154	    }
   155	
   156	    $files = glob($stub_dir . '/*.yml');
   157	    if (empty($files)) {
   158	      $this->logger()->notice("No YAML files found in kb-stubs directory.");
   159	      return;
   160	    }
   161	
   162	    $this->logger()->notice("Available KB stub files:");
   163	    foreach ($files as $file) {
   164	      $this->logger()->notice("  - " . basename($file));
   165	
   166	      try {
   167	        $data = Yaml::parseFile($file);
   168	        if (!empty($data['faq_stubs'])) {
   169	          $this->logger()->notice("    Contains " . count($data['faq_stubs']) . " FAQ stubs");
   170	        }
   171	      }
   172	      catch (\Exception $e) {
   173	        $this->logger()->warning("    Failed to parse: " . $e->getMessage());
   174	      }
   175	    }
   176	  }
   177	
   178	}

===== web/modules/custom/ilas_site_assistant/js/assistant-widget.js =====
     1	/**
     2	 * @file
     3	 * Aila Chat Widget
     4	 *
     5	 * Aila (eye-luh) is the Idaho Legal Aid Services chat assistant.
     6	 * The name is derived from ILAS. Provides FAQ search, resource discovery,
     7	 * and navigation assistance.
     8	 *
     9	 * Hardening (v2):
    10	 * - AbortController fetch timeout (15 s default).
    11	 * - Status-aware error handling: 429 (reads Retry-After), 403, 5xx, offline,
    12	 *   timeout — each with user-facing recovery guidance.
    13	 * - isSending guard prevents duplicate sends / race conditions.
    14	 * - Focus trap lifecycle: single listener, removed on close, dynamic
    15	 *   focusable query (handles elements added after open).
    16	 * - Typing indicator has role="status" + aria-label for screen readers.
    17	 * - sanitizeUrl blocks javascript: / data: / vbscript: schemes.
    18	 * - escapeAttr for all attribute-context interpolations.
    19	 */
    20	(function (Drupal, drupalSettings, once) {
    21	  'use strict';
    22	
    23	  // Enable for scroll-related debug logging.
    24	  var SCROLL_DEBUG = false;
    25	
    26	  /**
    27	   * Shared Scroll Manager.
    28	   *
    29	   * Tracks whether the user is near the bottom of a scroll container and
    30	   * conditionally auto-scrolls when new content arrives. Shows a "Jump to
    31	   * latest" button when the user has scrolled away and new messages appear.
    32	   *
    33	   * @param {HTMLElement} container - The scrollable chat message list.
    34	   * @param {number} threshold - Pixel distance from bottom considered "at bottom".
    35	   */
    36	  function ScrollManager(container, threshold) {
    37	    this.container = container;
    38	    this.threshold = threshold || 80;
    39	    this.isAtBottom = true;
    40	    this.hasNewContent = false;
    41	    this.jumpBtn = null;
    42	    this.sentinel = null;
    43	
    44	    this._init();
    45	  }
    46	
    47	  ScrollManager.prototype = {
    48	    _init: function () {
    49	      // Create bottom sentinel.
    50	      this.sentinel = document.createElement('div');
    51	      this.sentinel.className = 'chat-bottom-sentinel';
    52	      this.sentinel.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
    53	      this.container.appendChild(this.sentinel);
    54	
    55	      // Create jump-to-latest button.
    56	      this.jumpBtn = document.createElement('button');
    57	      this.jumpBtn.type = 'button';
    58	      this.jumpBtn.className = 'chat-jump-btn';
    59	      this.jumpBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', Drupal.t('Jump to latest messages'));
    60	      this.jumpBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-arrow-down" aria-hidden="true"></i> ' + Drupal.t('New messages');
    61	      this.jumpBtn.hidden = true;
    62	
    63	      // Insert button inside the chat container after the sentinel.
    64	      // Uses position: sticky to float at the bottom of the visible area.
    65	      this.container.appendChild(this.jumpBtn);
    66	
    67	      // Bind events.
    68	      var self = this;
    69	      this.container.addEventListener('scroll', function () {
    70	        self._onScroll();
    71	      }, { passive: true });
    72	
    73	      this.jumpBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
    74	        self.scrollToBottom();
    75	        self._hideJumpBtn();
    76	      });
    77	    },
    78	
    79	    /**
    80	     * Check if user is near the bottom.
    81	     */
    82	    _checkIsAtBottom: function () {
    83	      var c = this.container;
    84	      var distance = c.scrollHeight - c.scrollTop - c.clientHeight;
    85	      this.isAtBottom = distance <= this.threshold;
    86	      if (SCROLL_DEBUG) {
    87	        console.log('[ScrollManager] distance=' + distance + ' isAtBottom=' + this.isAtBottom);
    88	      }
    89	      return this.isAtBottom;
    90	    },
    91	
    92	    /**
    93	     * Handle user scroll events.
    94	     */
    95	    _onScroll: function () {
    96	      this._checkIsAtBottom();
    97	      if (this.isAtBottom) {
    98	        this._hideJumpBtn();
    99	        this.hasNewContent = false;
   100	      }
   101	    },
   102	
   103	    /**
   104	     * Call after appending a new message to the container.
   105	     * Conditionally scrolls or shows the jump button.
   106	     *
   107	     * @param {HTMLElement} [messageEl] - The newly appended message element.
   108	     *   Used to detect tall messages and scroll to their top instead of the
   109	     *   container bottom.
   110	     */
   111	    onNewContent: function (messageEl) {
   112	      // Use the cached isAtBottom from the last scroll event, which reflects
   113	      // the state just before the append.
   114	      if (this.isAtBottom) {
   115	        this._scrollToBottomRaf(messageEl || null);
   116	      } else {
   117	        this.hasNewContent = true;
   118	        this._showJumpBtn();
   119	      }
   120	    },
   121	
   122	    /**
   123	     * Scroll container to bottom using requestAnimationFrame to wait for layout.
   124	     *
   125	     * When a message element is provided and is taller than the visible area,
   126	     * scrolls to the top of that message so the user sees the beginning.
   127	     * Otherwise scrolls to the container bottom as usual.
   128	     *
   129	     * @param {HTMLElement|null} messageEl - The newly appended message element.
   130	     */
   131	    _scrollToBottomRaf: function (messageEl) {
   132	      var self = this;
   133	      requestAnimationFrame(function () {
   134	        if (messageEl && messageEl.offsetHeight > self.container.clientHeight) {
   135	          // Message is taller than the visible area: scroll to show its
   136	          // beginning so the user can start reading from the top.
   137	          var rect = messageEl.getBoundingClientRect();
   138	          var containerRect = self.container.getBoundingClientRect();
   139	          self.container.scrollTop += rect.top - containerRect.top;
   140	          if (SCROLL_DEBUG) {
   141	            console.log('[ScrollManager] scrolled to top of tall message');
   142	          }
   143	        } else {
   144	          // Message fits within viewport: scroll to bottom as usual.
   145	          self.container.scrollTop = self.container.scrollHeight;
   146	          if (SCROLL_DEBUG) {
   147	            console.log('[ScrollManager] auto-scrolled to bottom');
   148	          }
   149	        }
   150	        // Re-evaluate position after programmatic scroll.
   151	        self._checkIsAtBottom();
   152	      });
   153	    },
   154	
   155	    /**
   156	     * Programmatic scroll to bottom (e.g., for jump button click).
   157	     */
   158	    scrollToBottom: function () {
   159	      this.container.scrollTop = this.container.scrollHeight;
   160	      this.isAtBottom = true;
   161	      this.hasNewContent = false;
   162	    },
   163	
   164	    _showJumpBtn: function () {
   165	      this.jumpBtn.hidden = false;
   166	    },
   167	
   168	    _hideJumpBtn: function () {
   169	      this.jumpBtn.hidden = true;
   170	    },
   171	  };
   172	
   173	  /**
   174	   * Safely focus an element without causing scroll jumps.
   175	   */
   176	  function safeFocus(el) {
   177	    if (!el) return;
   178	    try {
   179	      el.focus({ preventScroll: true });
   180	    } catch (e) {
   181	      el.focus();
   182	    }
   183	  }
   184	
   185	  /**
   186	   * Aila Chat Widget Manager
   187	   */
   188	  const SiteAssistant = {
   189	    config: null,
   190	    widget: null,
   191	    chatContainer: null,
   192	    inputField: null,
   193	    scrollManager: null,
   194	    isOpen: false,
   195	    isPageMode: false,
   196	    isSending: false,
   197	    messageHistory: [],
   198	    conversationId: null,
   199	    _focusTrapHandler: null,
   200	    _focusTrapElement: null,
   201	
   202	    /**
   203	     * Generate an ephemeral conversation ID (UUID v4).
   204	     *
   205	     * Lives only in this browser tab's JS state. Not persisted.
   206	     */
   207	    generateConversationId: function () {
   208	      if (typeof crypto !== 'undefined' && crypto.randomUUID) {
   209	        return crypto.randomUUID();
   210	      }
   211	      // Fallback for older browsers.
   212	      return 'xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx'.replace(/[xy]/g, function (c) {
   213	        var r = Math.random() * 16 | 0;
   214	        return (c === 'x' ? r : (r & 0x3 | 0x8)).toString(16);
   215	      });
   216	    },
   217	
   218	    /**
   219	     * Initialize the assistant.
   220	     */
   221	    init: function (config) {
   222	      this.config = config;
   223	      this.isPageMode = config.pageMode || false;
   224	      this.conversationId = this.generateConversationId();
   225	
   226	      if (this.isPageMode) {
   227	        this.initPageMode();
   228	      } else {
   229	        this.initWidgetMode();
   230	      }
   231	
   232	      this.bindEvents();
   233	      this.showWelcomeMessage();
   234	    },
   235	
   236	    /**
   237	     * Initialize page mode (dedicated /assistant page).
   238	     */
   239	    initPageMode: function () {
   240	      this.chatContainer = document.getElementById('assistant-chat');
   241	      this.inputField = document.getElementById('assistant-input');
   242	
   243	      if (!this.chatContainer || !this.inputField) {
   244	        console.error('ILAS Assistant: Page elements not found');
   245	        return;
   246	      }
   247	
   248	      // Initialize scroll manager (60px threshold for page mode).
   249	      this.scrollManager = new ScrollManager(this.chatContainer, 60);
   250	
   251	      // Focus input on page load without scrolling.
   252	      safeFocus(this.inputField);
   253	    },
   254	
   255	    /**
   256	     * Initialize widget mode (floating button).
   257	     */
   258	    initWidgetMode: function () {
   259	      this.createWidget();
   260	    },
   261	
   262	    /**
   263	     * Create the floating widget HTML.
   264	     */
   265	    createWidget: function () {
   266	      // Check if widget already exists.
   267	      if (document.getElementById('ilas-assistant-widget-container')) {
   268	        return;
   269	      }
   270	
   271	      const container = document.createElement('div');
   272	      container.id = 'ilas-assistant-widget-container';
   273	      container.className = 'ilas-assistant-widget-container';
   274	      container.innerHTML = this.getWidgetHTML();
   275	
   276	      document.body.appendChild(container);
   277	
   278	      this.widget = container;
   279	      this.chatContainer = container.querySelector('.assistant-chat');
   280	      this.inputField = container.querySelector('.assistant-input');
   281	
   282	      // Initialize scroll manager (80px threshold for widget).
   283	      this.scrollManager = new ScrollManager(this.chatContainer, 80);
   284	
   285	      // Bind widget-specific events.
   286	      this.bindWidgetEvents();
   287	    },
   288	
   289	    /**
   290	     * Get widget HTML template.
   291	     */
   292	    getWidgetHTML: function () {
   293	      var hotlineUrl = this.sanitizeUrl(this.config.canonicalUrls.hotline);
   294	      var applyUrl = this.sanitizeUrl(this.config.canonicalUrls.apply);
   295	      var disclaimer = this.config.disclaimer
   296	        ? this.escapeHtml(this.config.disclaimer)
   297	        : this.escapeHtml(Drupal.t('I search our website for you — I\'m not a lawyer and can\'t give legal advice.'));
   298	
   299	      return `
   300	        <button type="button"
   301	                class="assistant-toggle-btn"
   302	                id="assistant-toggle"
   303	                aria-label="${Drupal.t('Open Aila Chat')}"
   304	                aria-expanded="false"
   305	                aria-controls="assistant-panel">
   306	          <span class="toggle-icon-open"><i class="fas fa-comment-dots" aria-hidden="true"></i></span>
   307	          <span class="toggle-icon-close"><i class="fas fa-times" aria-hidden="true"></i></span>
   308	          <span class="toggle-label">${Drupal.t('Chat')}</span>
   309	        </button>
   310	
   311	        <div class="assistant-panel"
   312	             id="assistant-panel"
   313	             role="dialog"
   314	             aria-modal="true"
   315	             aria-label="${Drupal.t('Aila Chat')}"
   316	             hidden>
   317	          <header class="assistant-panel-header">
   318	            <h2 class="panel-title">
   319	              <i class="fas fa-comment-dots" aria-hidden="true"></i>
   320	              ${Drupal.t('Chat')}
   321	            </h2>
   322	            <button type="button"
   323	                    class="panel-close-btn"
   324	                    aria-label="${Drupal.t('Close chat')}">
   325	              <i class="fas fa-times" aria-hidden="true"></i>
   326	            </button>
   327	          </header>
   328	
   329	          <div class="assistant-disclaimer">
   330	            <i class="fas fa-info-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i>
   331	            <span>${disclaimer}</span>
   332	          </div>
   333	
   334	          <div class="assistant-chat" role="log" aria-live="polite"></div>
   335	
   336	          <div class="assistant-quick-actions">
   337	            <button type="button" class="quick-action-btn" data-action="forms">
   338	              <i class="fas fa-file-alt" aria-hidden="true"></i> ${Drupal.t('Forms')}
   339	            </button>
   340	            <button type="button" class="quick-action-btn" data-action="guides">
   341	              <i class="fas fa-book" aria-hidden="true"></i> ${Drupal.t('Guides')}
   342	            </button>
   343	            <button type="button" class="quick-action-btn" data-action="faq">
   344	              <i class="fas fa-question-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i> ${Drupal.t('FAQs')}
   345	            </button>
   346	            <button type="button" class="quick-action-btn" data-action="apply">
   347	              <i class="fas fa-hands-helping" aria-hidden="true"></i> ${Drupal.t('Apply')}
   348	            </button>
   349	          </div>
   350	
   351	          <form class="assistant-input-form">
   352	            <input type="text"
   353	                   class="assistant-input"
   354	                   placeholder="${Drupal.t('Type your question...')}"
   355	                   autocomplete="off"
   356	                   maxlength="500">
   357	            <button type="submit" class="assistant-send-btn" aria-label="${Drupal.t('Send')}">
   358	              <i class="fas fa-paper-plane" aria-hidden="true"></i>
   359	            </button>
   360	          </form>
   361	
   362	          <footer class="assistant-panel-footer">
   363	            <a href="${this.escapeAttr(hotlineUrl)}" class="footer-link" data-assistant-track="hotline_click">
   364	              ${Drupal.t('Call Hotline')}
   365	            </a>
   366	            <span class="footer-divider">|</span>
   367	            <a href="${this.escapeAttr(applyUrl)}" class="footer-link" data-assistant-track="apply_click">
   368	              ${Drupal.t('Apply for Help')}
   369	            </a>
   370	          </footer>
   371	        </div>
   372	      `;
   373	    },
   374	
   375	    /**
   376	     * Bind widget-specific events.
   377	     */
   378	    bindWidgetEvents: function () {
   379	      const toggle = this.widget.querySelector('#assistant-toggle');
   380	      const closeBtn = this.widget.querySelector('.panel-close-btn');
   381	
   382	      toggle.addEventListener('click', () => this.togglePanel());
   383	      closeBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.closePanel());
   384	
   385	      // Close on Escape key.
   386	      document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
   387	        if (e.key === 'Escape' && this.isOpen) {
   388	          this.closePanel();
   389	        }
   390	      });
   391	
   392	      // Quick action buttons.
   393	      this.widget.querySelectorAll('.quick-action-btn').forEach(btn => {
   394	        btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
   395	          const action = e.currentTarget.dataset.action;
   396	          this.handleQuickAction(action);
   397	        });
   398	      });
   399	    },
   400	
   401	    /**
   402	     * Bind common events (page and widget mode).
   403	     */
   404	    bindEvents: function () {
   405	      // Form submission.
   406	      const forms = document.querySelectorAll('.assistant-input-form');
   407	      forms.forEach(form => {
   408	        form.addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
   409	          e.preventDefault();
   410	          this.sendMessage();
   411	        });
   412	      });
   413	
   414	      // Suggestion buttons (page mode).
   415	      document.querySelectorAll('.suggestion-btn').forEach(btn => {
   416	        btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
   417	          const action = e.currentTarget.dataset.action;
   418	          const url = e.currentTarget.dataset.url;
   419	          if (url) {
   420	            this.trackClick(action + '_click', url);
   421	            window.location.href = url;
   422	          } else {
   423	            this.handleQuickAction(action);
   424	          }
   425	        });
   426	      });
   427	
   428	      // Track footer link clicks.
   429	      document.querySelectorAll('[data-assistant-track]').forEach(link => {
   430	        link.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
   431	          const trackType = e.currentTarget.dataset.assistantTrack;
   432	          this.trackClick(trackType, e.currentTarget.href);
   433	        });
   434	      });
   435	    },
   436	
   437	    /**
   438	     * Toggle the panel open/closed.
   439	     */
   440	    togglePanel: function () {
   441	      if (this.isOpen) {
   442	        this.closePanel();
   443	      } else {
   444	        this.openPanel();
   445	      }
   446	    },
   447	
   448	    /**
   449	     * Open the panel.
   450	     */
   451	    openPanel: function () {
   452	      const toggle = this.widget.querySelector('#assistant-toggle');
   453	      const panel = this.widget.querySelector('#assistant-panel');
   454	
   455	      panel.hidden = false;
   456	      toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
   457	      this.widget.classList.add('is-open');
   458	      this.isOpen = true;
   459	
   460	      // Focus input without causing scroll jumps.
   461	      setTimeout(() => {
   462	        safeFocus(this.inputField);
   463	      }, 100);
   464	
   465	      // Track open event.
   466	      this.trackEvent('chat_open');
   467	
   468	      // Create focus trap.
   469	      this.createFocusTrap(panel);
   470	    },
   471	
   472	    /**
   473	     * Close the panel.
   474	     */
   475	    closePanel: function () {
   476	      const toggle = this.widget.querySelector('#assistant-toggle');
   477	      const panel = this.widget.querySelector('#assistant-panel');
   478	
   479	      panel.hidden = true;
   480	      toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
   481	      this.widget.classList.remove('is-open');
   482	      this.isOpen = false;
   483	
   484	      // Remove focus trap to prevent listener accumulation.
   485	      this.destroyFocusTrap();
   486	
   487	      // Return focus to toggle.
   488	      toggle.focus();
   489	    },
   490	
   491	    /**
   492	     * Create a focus trap within an element.
   493	     *
   494	     * Queries focusable elements dynamically on each Tab press so that
   495	     * elements added after the panel opens (e.g. suggestion buttons in
   496	     * new messages) are included in the trap.
   497	     *
   498	     * Only one trap listener exists at a time — destroyFocusTrap removes it.
   499	     */
   500	    createFocusTrap: function (element) {
   501	      // Remove any existing trap first to prevent accumulation.
   502	      this.destroyFocusTrap();
   503	
   504	      this._focusTrapElement = element;
   505	      this._focusTrapHandler = function (e) {
   506	        if (e.key !== 'Tab') return;
   507	
   508	        // Query focusable elements dynamically each time.
   509	        var focusables = element.querySelectorAll(
   510	          'button:not([disabled]):not([hidden]), [href]:not([hidden]), input:not([disabled]):not([hidden]), select:not([disabled]):not([hidden]), textarea:not([disabled]):not([hidden]), [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"]):not([hidden])'
   511	        );
   512	
   513	        if (focusables.length === 0) return;
   514	
   515	        var first = focusables[0];
   516	        var last = focusables[focusables.length - 1];
   517	
   518	        if (e.shiftKey) {
   519	          if (document.activeElement === first) {
   520	            last.focus();
   521	            e.preventDefault();
   522	          }
   523	        } else {
   524	          if (document.activeElement === last) {
   525	            first.focus();
   526	            e.preventDefault();
   527	          }
   528	        }
   529	      };
   530	
   531	      element.addEventListener('keydown', this._focusTrapHandler);
   532	    },
   533	
   534	    /**
   535	     * Remove the focus trap listener.
   536	     */
   537	    destroyFocusTrap: function () {
   538	      if (this._focusTrapHandler && this._focusTrapElement) {
   539	        this._focusTrapElement.removeEventListener('keydown', this._focusTrapHandler);
   540	      }
   541	      this._focusTrapHandler = null;
   542	      this._focusTrapElement = null;
   543	    },
   544	
   545	    /**
   546	     * Show welcome message.
   547	     */
   548	    showWelcomeMessage: function () {
   549	      const message = this.config.welcomeMessage || Drupal.t('Hi, I\'m Aila (eye-luh). I can help you find forms, guides, and answers on our website. What are you looking for?');
   550	      this.addMessage('assistant', message);
   551	    },
   552	
   553	    /**
   554	     * Send a message to the API.
   555	     *
   556	     * Guarded by isSending to prevent duplicate sends and race conditions.
   557	     */
   558	    sendMessage: function () {
   559	      if (this.isSending) return;
   560	
   561	      const input = this.isPageMode
   562	        ? document.getElementById('assistant-input')
   563	        : this.widget.querySelector('.assistant-input');
   564	
   565	      const message = input.value.trim();
   566	      if (!message) return;
   567	
   568	      // Lock sending state.
   569	      this.isSending = true;
   570	      this.setSendingState(true);
   571	
   572	      // Add user message to chat.
   573	      this.addMessage('user', message);
   574	
   575	      // Clear input.
   576	      input.value = '';
   577	
   578	      // Show typing indicator.
   579	      this.showTyping();
   580	
   581	      var self = this;
   582	
   583	      // Send to API.
   584	      this.callApi('/message', {
   585	        method: 'POST',
   586	        body: JSON.stringify({
   587	          message: message,
   588	          conversation_id: this.conversationId,
   589	          context: {
   590	            history: this.messageHistory.slice(-5),
   591	          },
   592	        }),
   593	      })
   594	        .then(function (response) {
   595	          self.isSending = false;
   596	          self.setSendingState(false);
   597	          self.hideTyping();
   598	          self.handleResponse(response);
   599	        })
   600	        .catch(function (error) {
   601	          self.isSending = false;
   602	          self.setSendingState(false);
   603	          self.hideTyping();
   604	          self.addMessage('assistant', self.getErrorMessage(error));
   605	          console.error('ILAS Assistant API error:', error);
   606	        });
   607	    },
   608	
   609	    /**
   610	     * Handle quick action buttons.
   611	     */
   612	    handleQuickAction: function (action) {
   613	      if (this.isSending) return;
   614	
   615	      // Messages must match IntentRouter patterns.
   616	      const actionMessages = {
   617	        forms: Drupal.t('Find a form'),
   618	        guides: Drupal.t('Find a guide'),
   619	        faq: Drupal.t('Show me FAQs'),
   620	        apply: Drupal.t('Apply for help'),
   621	        hotline: Drupal.t('Call the hotline'),
   622	        topics: Drupal.t('What services do you offer?'),
   623	        // Form Finder topic actions.
   624	        forms_housing: Drupal.t('Find housing and eviction forms'),
   625	        forms_family: Drupal.t('Find family and divorce forms'),
   626	        forms_consumer: Drupal.t('Find consumer and debt forms'),
   627	        forms_seniors: Drupal.t('Find senior and estate planning forms'),
   628	        forms_safety: Drupal.t('Find protection order forms'),
   629	        forms_employment: Drupal.t('Find employment forms'),
   630	        forms_benefits: Drupal.t('Find public benefits forms'),
   631	        // Guide Finder topic actions.
   632	        guides_housing: Drupal.t('Find housing and eviction guides'),
   633	        guides_family: Drupal.t('Find family and divorce guides'),
   634	        guides_consumer: Drupal.t('Find consumer and debt guides'),
   635	        guides_seniors: Drupal.t('Find senior and estate planning guides'),
   636	        guides_employment: Drupal.t('Find employment guides'),
   637	        guides_benefits: Drupal.t('Find public benefits guides'),
   638	        guides_safety: Drupal.t('Find protection order guides'),
   639	        // TopIntentsPack service area intents.
   640	        topic_housing: Drupal.t('Tell me about housing legal help'),
   641	        topic_family: Drupal.t('Tell me about family legal help'),
   642	        topic_consumer: Drupal.t('Tell me about consumer legal help'),
   643	        topic_seniors: Drupal.t('Tell me about seniors legal help'),
   644	        topic_health: Drupal.t('Tell me about health and benefits legal help'),
   645	        topic_civil_rights: Drupal.t('Tell me about civil rights legal help'),
   646	        topic_employment: Drupal.t('Tell me about employment legal help'),
   647	        // TopIntentsPack sub-topic intents.
   648	        topic_family_custody: Drupal.t('I need custody information'),
   649	        topic_family_divorce: Drupal.t('I need divorce information'),
   650	        topic_family_child_support: Drupal.t('I need child support information'),
   651	        topic_family_protection_order: Drupal.t('I need protection order information'),
   652	        topic_housing_eviction: Drupal.t('I need eviction help'),
   653	        topic_housing_foreclosure: Drupal.t('I need foreclosure help'),
   654	        topic_consumer_debt_collection: Drupal.t('I need debt collection help'),
   655	        topic_consumer_bankruptcy: Drupal.t('I need bankruptcy information'),
   656	        // TopIntentsPack navigation intents.
   657	        eligibility: Drupal.t('Do I qualify for help?'),
   658	        risk_detector: Drupal.t('Take the legal risk assessment'),
   659	        offices_contact: Drupal.t('Find an office near me'),
   660	        legal_advice_line: Drupal.t('Call the legal advice line'),
   661	        apply_for_help: Drupal.t('Apply for help'),
   662	        forms_finder: Drupal.t('Find a form'),
   663	        guides_finder: Drupal.t('Find a guide'),
   664	        services_overview: Drupal.t('What services do you offer?'),
   665	        feedback: Drupal.t('Give feedback'),
   666	        donations: Drupal.t('How can I donate?'),
   667	        faq: Drupal.t('Show me FAQs'),
   668	      };
   669	
   670	      const message = actionMessages[action] || action;
   671	
   672	      // Track suggestion click events for debugging.
   673	      this.trackEvent('suggestion_click', action);
   674	
   675	      // Lock sending state.
   676	      this.isSending = true;
   677	      this.setSendingState(true);
   678	
   679	      // Add as user message.
   680	      this.addMessage('user', message);
   681	
   682	      // Show typing.
   683	      this.showTyping();
   684	
   685	      var self = this;
   686	
   687	      // Send to API.
   688	      this.callApi('/message', {
   689	        method: 'POST',
   690	        body: JSON.stringify({
   691	          message: message,
   692	          conversation_id: this.conversationId,
   693	          context: { quickAction: action },
   694	        }),
   695	      })
   696	        .then(function (response) {
   697	          self.isSending = false;
   698	          self.setSendingState(false);
   699	          self.hideTyping();
   700	          self.handleResponse(response);
   701	        })
   702	        .catch(function (error) {
   703	          self.isSending = false;
   704	          self.setSendingState(false);
   705	          self.hideTyping();
   706	          self.addMessage('assistant', self.getErrorMessage(error));
   707	        });
   708	    },
   709	
   710	    /**
   711	     * Handle API response.
   712	     */
   713	    handleResponse: function (response) {
   714	      if (!response) return;
   715	
   716	      // Track topic if present.
   717	      if (response.type === 'topic' && response.topic) {
   718	        this.trackEvent('topic_selected', response.topic.name || '');
   719	      }
   720	
   721	      // Build response message.
   722	      let html = '';
   723	
   724	      if (response.message) {
   725	        html += '<p>' + this.escapeHtml(response.message) + '</p>';
   726	      }
   727	
   728	      // Handle different response types.
   729	      switch (response.type) {
   730	        case 'faq':
   731	          html += this.renderFaqResults(response.results, response.fallback_url);
   732	          break;
   733	
   734	        case 'resources':
   735	          html += this.renderResourceResults(response.results, response.fallback_url, response.fallback_label);
   736	          if (response.disclaimer) {
   737	            html += '<p class="resource-disclaimer"><em>' + this.escapeHtml(response.disclaimer) + '</em></p>';
   738	          }
   739	          break;
   740	
   741	        case 'navigation':
   742	          html += this.renderNavigation(response);
   743	          break;
   744	
   745	        case 'apply_cta':
   746	          html += this.renderApplyCta(response);
   747	          break;
   748	
   749	        case 'topic':
   750	          html += this.renderTopicInfo(response.topic, response.service_area_url);
   751	          break;
   752	
   753	        case 'escalation':
   754	          // Render links array if present (new format).
   755	          if (response.links && response.links.length > 0) {
   756	            html += this.renderLinks(response.links);
   757	          }
   758	          if (response.actions) {
   759	            html += this.renderEscalation(response.actions);
   760	          }
   761	          break;
   762	
   763	        case 'eligibility':
   764	          // Show caveat if present.
   765	          if (response.caveat) {
   766	            html += '<p class="eligibility-caveat"><em>' + this.escapeHtml(response.caveat) + '</em></p>';
   767	          }
   768	          if (response.links && response.links.length > 0) {
   769	            html += this.renderLinks(response.links);
   770	          }
   771	          break;
   772	
   773	        case 'services_overview':
   774	          if (response.service_areas && response.service_areas.length > 0) {
   775	            html += this.renderServiceAreas(response.service_areas);
   776	          }
   777	          if (response.url) {
   778	            html += this.renderNavigation(response);
   779	          }
   780	          break;
   781	
   782	        case 'forms_inventory':
   783	        case 'guides_inventory':
   784	        case 'services_inventory':
   785	        case 'form_finder_clarify':
   786	        case 'guide_finder_clarify':
   787	          // Multi-turn finder: show topic chips for narrowing down.
   788	          if (response.topic_suggestions) {
   789	            html += this.renderTopicSuggestions(response.topic_suggestions);
   790	          }
   791	          // Show "Browse All ..." fallback link.
   792	          if (response.primary_action && response.primary_action.url) {
   793	            html += '<p class="form-finder-fallback"><a href="' + this.escapeAttr(this.sanitizeUrl(response.primary_action.url)) + '" class="result-link" data-assistant-track="resource_click">' + this.escapeHtml(response.primary_action.label) + '</a></p>';
   794	          }
   795	          break;
   796	
   797	        case 'fallback':
   798	          if (response.topic_suggestions) {
   799	            html += this.renderTopicSuggestions(response.topic_suggestions);
   800	          }
   801	          if (response.actions) {
   802	            html += this.renderEscalation(response.actions);
   803	          }
   804	          break;
   805	
   806	        case 'greeting':
   807	          if (response.suggestions) {
   808	            html += this.renderSuggestions(response.suggestions);
   809	          }
   810	          break;
   811	      }
   812	
   813	      // Render TopIntentsPack chips for any response type that has them.
   814	      if (response.suggestions && !html.includes('topic-suggestions') && !html.includes('inline-suggestions')) {
   815	        html += this.renderSuggestions(response.suggestions);
   816	      }
   817	
   818	      this.addMessage('assistant', html, true);
   819	    },
   820	
   821	    /**
   822	     * Classify results into rendering modes based on score distribution.
   823	     *
   824	     * @param {Array} results - Array of result objects with optional score.
   825	     * @return {string} One of: 'empty', 'single_best', 'best_match', 'ambiguous'.
   826	     */
   827	    classifyResults: function (results) {
   828	      if (!results || results.length === 0) {
   829	        return 'empty';
   830	      }
   831	      if (results.length === 1) {
   832	        return 'single_best';
   833	      }
   834	      // Check score gap between first and second result.
   835	      var first = results[0].score || 0;
   836	      var second = results[1].score || 0;
   837	      if (first > 0 && second > 0) {
   838	        var gap = (first - second) / first;
   839	        if (gap >= 0.30) {
   840	          return 'best_match';
   841	        }
   842	      }
   843	      return 'ambiguous';
   844	    },
   845	
   846	    /**
   847	     * Render semantic source indicator for vector-sourced results.
   848	     *
   849	     * @param {Object} result - A result object with optional source field.
   850	     * @return {string} HTML string for the indicator, or empty string.
   851	     */
   852	    renderSourceIndicator: function (result) {
   853	      if (!result || result.source !== 'vector') {
   854	        return '';
   855	      }
   856	      return '<span class="source-indicator" aria-label="' + Drupal.t('Found via similar questions') + '">' +
   857	        '<span aria-hidden="true">&#x1f4a1;</span> ' +
   858	        Drupal.t('Based on similar questions') +
   859	        '</span>';
   860	    },
   861	
   862	    /**
   863	     * Truncate text to a character limit, breaking at word boundary.
   864	     *
   865	     * @param {string} text - The text to truncate.
   866	     * @param {number} limit - Maximum characters.
   867	     * @return {string} Truncated text with ellipsis if needed.
   868	     */
   869	    truncateText: function (text, limit) {
   870	      if (!text || text.length <= limit) {
   871	        return text || '';
   872	      }
   873	      var truncated = text.substring(0, limit);
   874	      var lastSpace = truncated.lastIndexOf(' ');
   875	      if (lastSpace > limit * 0.6) {
   876	        truncated = truncated.substring(0, lastSpace);
   877	      }
   878	      return truncated + '\u2026';
   879	    },
   880	
   881	    /**
   882	     * Render FAQ results.
   883	     */
   884	    renderFaqResults: function (results, fallbackUrl) {
   885	      if (!results || results.length === 0) {
   886	        return '<p><a href="' + this.escapeAttr(this.sanitizeUrl(fallbackUrl)) + '" class="result-link" data-assistant-track="resource_click">' + Drupal.t('Browse all FAQs') + '</a></p>';
   887	      }
   888	
   889	      var self = this;
   890	      var mode = this.classifyResults(results);
   891	      var html = '<div class="faq-results">';
   892	
   893	      results.forEach(function (faq, index) {
   894	        var isBest = (index === 0 && (mode === 'single_best' || mode === 'best_match'));
   895	        var isSecondary = (!isBest && (mode === 'single_best' || mode === 'best_match'));
   896	        var sourceIndicator = self.renderSourceIndicator(faq);
   897	        var safeUrl = self.escapeAttr(self.sanitizeUrl(faq.url));
   898	
   899	        if (isBest) {
   900	          // Elevated best-match card.
   901	          var truncatedAnswer = self.truncateText(self.escapeHtml(faq.answer), 120);
   902	          html += '<div class="faq-result faq-result--best">' +
   903	            '<span class="best-match-label">' + Drupal.t('Best match') + '</span>' +
   904	            sourceIndicator +
   905	            '<h4 class="faq-question">' + self.escapeHtml(faq.question) + '</h4>' +
   906	            '<p class="faq-answer">' + truncatedAnswer + '</p>' +
   907	            '<a href="' + safeUrl + '" class="faq-link" data-assistant-track="resource_click">' + Drupal.t('Read more on page') + ' \u2192</a>' +
   908	            '</div>';
   909	        }
   910	        else if (isSecondary) {
   911	          // Show "Also helpful" heading before the first secondary result.
   912	          if (index === 1) {
   913	            html += '<p class="also-helpful-heading">' + Drupal.t('Also helpful:') + '</p>';
   914	          }
   915	          // Secondary: question + link only.
   916	          html += '<div class="faq-result faq-result--secondary">' +
   917	            sourceIndicator +
   918	            '<a href="' + safeUrl + '" class="faq-link" data-assistant-track="resource_click">' + self.escapeHtml(faq.question) + '</a>' +
   919	            '</div>';
   920	        }
   921	        else {
   922	          // Ambiguous mode: all results equally with truncated answers.
   923	          var truncatedAnswer = self.truncateText(self.escapeHtml(faq.answer), 120);
   924	          html += '<div class="faq-result">' +
   925	            sourceIndicator +
   926	            '<h4 class="faq-question">' + self.escapeHtml(faq.question) + '</h4>' +
   927	            '<p class="faq-answer">' + truncatedAnswer + '</p>' +
   928	            '<a href="' + safeUrl + '" class="faq-link" data-assistant-track="resource_click">' + Drupal.t('Read more on page') + ' \u2192</a>' +
   929	            '</div>';
   930	        }
   931	      });
   932	      html += '</div>';
   933	      return html;
   934	    },
   935	
   936	    /**
   937	     * Render resource results.
   938	     */
   939	    renderResourceResults: function (results, fallbackUrl, fallbackLabel) {
   940	      if (!results || results.length === 0) {
   941	        var label = fallbackLabel ? this.escapeHtml(fallbackLabel) : Drupal.t('Browse all resources');
   942	        return '<p><a href="' + this.escapeAttr(this.sanitizeUrl(fallbackUrl)) + '" class="result-link" data-assistant-track="resource_click">' + label + '</a></p>';
   943	      }
   944	
   945	      var self = this;
   946	      var mode = this.classifyResults(results);
   947	      var html = '<ul class="resource-results">';
   948	
   949	      results.forEach(function (resource, index) {
   950	        var isBest = (index === 0 && (mode === 'single_best' || mode === 'best_match'));
   951	        var isSecondary = (!isBest && (mode === 'single_best' || mode === 'best_match'));
   952	        var icon = resource.type === 'form' ? 'file-alt' : (resource.type === 'guide' ? 'book' : 'file');
   953	        var sourceIndicator = self.renderSourceIndicator(resource);
   954	        var safeUrl = self.escapeAttr(self.sanitizeUrl(resource.url));
   955	        var badge = resource.has_file ? '<span class="badge">PDF</span>' : '';
   956	
   957	        if (isBest) {
   958	          html += '<li class="resource-result resource-result--best">' +
   959	            '<span class="best-match-label">' + Drupal.t('Best match') + '</span>' +
   960	            sourceIndicator +
   961	            '<a href="' + safeUrl + '" class="resource-link" data-assistant-track="resource_click">' +
   962	            '<i class="fas fa-' + icon + '" aria-hidden="true"></i>' +
   963	            '<span class="resource-title">' + self.escapeHtml(resource.title) + '</span>' +
   964	            badge +
   965	            '</a>' +
   966	            (resource.description ? '<p class="resource-desc">' + self.escapeHtml(resource.description) + '</p>' : '') +
   967	            '</li>';
   968	          // "Also helpful" heading after best match if there are more results.
   969	          if (results.length > 1) {
   970	            html += '<li class="also-helpful-heading" aria-hidden="true">' + Drupal.t('Also helpful:') + '</li>';
   971	          }
   972	        }
   973	        else if (isSecondary) {
   974	          // Secondary: link only, no description, no background.
   975	          html += '<li class="resource-result resource-result--secondary">' +
   976	            sourceIndicator +
   977	            '<a href="' + safeUrl + '" class="resource-link resource-link--secondary" data-assistant-track="resource_click">' +
   978	            '<i class="fas fa-' + icon + '" aria-hidden="true"></i>' +
   979	            '<span class="resource-title">' + self.escapeHtml(resource.title) + '</span>' +
   980	            badge +
   981	            '</a>' +
   982	            '</li>';
   983	        }
   984	        else {
   985	          // Ambiguous: all equal.
   986	          html += '<li class="resource-result">' +
   987	            sourceIndicator +
   988	            '<a href="' + safeUrl + '" class="resource-link" data-assistant-track="resource_click">' +
   989	            '<i class="fas fa-' + icon + '" aria-hidden="true"></i>' +
   990	            '<span class="resource-title">' + self.escapeHtml(resource.title) + '</span>' +
   991	            badge +
   992	            '</a>' +
   993	            (resource.description ? '<p class="resource-desc">' + self.escapeHtml(resource.description) + '</p>' : '') +
   994	            '</li>';
   995	        }
   996	      });
   997	      html += '</ul>';
   998	      return html;
   999	    },
  1000	
  1001	    /**
  1002	     * Render navigation response.
  1003	     */
  1004	    renderNavigation: function (response) {
  1005	      var html = '';
  1006	      if (response.url) {
  1007	        var safeUrl = this.escapeAttr(this.sanitizeUrl(response.url));
  1008	        var ctaText = response.cta ? this.escapeHtml(response.cta) : Drupal.t('Go to page');
  1009	        html += '<p>' +
  1010	          '<a href="' + safeUrl + '" class="cta-button" data-assistant-track="resource_click">' +
  1011	          ctaText +
  1012	          ' <i class="fas fa-arrow-right" aria-hidden="true"></i>' +
  1013	          '</a>' +
  1014	          '</p>';
  1015	      }
  1016	      return html;
  1017	    },
  1018	
  1019	    /**
  1020	     * Render the apply CTA response with three application methods.
  1021	     */
  1022	    renderApplyCta: function (response) {
  1023	      var self = this;
  1024	      var html = '<div class="apply-methods">';
  1025	
  1026	      if (response.apply_methods && response.apply_methods.length > 0) {
  1027	        response.apply_methods.forEach(function (method) {
  1028	          var iconClass = self.escapeAttr(method.icon || 'arrow-right');
  1029	          var methodClass = self.escapeAttr(method.method || '');
  1030	          var ctaUrl = self.escapeAttr(self.sanitizeUrl(method.cta_url));
  1031	
  1032	          html += '<div class="apply-method apply-method--' + methodClass + '">';
  1033	          html += '<h4 class="apply-method__heading"><i class="fas fa-' + iconClass + '" aria-hidden="true"></i> ' + self.escapeHtml(method.heading) + '</h4>';
  1034	          html += '<p class="apply-method__desc">' + self.escapeHtml(method.description) + '</p>';
  1035	          html += '<a href="' + ctaUrl + '" class="cta-button" data-assistant-track="apply_cta_click">' + self.escapeHtml(method.cta_label) + ' <i class="fas fa-arrow-right" aria-hidden="true"></i></a>';
  1036	
  1037	          if (method.secondary_label && method.secondary_url) {
  1038	            var secUrl = self.escapeAttr(self.sanitizeUrl(method.secondary_url));
  1039	            html += ' <a href="' + secUrl + '" class="apply-method__secondary-link" data-assistant-track="apply_secondary_click">' + self.escapeHtml(method.secondary_label) + '</a>';
  1040	          }
  1041	
  1042	          html += '</div>';
  1043	        });
  1044	      }
  1045	
  1046	      html += '</div>';
  1047	
  1048	      if (response.followup) {
  1049	        html += '<p class="apply-followup"><em>' + this.escapeHtml(response.followup) + '</em></p>';
  1050	      }
  1051	
  1052	      return html;
  1053	    },
  1054	
  1055	    /**
  1056	     * Render topic info.

  1058	    renderTopicInfo: function (topic, serviceAreaUrl) {

  1062	        html += '<p>' + Drupal.t('Related service areas:') + '</p><ul>';
  1063	        topic.service_areas.forEach(function (area) {

  1065	        });

  1072	          Drupal.t('Learn more') +
  1073	          ' <i class="fas fa-arrow-right" aria-hidden="true"></i>' +
  1074	          '</a>' +
  1075	          '</p>';
  1076	      }
  1077	      return html;
  1078	    },
  1079	
  1080	    /**
  1081	     * Render escalation actions.

  1083	    renderEscalation: function (actions) {

  1092	          self.escapeHtml(action.label) +
  1093	          '</a>';
  1094	      });
  1095	      html += '</div>';
  1096	      return html;
  1097	    },
  1098	
  1099	    /**

  1102	    renderSuggestions: function (suggestions) {
  1103	      if (!suggestions || suggestions.length === 0) return '';
  1104
